wird_sub_cat_id_1.ar_info:
عن ثوبان مولى رسول الله أنه قال: كانَ رَسولُ اللهِ ، إذَا انْصَرَفَ مِن صَلَاتِهِ اسْتَغْفَرَ ثَلَاثًا وَقالَ: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ ذَا الجَلَالِ وَالإِكْرَامِ. قالَ الوَلِيدُ: فَقُلتُ لِلأَوْزَاعِيِّ: كيفَ الاسْتِغْفَارُ؟ قالَ: تَقُولُ: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ، أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللَّهَ ".
 أخرجه مسلم (591)

 #Thawbaan, the servant of the Prophet (SA) reported that the Prophet (SA) on finishing hir prayers used to ask for forgiveness 3 times and then say “O Allah, You are the Salaam, from You is the Salaam, Blessed You the One of Awe and Nobleness”. al-Waleed asked al-Awza’ee how was the request for forgiveness; he answered you say “Forgive me Allah”.
 Reported by Imam Muslim 591.

 #عن أبي ذر الغفاري رضي الله عنه أن النبي قال: "مَن قال في دُبرِ صلاةِ الفجرِ وهو ثانٍ رجليه قَبلَ أن يتكلَّمَ (لا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ ، وحدَهُ لا شريكَ لَهُ ، لَهُ الملكُ ولَهُ الحمدُ ، يُحيي ويُميتُ وَهوَ على كلِّ شيءٍ قديرٌ ) عشرَ مرَّاتٍ كَتب اللَّهُ له عشرَ حسناتٍ ومَحا عنهُ عشرَ سيئاتٍ ورفعَ له عشرَ درجاتٍ وكان يومَه ذلك كله في حرزٍ من كلِّ مكروهٍ وحُرِسَ منَ الشَّيطانِ ولم ينبغِ لذَنبٍ أن يدرِكَه في ذلك اليومِ إلا الشِّركَ باللَّهِ تعالى ".
 أخرجه الترمذي (3474)، والنسائي في ((السنن الكبرى)) (9955)

 #Abu Dharr al-Ghifari ٌِ reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “Whoever says after Fajr Prayer, while still folding his legs and before talking anything, (There is no god but Allah, the One and Only; Allah has no associate; to Him belongs the Domain; all credit belongs to Him. He gives life, causes death; He is the All-arranging) 10 times, Allah grants him 10 Hasanat, removes 10 Sayyia', raise him 10 grades; and all his day will be in protection from evil and the Satan; no sin may be recorded against him, unless he makes Shirk”.
 Related by Thirmithi (3474) and Nasa’ee in (AsSunan al-Kubra 9955).

 #عن بريدة بن الحصيب الأسلمي رضي الله عنه أن النبي  قال: "من قال حين يصبحُ أو حين يمسي: (اللهمَّ أنت ربي لا إله إلا أنتَ، خلقْتَني وأنا عبدُك وأنا على عهدِك ووعدِك ما استطعتُ، أعوذُ بك من شرِّ ما صنعتُ، أبوءُ بنعمتِك وأبوءُ بذنبي، فاغفرْ لي إنه لا يغفرُ الذنوبَ إلا أنت . فمات من يومِه أو من ليلتِه دخل الجنَّةَ)".
 أخرجه أبو داود (5070) واللفظ له، والنسائي في الكبرى (10417)، وابن ماجه (3872)، وأحمد (23013)،
 وفي البخاري (6306) عَنْ شَدَّادِ بْنِ أَوْسٍ رَضِيَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسم “سيد الاستغفار أن تقول (اللهمَّ أنت ربي لا إله إلا أنتَ، خلقْتَني وأنا عبدُك وأنا على عهدِك ووعدِك ما استطعتُ، أعوذُ بك من شرِّ ما صنعتُ، أبوءُ بنعمتِك وأبوءُ بذنبي، فاغفرْ لي إنه لا يغفرُ الذنوبَ إلا أنت) مَنْ قَالَهَا مِنَ النَّهَارِ مُوقِنًا بِهَا، فَمَاتَ مِنْ يَوْمِهِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُمْسِي فَهُوَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ، وَمَنْ قَالَهَا مِنَ اللَّيْلِ وَهْوَ مُوقِنٌ بِهَا، فَمَاتَ قَبْلَ أَنْ يُصْبِحَ فَهْوَ مِنْ أَهْلِ الْجَنَّةِ).

 #Buraidah bin al-Haseeb al-Aslami (RA) reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “Whoever says in the morning or in the evening (O Allah, You are my Lord; no god but You; You have created me, and I am Your slave. I abide by Your covenant and promise as best as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have committed. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me; I confess my sin; forgive me. None can forgive but You.) if he dies at that day or night will go to Paradise. Narrated by Abu-Dawood (5070), an-Nasa’ee (in AsSunan al-Kubra 10417), Ibn Majah (3872), Ahmad (23013).
 In Al-Bukhari (6306), Shaddad bin Aws (RA) reported the Prophet (SA) as saying  “The best of all requests for forgiveness is to say (O Allah, You are my Lord; no god but You; You have created me, and I am Your slave. I abide by Your covenant and promise as best as I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have committed. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me; I confess my sin; forgive me. None can forgive but You). Whoever says it in the day in full faith and dies in that day, he is of the people of Paradise; whoever says it in the night in full faith and dies in that night, he is of the people of Paradise.”

 #عن الحارث بن مسلم التميمي رضي الله عنه أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم  قال: "إذا صلَّيتَ الصبحَ فقل قبل أن تتكلَّمَ: (اللَّهمَّ أَجِرْنِي من النَّارِ سبعَ مرَّاتٍ)، فإنَّكَ إن مِتَّ مِن يومِك؛ كتب اللهُ لكَ جوارًا من النَّارِ، وإذا صليتَ المغربَ فقل قبل أن تتكلَّمَ: (اللَّهمَّ أَجِرْنِي من النَّارِ سبعَ مرَّاتٍ)، فإنَّك إذا مِتَّ مِن ليلَتِك؛ كتب اللهُ لكَ جِوارًا مِن النَّارِ ".
 أخرجه أبو داود (5079)، وأحمد (18083)، والنسائي في ((السنن الكبرى)) (9939)

 #Al-Harith bin Muslim al-Tamimi (RA) reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “When you finish your Fajr Prayer, before you start talking, say (O Allah, Protect me from the Hell Fire) seven times. If you die at that day, Allah will prescribe for you a security of the Hell Fire. Also, when you finish al-Maghrib Prayer,   say before you start talking (O Allah, Protect me from the Hell Fire). If you die at that night, Allah will prescribe for your a security against the Hell Fire.
 Narrated by Abu-Dawood (5079), Ahmad (18083), An-Nasa’ee (in As-Sunan al-Kubra 9939).

 #ورد عن بعض أصحاب النبي أن النبي قالَ لرَجُلٍ: كَيفَ تقولُ في الصَّلاةِ، قالَ: أتَشَهَّدُ وأقولُ: اللَّهمَّ إنِّي أسألُكَ الجنَّةَ، وأَعوذُ بِكَ منَ النَّارِ أما إنِّي لا أُحسنُ دَندنتَكَ ولا دَندنةَ مُعاذٍ فقالَ النَّبيُّ حولَها نُدَنْدنُ ".
 أخرجه أبو داود (792), وابن ماجه (910)، وأحمد (15898).

#The Prophet (SA) was reported as asking a man “What do you say in your prayers?. The man answered “Once I finish my Tashahhud, I say (O Allah, I ask you the Jannah and I seek refuge in You from the Hell Fire). I am not good at any other things you mumble with Mu’ath.”. The Prophet (SA) responded ‘We mumble about it’.”
 Narrated by Abu-Dawood (792), Ibn-Majah (910), Ahmad (15898).

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: لا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لا شَرِيكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ. يُحْيِي وَيُميْتُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah, wahdahu la sharika lah. Lahu al-mulku walahu al-hamdu. Yuhyi wa yumiitu wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer.
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: There is no god but Allah, The One and Only. Allah has no associate; to Him belongs the Domain and Credit. He gives life, causes death, and is the All-Arranging.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ رَبِّي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ. خَلَقْتَنِي وَأَنَا عَبْدُكَ. وَأَنَا عَلَى عَهْدِكَ وَوَعْدِكَ مَا اسْتَطَعْتُ. أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا صَنَعْتُ. أَبُوءُ لَكَ بِنِعْمَتِكَ عَلَيَّ. وَأَبُوءُ بِذَنْبِي. فَاغْفِرْ لِي فَإِنَّهُ لاَ يَغْفِرُ الذُّنُوبَ إِلا أَنْتَ
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma anta rabbi la ilaha illa anta. Khalaqtani wa ana abduka. Wa ana 'ala 'ahdika wa wa'dika ma istata'tu. A'udhu bika min sharri ma sana'tu. Abu'u laka bini'matika 'alayya. Wa abu'u bi dhanbi. Faghfir li fa'innahu la yaghfiru al-dhunuba illa anta.
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are my Lord; no god but You; You created me, and I am Your slave. I abide by Your covenant and promise as best I can. I seek refuge in You from the evil of what I have committed. I acknowledge Your blessing upon me; I confess my sin; Forgive me. None can forgive but You.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ العَظِيمَ الَّذِي لا إلَهَ إلاَّ هُوَ، الحَيَّ القَيُّومَ، وَأتُوبُ إلَيهِ تَوْبَةَ عَبْدٍ ظَّالِمٍ لِنَفْسِهِ لاَ يَمْلِكُ لِنَفْسِهِ ضَرًّا وَلاَ نَفْعاً وَلاَ مَوْتًا وَلاَ حَيَاةً وَلاَ نُشُوْرًا
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullaha al-azim alladhi la ilaha illa huwa, al-hayy al-qayyum, wa atubu ilayh. Tawbata 'abdin zalimin linafsihi la yamliku linafsihi darran wa la naf'an wa la mawta wa la hayata wa la nushoora.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: I seek forgiveness of Allah, the Majestic. No god but Him, the Living, and Self-subsistent. I repent to Allah as a helpless slave who cannot bring good, evil, death, life, or resurrection to himself.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: لا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ اللهُ
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: There is no god but Allah.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدً رَسُوْلُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Sayyiduna Muhammad Rasulullah, sallallahu 'alayhi wa sallam.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Our Honourable Muhammad ﷺ is the Messenger of Allah

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ أَجِرْنَا مِنَ النَّار
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma ajirna min al-nar.
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: O Allah! Protect us from the Hell fire.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ نَسْأَلُكَ رِضَاكَ وَالْجَنَّة
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma nas’aluka ridhaka wal-jannah.
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: O Allah! We seek Your pleasure and Paradise.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: وَنَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ وَالنَّار
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa na'udhu bika min sakhatika wa al-nar.
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: We seek refuge in You from Your anger and Hell Fire.

wird_sub_cat_id_2.ar_info:
عن أبي أمامة الباهلي رضي الله عنه أن النبي  صلى الله عليه وسم قال: "مَن قرأَ آيةَ الكرسيِّ دبُرَ كلِّ صلاةٍ مَكْتوبةٍ، لم يمنَعهُ مِن دخولِ الجنَّةِ، إلَّا الموتُ".
 أخرجه النسائي في ((السنن الكبرى)) (9928)، والطبراني (8/134) (7532) واللفظ له، وابن السني في ((عمل اليوم والليلة)) (124)

 #Abu Umamah al-Bahili (RA) reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “Whoever recites Ayat al-Kursi after each prescribed prayer, nothing will stop him from immediate entery to Jannah except death”. Reported by Imam an-Nasa’ee (in As-Sunan al-Kubra 9928), Tabarani (8/134) (7532), Ibn As-Sani (in the Amal al-Yawm wa al-Laylah 124).

 #عن عبدالله بن خبيب رضي الله عنه أنه قال: "خرجنا في ليلةِ مَطَرٍ وظُلْمَةٍ شديدةٍ نطلبُ رسولَ اللهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم لِيُصليَ لنا، فأدركناه، فقال: أصليتم؟ فلم أقلْ شيئًا، فقال: قلْ. فلم أقلْ شيئًا، ثم قال: قلْ. فلم أقلْ شيئًا، ثم قال: قلْ: فقلتُ: يا رسولَ اللهِ، ما أقولُ؟ قال: قل هو الله أحد والمُعَوِّذَتين حينَ تُمسي وحينَ تُصبحُ ثلاثَ مراتٍ تُكفيك مِن كلِّ شيءٍ".
 حديث صحيح أخرجه أبو داود (5082) .

 #Abdillah bin Khubaib (RA) reported that “We went in a heavily raining and dark night seeking the Prophet (SA) to make prayers for us. When we reached him, he asked ‘Have you made your prayers?’ I did not say anything. The Prophet (SA) insisted ‘Say!’. I did not say anything. The Prophet (SA) repeated ‘Say!’. I asked the Prophet (SA) ‘What should I say?’. The Prophet (SA) responded 'Recite the [Surat of] Qul Huwa Allahu Ahad, and the [following two Surat of] al-Muawwathatain [Qul Aoozu birabbi al-Falaq and Qual Aoozu birabbi an-Naas] 3 times in the morning and in the evening; they will protect you from everything.
 Reported by Abu-Dawood (5082).

#عَنْ أبي هريرة رضي الله عنه أن رَسولِ اللهِ  قال: "مَن سَبَّحَ اللَّهَ في دُبُرِ كُلِّ صَلاةٍ ثَلاثًا وثَلاثِينَ، وحَمِدَ اللَّهَ ثَلاثًا وثَلاثِينَ، وكَبَّرَ اللَّهَ ثَلاثًا وثَلاثِينَ، فَتْلِكَ تِسْعَةٌ وتِسْعُونَ، وقالَ: تَمامَ المِئَةِ: لا إلَهَ إلَّا اللَّهُ وحْدَهُ لا شَرِيكَ له، له المُلْكُ وله الحَمْدُ وهو علَى كُلِّ شيءٍ قَدِيرٌ غُفِرَتْ خَطاياهُ وإنْ كانَتْ مِثْلَ زَبَدِ البَحْرِ".
 أخرجه مسلم (597).

 #Abu Hurayra (RA) reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “Whoever makes Tasbeeh [saying ‘Subhana Allah’] after each prayer 33 times, and makes Hamd of Allah [saying ‘Al-Hamdul Lillah’] 33 times, and makes Takbeer [saying ‘Allahu Akbar’] 33 times, making 99 in total, and on the hundred says  “No god but Allah, alone, no partner with Him; the Ownership is His, Credit belongs to Him; He is the All-Arranging of every thing.” his sins will be forgiven even if they were [as big as] the foam of the sea.
 Reported by Muslim (597).

#عن عبد الله بن عمر رضي الله عنهما انه قال: "بيْنَما نَحْنُ نُصَلِّي مع رَسولِ اللهِ إذْ قالَ رَجُلٌ مِنَ القَوْمِ: اللَّهُ أَكْبَرُ كَبِيرًا، وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلًا، فَقالَ رَسولُ اللهِ: مِنَ القَائِلُ كَلِمَةَ كَذَا وَكَذَا؟ قالَ رَجُلٌ مَنِ القَوْمِ: أَنَا، يا رَسولَ اللهِ، قالَ: عَجِبْتُ لَهَا، فُتِحَتْ لَهَا أَبْوَابُ السَّمَاءِ قالَ ابنُ عُمَرَ: فَما تَرَكْتُهُنَّ مُنْذُ سَمِعْتُ رَسولَ اللهِ يقولُ ذلكَ".
 أخرجه مسلم (601) .

 #Abduallah bin Oumar (RA) reported “While praying with the Prophet (SA), one man said ‘Allah is truly greater; lots of Praise are to Allah; Glorified is Allah morning and evening’. The Prophet (SA) asked ‘who said so and so?. The man answered 'it is me, Messenger of Allah’. The Prophet (SA) commented 'I wondered! The gates of heavens were opened for these words.” Ibn Omr commented “I have never left these words since I heard the Prophet (SA) saying that.
 Reported by Muslim (601).

#ذكر الإمام ابن القيم رحمه الله في كتابه جلاء الأفهام في فضل الصلاة والسلام على محمد خير الأنام، -ذكر مواطن الصلاة على النبي - فقال: فصل: الموطن الخامس والثلاثون من مواطن الصلاة عليه عقيب الصلوات، ذكره الحافظ أبو موسى وغيره ولم يذكروا في ذلك سوى حكاية ذكرها أبو موسى المديني من طريق عبد الغني بن سعيد..) ثم ذكر قصة رؤيا منامية حدثت لأبي بكر بن مجاهد أنه رأى النبي  يقبل الشبلي بين عينيه فلما سئل عن ذلك؟ قال: هذا يقرأ بعد صلاته [لَقَدْ جَاءَكُمْ رَسُولٌ مِنْ أَنْفُسِكُمْ] إلى آخر السورة ويقول ثلاث مرات صلى الله عليك يا محمد.

 #Ibn al-Qayyim (May Allah have mercy on him) quoted a vision in his book (Jala’u al-Afham fi Fadhl as-Salat ala Muhammad Khayri al-Anam) discussing the occasion of making Salawat on the Prophet immediately after prayer. He said that Abu Bakr bin Mujahid saw the Prophet (SA) kissing ash-Shibli between the eyes. When I asked about that, the Prophet (SA) said that on finishing his prayers, he recites the last ayat of Surat at-Tawbah, and that he says 3 times “Salla Allahu Alayka Ya Muhammad” 

 #عن عبد الله بن عمرو أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال (مَن صَلَّى عَلَيَّ صَلاةً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عليه بها عَشْرًا).
 أخرجه مسلم 384

 #Abdullah bin Amre reported the Prophet (SA) as saying “Whoever makes one salawat on me, Allah will make 10 salawat on him“

 Reported by Imam Muslim (384)

 #الصلاة الكمالية منسوبة للإمام أحمد الدردير (1715م) رضي الله عنه، وصيغتها: «اللهمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَالِ اللهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيقُ بِكَمَالِهِ».

 #This formual of Salawat, is commonly known as “As-Salat al-Kamaliyyah, by Imam Ahmad al-Dardir (RA) 1715 G. “O Allah send you Salat and Salam on our Most Honorable  Muhammad and his folk as many as what belongs to Allah and as befits his perfections.” 

 #عن أبي أمامة الباهلي رضي الله عنه قال: " قِيلَ يا رسولَ اللهِ: أيُّ الدعاءِ أسمَعُ قال جَوفَ الليلِ الآخِرِ ودُبُرَ الصلواتِ المكتوباتِ ".
 أخرجه الترمذي (3499)، والنسائي في ((السنن الكبرى)) (9936).

 #Abu Umamah al-Bahili (RA) reported that the Prophet (SA) was asked when supplication [Duaa] more likely to be heard by Allah. The Prophet (SA) responded “at the last thired of the night and immediately after prescribed prayers”.
 Reported by at-Tirmithi (3499), an-Nasa’ee (in As-Sunan al-Kubra 9936).

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah from the Accursed Devil.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A'udhu billahi min ash-shaytani r-rajim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَإِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Your God is One. No god but Him, the Most Gracious and Merciful.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ilahukum ilahun wahidun la ilaha illa huwa ar-Rahman ar-Rahim

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Living and Self-subsisting. Neither drowse nor sleep can seize Him. Unto Him belong whatever is in the heavens and in the earth. No one can intercede except by His permission. He knows what happens to them in this world and in the Hereafter. They will never compass anything of His knowledge except what He wills. His Chair accommodates heavens and earth, and it is not difficult for Him to keep them. He is the Most High and Great.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa al-Hayyul-Qayyum. La ta'khudhuhu sinatun wa la nawm. Lahu ma fi as-samawati wa ma fi al-ard. Man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi-idhnihi. Ya'lamu ma bayna aydeehim wa ma khalfahum. Wala yuhituna bishay'in min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'a. Wasi'a kursiyuhu as-samawati wal-ard. Wala ya'uduhu hifzuhuma wa huwa al-'Aliyyul-Azeem.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ.  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful. “Say He is Allah, the Only. Allah the Absolute Master. He begets not nor is He begotten; none is His like.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul huwa Allahu ahad. Allahu as-Samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ. مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَد
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful “Say I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of created things, and from the evil of the darkness as it overspreads, and from the mischief of the witchcrafts, and from the evil of the envier as he practices envy”.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul a'udhu bi rabbil-falaq. Min sharri ma khalaq. Wa min sharri ghasiqin idha waqab. Wa min sharri an-naffathati fi al-'uqad. Wa min sharri hasidin idha hasad.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ. مَلِكِ النَّاسِ. إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ. مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ. الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ. مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful. Say I seek refuge in the Lord of humankind, the King of humankind, the God of humankind, from the evil of the withdrawing whisperers who whispers in the hearts of humankind; and from the evil of the Jinn and humankind.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul a'udhu bi rabbin-nas. Malikin-nas. Ilahin-nas. Min sharri al-waswasi al-khannas. Alladhi yuwaswisu fi sudurin-nas. Min al-jinnati wa-nnas.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَإِنْ مِنْ شَيْءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ. سُبْحَانَكَ يا عَلِيُّ يا عَظِيمْ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Everything is glorifying Him with praise. Glorified are You, the High and Great.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa in min shay'in illa yusabbihu bihamdi. Subhanaka ya Aliyyu ya Azeem.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ الله
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Glorified is Allah!
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Subhanallah

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّه
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Praise is due to Allah!
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Alhamdulillah

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَر
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater!
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahu Akbar

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَرْ كَبِيْرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater; praise is abundantly due to Allah. Glorified is Allah with praise on day and night.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahu Akbar kabiran wal-hamdu lillahi kathiran, wa subhanallahi wa bihamdihee bukratan wa aseela

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: أفضَلُ الذِّكْرِ وَالْقَولِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The best Dhikr and the best say is “No god but Allah alone; with no associate. To Him belong the Dominion and Praise. He is the All-Arranging.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Afdalu adh-dhikri wal-qawli la ilaha illa Allah wahdahu la sharika lahu. Lahu al-mulku walahu al-hamdu, wahuwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels [continually] extend their blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna Allah wa mala'ikatahoo yusalloona 'ala an-Nabi. Ya ayyuha alladhina amanu, salloo 'alayhi wa sallimoo tasleema

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Honorable Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim wa barik 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi 'adada kama lillahi wama yaliqu bikamalihi

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى أَسْعَدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Most Fortunate Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim wa barik 'ala as'adina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi 'adada kama lillahi wama yaliqu bikamalihi

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى نُوْرِ الْهُدَىْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Ultimate Guide Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim wa barik 'ala noori al-huda Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi 'adada kama lillahi wama yaliqu bikamalihi

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: فاعلم أنه لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Recognize that there is no god but Allah.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa'lam annahu la ilaha illa Allah

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: No God but Allah.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: No God but Allah. Our Honourable Mohammad is the Messenger of Allah.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah Sayyiduna Muhammadun Rasulullah

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: وقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Your Lord proclaimed 'call Me; I will respond to you.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qala rabbukum ud'uni astajib lakum

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اَلَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala sayyidina Muhammadin wa 'ala alihi wa sahbihi wa sallim
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah extend Your Blessing and Peace on our Honorable Muhammad, his folk and Companions

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: أَصْبَحْنَا وَأَصْبَحَ الـمُلْكُ لله وَالْـحَمْدُ لله. لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَاْ شَرِيْكَ لَهْ. لَهُ الـْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الـحَمْدُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْر. اَلَّلهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ خَيْرَ هَذَا اليَوْمِ وَخَيْرَ مَا بَعْدَهُ وَنَعُوْذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ هَذَا اليَوْمِ وَشَرِّ مَا بَعْدَهُ
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Asbahna wa asbaha al-mulku lillahi wal-hamdu lillah. La ilaha illallah wahdahu la sharika lah. Lahu al-mulku walahu al-hamdu wahuwa 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Allahumma inna nas'aluka khayra hadha al-yawmi wakhayra ma ba'dahu wana'udhu bika min sharri hadha al-yawmi wa sharri ma ba'dahu
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: We are up, and all dominion is thankfully up to God; no partner with Him; domain is His; credit belongs to Him. His is in control of everything.O Allah we ask You the goodness of this day and the day after; we seek refuge in You from the evil of this day and the day after.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: أَصْبَحْنَا عَلَى فِطْرَةِ الإِسْلَاْمِ وَكَلِمَةِ الإخْلَاصِ، وعلى دِيْنِ نَبِيِّنـَا مُحمَّدٍ صَلَى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمَ وَمِلَّة أَبِيْنَا إبراهيم حَنِيفَاً وَمَا كَانَ مِنَ الـْمُشْرِكِيْن
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Asbahna 'ala fitrati al-Islami wa kalimati al-ikhlasi, wa 'ala dinin nabiyyina Muhammadin sallallahu 'alayhi wa alihi wa sallam, wa millata abina Ibrahim haneefan wama kana mina al-mushrikeen
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: We woke up on the innate nature of submission to God, and the Testimony Word of “No God but God”, and on the faith of our Prophet Muhammad ﷺ, and the faith of our father Ibrahim, who was truly worshiping God without any partner.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: اَلَّلهُمَّ إِنَّا أَصْبَحْنَا نُشْهِدُكَ وَنُشْهِدُ حَمَلَةَ عَرْشِكَ وَمَلَائِكَتَكَ وَجَمِيْعِ خَلْقِكَ أَنَّكَ أَنْتَ اللهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ وَحْدَكَ لَاْ شَرِيْكَ لَكَ. وَأَنَّ سَيِّدَنَا مُحَمَّدَاً عَبْدُكَ وَرَسُوْلُكَ
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inna asbahna nushhidu ka wa nushhidu hamalata 'arshika wa mala'ikataka wa jami'a khalqika annaka anta Allahu la ilaha illa anta wahdaka la sharika laka. Wa anna sayyidina Muhammadan abduka wa rasuluk
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: O Allah in this morning, we bear witness before You, before the Carriers of Your Throne, Your Angels, and all Your creation that You are Allah; no God but You and that our Honorable Muhammad is Your Slave and Messenger.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ مَا أَصْبَحَ بِنَا مِنْ نِعْمَةٍ أَوْ بِأَحَدٍ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ فَمِنْكَ وَحْدَكَ لَا شَرِيْكَ لَكَ، فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ وَلَكَ الشُّكْر
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma ma asbaha binaa min ni'matin aw bi ahadin min khalqika faminka wahdaka la sharika laka, falaka al-hamdu walaka al-shukr
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O Allah any blessing that we, or any other of creation have, must be from You alone, without any partner. So all praise and credit belongs to You.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: رَضِيْنَا بِالله تَعَالَى رَبَّا، وَبِالإِسْلَامِ دِيْنَاً، وَبِسَيِّدِنا مُحَمَّد صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ نَبِيَّا وَرَسُوْلا
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Radhina billahi ta'ala rabba, wa bil-Islami deenan, wa bi sayyidina Muhammadin sallallahu alayhi wa sallam nabiyyan wa rasula
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: We accept Allah as our Lord, Islam as our faith, and our Honorable Muhammad ﷺ as our Prophet ﷺ and Messenger.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ عَافِنَا فِيْ أَبْدَانِنَا. الَّلهُمَّ عَاْفِنَاْ فِيْ أَسْـمَاْعِنَا. الَّلهُمَّ عَافِنَا فِيْ أَبْصَاْرِنَا. الَّلهُمَّ مَتِّعْنَا بِأَسْمَاْعِنَا وَأَبْصَاْرِنَا وَقُوَّاتِنَا مَا أَحْيَيْتَنَا، وَاجْعَلْهُ الوَارِثَ مِنَّا، وَاجْعَلْ ثَأْرَنَا عَلَى مَنْ ظَلَمَنَا، وانْصُرْنَا عَلَى مَنْ عَادَانَا، وَلَا تَجْعَلْ مُصِيْبَتَنَا فِيْ دِيْنِنَا، وَلَا تَجْعَلِ الدُّنْيَا أَكْبَرَ هَمِّنَا وَلَا مَبْلَغَ عِلْمِنَا، وَلَا تُسَلِّطْ عَلَيْنَا  بِذُنُوبِنَا مَنْ لَا يَخَافُكَ وَلَا يَرْحَمُنَا
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma 'aafina fi abdanina. Allahumma 'aafina fi asma'ina. Allahumma 'aafina fi absarina. Allahumma mat'ina bi asma'ina wa absarina wa quwwatina ma ahyaytana, waj'alahu al-warith minna, waj'al tha'arana 'ala man zhalamana, wa nsurna 'ala man 'adana, wa la taj'al musibatana fi dinina, wa la taj'ali ad-dunya akbara hammina wa la mablagha 'ilmina, wa la tusallit 'alayna bidhunubina man la yakhafuka wa la yarhamuna
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: O Allah save our bodies from harm; O Allah save our hearing from harm; O Allah save our sight from harm. O Allah let us enjoy our hearing, sight, power and strength for lifetime. Let them be our inheritors. Make our revenge on those who did us wrong. Give us victory over our enemies. Do not make our test in our faith. Do not make our ambition for this world, nor make it the level of our knowledge. Do not put us under the power of anyone who does not fear You or have mercy on us because of our sins.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمُّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الـهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْعَجْزِ وَالْكَسَلِ، وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مَنِ الْجُبْنِ وَالْبُخْلِ وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ غَلَبَةِ الدَّينِ وَقَهْرِ الرِّجَالِ
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inna na’udhu bika minal-hammi wal-hazan...
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: O Allah we seek refuge in You from stress and sorrow; from incapacity and laziness; from cowardice and meanness; and from the overburden of debt and defeat of men.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ أَنْ نُشْرِكَ بِكَ شَيْئًا نَعْلَمُهُ، وَنَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا لَا نَعْلَمُهُ
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inna na'udhu bika min al-hammi wal-hazan, wa na'udhu bika min al-'ajzi wal-kasal, wa na'udhu bika min al-jubni wal-bukhl, wa na'udhu bika min ghalabati ad-dayni wa qahri ar-rijal
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: O Allah we seek refuge in You from associating others with You wittingly; and seek forgiveness for doing so unwittingly.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَصَلَّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آله وَصَحْبَهِ وَسَلَّمَ
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sallallahu 'ala sayyidina Muhammadin wa 'ala alihi wa sahbihi wa sallam
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: May the Blessing and Peace be upon our Honorable Muhammad, his Folk and Companions.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِاللهِ السَّمِيعِ العَلِيْمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجيم
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A'udhu billahi as-sami' al-'alim min ash-shaytan ir-rajim.
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah, All-Hearing, All-Knowledgeable from the accursed Devil.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ الله الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيْمِ
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillahir-Rahmanir-Rahim.
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا لِأَنفُسِكُم مِّنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِندَ اللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا ۚ وَاسْتَغْفِرُوا اللَّهَ ۖ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَّحِيمٌ
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ma tuqaddimu li-anfusikum min khayrin tajiduhu 'indallahi huwa khayran wa a'dhama ajran wastaghfirullaha inna allaha ghafurun rahim.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Whatever good you send forth for yourselves, you shall find it with Allah, better and greater in reward. Seek the forgiveness of Allah, for Allah is Oft-Forgiving, Most Merciful.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: أَسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullah.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: I ask for Allah’s forgiveness.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ العَظِيْمَ الَّذِيْ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الـْحَيَّ القَيُّوْمَ وَأَتُوْبُ إِلَيْهْ
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullaha al-'Azim alladhi la ilaha illa huwa al-Hayy al-Qayyum wa atubu ilayh.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: I seek the forgiveness of Allah, the Great; there is no god besides Him; He is the Living, the Self-subsisting; to Him I turn in Repentance.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna Allaha wa mala'ikatahu yusalluna 'ala an-Nabi, ya ayyuhalladhina amanu sallu 'alayhi wa sallimu taslima.
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels send blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Send blessing upon him; and submit to him in full.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدناَ مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُوْلِكَ النَّبيِّ الأُمِّي وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Sayyidina Muhammadin 'abdika wa rasulika an-Nabiyyil-Ummi wa 'ala alihi wa sahbihi wa sallim.
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, extend Blessing and Peace on Your Slave and Messenger, the Unlettered Prophet, Honorable Muhammad, and on his Folks and Companions.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُوْلِكَ النَّبِيِّ الأُمِّيِّ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ تَسْلِيمَاً كَثِيراً بِقَدْرِ عَظَمَةِ ذَاتِكَ فِي كُلِّ وَقْتٍ وَحِينْ
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli ‘ala Sayyidina Muhammadin ‘abduka wa rasuluka an-nabiyyi al-ummiyyi wa ‘ala alihi wa sahbihi wa sallim taslīman kathīran biqadri ‘azamat dhātika fi kulli waqtin wa hīn.
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, extend Your Blessing and Peace on Your Slave and Messenger, the Unlettered Prophet, Honorable Muhammad, and on his Folks and Companions, so much as befits the greatness of Your Essence at every time.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa‘lam annahu la ilaha illa Allah.
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Know that there is no God but Allah.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهْ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allahu wahdahu la sharika lahu. Lahu al-mulku wa lahu al-hamdu, wa huwa ‘ala kulli shay’in qadir.
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: There is no god but Allah alone, with no associate. To Him belongs the Dominion and Praise; He is the All-Arranging.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَّسُوْلُ الله، صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّمْ
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Allah, Sayyiduna Muhammadun Rasulullah, sallallahu ‘alayhi wa alihi wa sahbihi wa sallam.
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: There is no god but Allah; Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; May Allah bless him, his Folks and Companions, and save us from any disobedience.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ. اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul huwa Allahu ahad. Allahu as-samad. Lam yalid wa lam yulad. Wa lam yakun lahu kufuwan ahad.
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful. Say He is Allah, the Only. Allah the Absolute Master. He begets not nor is He begotten; there is none like unto Him.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ، الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيْمِ مَالِكِ يَوْمِ الدِّينِ، إِيَّاكَ نَعْبُدُ وَإِيَّاكَ نَسْتَعِينُ، اهْدِنَا الصِّرَاطَ الْمُسْتَقِيمَ، صِرَاطَ الَّذِينَ أَنْعَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ غَيْرِ الْمَغْضُوبِ عَلَيْهِمْ وَلَا الضَّالِّينَ,آمِيـْنْ
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Alhamdu lillahi rabbil ‘alamin, ar-rahmani ar-rahim, maliki yawmi ad-din, iyyaka na’budu wa iyyaka nasta‘in, ihdina as-sirata al-mustaqim, sirata alladhina an‘amta ‘alayhim ghayri al-maghdubi ‘alayhim wa la ad-dallin, amin.
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful. Praise is due to Allah, Lord of the Worlds. Most Gracious and Merciful. Master of the Day of Judgement. You alone we worship; You alone we seek for help. Guide us to the Straight Path. The Path of those You have bestowed Your Grace, not the Path of those who have earned Your wrath, nor of those who went astray. Amin.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: يا مَنْ هُوَ اللهُ الَّذِيْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya man huwa Allahu alladhi la ilaha illa huwa.
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah, there is no deity but You. You are:

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: الرَّحْمَنُ
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Ar-Rahman.
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: The Gracious

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: الرَّحِيمُ
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Ar-Rahim.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: The Merciful

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: الْمَلِكُ
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Malik.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The King

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: الْقُدُّوسُ
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Quddus.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: The Most Holy

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: السَّلاَمُ
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: As-Salam.
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: The Saviour

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: الْمُؤْمِنُ
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Mu’min.
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: The Securer

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: الْمُهَيْمِنُ
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Muhaymin.
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: The Controller

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: الْعَزِيزُ
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Aziz.
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: All Mighty

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: الْجَبَّارُ
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Jabbar.
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: The Compeller

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: الْمُتَكَبِّر
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Mutakabbir
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: The Aughty

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: الْخَالِقُ
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Khaliq
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The Creator

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: الْبَارِئُ
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Bari'
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: The Inspirer of Souls

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: الْمُصَوِّرُ
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Musawwir
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: The Fashioner

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الْغَفَّارُ
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Ghaffar
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The Oft-Forgiver

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: الْقَهَّارُ
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Qahhar
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: The All-Defeater

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: الْوَهَّابُ
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Wahhab
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: The Oft-Bestower

wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Ar-Razzaq
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: The Provider

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: الْفَتَّاحُ
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Fattah
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The Oft-Opener

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: اَلْعَلِيْمُ
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-'Alim
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: The All-Knowing

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وسَلِّمْ عَلَى مَنْ مِنْهُ انْشَقَّتِ الأسْرَارُ. وَانْفَلَقَتِ الأنْوَارُ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, shower Your Peace and Blessing on the one from whom mysteries came into being, and illuminations emerged.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim 'ala man minhoo inshaqat al-asrar wa infa'qat al-anwar

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَفِيهِ ارْتَقَتِ الْحَقَائِقُ. وَتَنَزَّلَتْ عُلُومُ آدَمَ فَأعْجَزَ الْخَلاَئِقِ. وَلَهُ تَضَاءَلَتِ الْفُهُومُ فَلَمْ يُدْرِكْهُ مِنَّا سَابِقٌ وَلاَ لاَحِقٌ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: In him, realities were recognized; the knowledge of Adam descended upon him, so he went beyond the reach of any human; all understanding fell short of him; no one, in the past or future, can ever attain his reality.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Fihi irtqat al-haqa'iq wa tanzalat 'ulum Adam fa'ajaza al-khala'iq. Walahu tada'alat al-fuhum falam yudrikhu minna sabaqun wala lahigu

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: فَرِيَاضُ الْمَلَكُوتِ بِزَهْرِ جَمَالِهِ مُونِقَةٌ. وَحِيَاضُ الْجَبَرُوتِ بِفَيْضِ أنْوَارِهِ مُتَدَفِّقَة.ٌ وَلاَ شَيْءَ إِلاً وَهُوَ بِهِ مَنُوطٌ. إِذ لَوْلاَ الْوَاسِطَةُ لَذَهَبَ كَمَا قِيلَ الْمَوْسُوطُ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: The gardens of the Spiritual Kingdom [Malakut] bloom with the flowers of his beauty. The Divine Dominion [Jabarut] overflows with his illumination. Nothing, but is related to him; without a medium, no result would be attained.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Faryadu al-malakut bi-zahri jamalihee muniyaqatun. Wa hiadu al-jabarut bi-faydi anwarihi mutadafiqatun. Wala shay'a illa wa huwa bihi manootun. Iza lawla al-wasitatu ladhahaba kama qeela al-mawsut

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: صَلاَةً تَلِيقُ بِكَ مِنْكَ إِلَيْهِ كَمَا هُوَ أهْلُهُ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: So bless him that is appropriate from Your Grandeur to him as befits his stature.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Salatan taliqu bika minka ilayhi kama huwa ahluhu

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ سِرُّكَ الْجَامِعُ الدَّالُ عَلَيْكَ. وَحِجَابُكَ الأعْظَمُ الْقَائِمُ لَكَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ. اللَّهُمَّ ألْحِقْنِي بِنَسَبِهِ. وَحَقِّقْنِي بِحَسَبِهِ. وَعَرِّفْنِي إِيَّاهُ مَعْرِفَةً أسْلَمُ بِهَا مِنْ مَوَارِدِ الْجَهْلِ. وَأكْرَعُ بِهَا مِنْ مَوَارِدِ الْفَضْلِ. وَاحْمِلْنِي عَلَى سَبِيلِهِ إِلَى حَضْرَتِكَ. حَمْلاً مَحْفُوفاً بِنُصْرَتِكَ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, he is Your all-encompassing creation that leads through You to You. He is Your supreme veil dedicated to You, and in Your presence. Oh, Allah, include me in his lineage and count me among his true followers. Oh, Allah let me know him in a way that saves me from the sources of ignorance, and satisfy me with the sources of grace. (Oh Allah) carry me on his path to Your presence; a carriage that is surrounded with Your support.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma innahu sirruka al-jami'u ad-dalu 'alayka. Wa hijabuka al-a'zamu al-qaimu laka bayna yadayka. Allahumma alhiqni binasabihi. Wa haqqiqni bihisabihe. Wa 'arifni iyah ma'rifatan aslamu biha min mawaredi al-jahl. Wa akra'u biha min mawaredi al-fadl. Wa hamilni 'ala sabeelihi ila hadhratik. Hamlan mahfufan binusratika

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَاقْذِفْ بِيَ عَلَى الْبَاطِلِ فَأدْمَغَهُ وَزُجَّ بِي فِي بِحَارِ الأحَدِيَّةِ وَانْشُلْنِي مِنْ أوْحَالِ التِّوْحِيدِ وَأغْرِقْنِي فِي عَيْنِ بَحْرِ الْوَحْدَةِ حَتَّى لاَ أرَى وَلاَ أسْمَعَ وَلاَ أجِدَ وَلاَ أُحِسَّ إِلاً بِهَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Throw me on the falsehood to eliminate it and plunge me into the oceans of Your Onliness. Save me from drowning in the muds of oneness (with my self-consciousness); instead, drown me in the pure ocean of Oneness where I do not see, hear, sense, or feel except through it.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qdhif biya 'ala al-batil fa'admagahu wa zujji bi fi bihari al-ahadiyyah wa anshulni min awhali at-tawheed wa aghriqni fi 'ayni bahr al-wahdah hatta la ara wa la asma' wa la ajid wa la uhsu illa biha

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَاجْعَلِ اللَّهُمَّ الْحِجَابَ الأعْظَمَ حَيَاةَ رُوحِي؛ وَرُوحَهُ سِرَّ حَقِيقَتِي؛ وَحَقِيقَتَهُ جَامِعَ عَوَالِمِي بِتَحْقِيقِ الْحَقِّ الأوَّلِ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Oh Allah make the Greatest Veil [the Prophet] the life of my soul; make his soul the core of my reality; and make his reality the whole of my physical and non-physical worlds; by recognizing the ‘First Truth’.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Waj'ali Allahumma al-hijaba al-a'zama hayata ruhi; wa ruhahu sirra haqiqati; wa haqiqatahu jami'a 'awalimii bi tahqiqi al-haqq al-awwal

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: يَا أوَّلُ يَا آخِرُ يَا ظَاهِرُ يَا بَاطِنُ اسْمَعْ نِدَائِي بِمَا سَمِعْتَ بِهِ نِدَاءَ عَبْدِكَ زَكَرِيَّا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: (Oh Allah) You are, the First, the Last, the Outward, and the Inward. Hear my call the way you heard the call of your slave Zakariyya.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Awwalu ya Akhiru ya Zahiru ya Batinu isma' nida'ee bima sami'ta bihi nida'a 'abdik Zakariyya

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَانْصُرْنِي بِك لَكَ وَأيِّدْنِي بِكَ لَكَ وَاجْمَعْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكَ وَحُلْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ غَيْرِكَ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Let me win, through You and for You. Support me through You and for You; and bring me together with You; and separate me from any other.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Wansurni bika laka wa ayyidni bika laka wa ajmi' bayni wa baynaka wa hul bayni wa bayna ghayrika

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: الله
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allaah.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Allah

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ الَّذِي فَرَضَ عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لَرَادُّكَ إِلَىٰ مَعَادٍ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Indeed, He, Who ordained the Qur’an for you, will return you to the station of your Ultimate Destiny.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna alladhi fardha 'alayka al-Quran laraadduka ila ma'ad

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِن لَّدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: Oh, Lord, bestow on us a mercy from Yourself and facilitate good results for our affairs.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Rabbana atina min ladunka rahmatan wa hayyi' lana min amrina rashadan

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: وَصَلَى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, have Your blessings and peace on our Master Muhammad, his Folks and Companions.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sallallahu 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala alihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Peace and Blessing on our Most Honorable Muhammad, and his Folks and Companions.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ يا عَليُّ يا عَظيمُ يا حَلِيمُ يا عَلِيمُ. أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَعِلْمُكَ حَسْبِي. فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ رَبِّي وَنِعْمَ الحَسْبُ حَسْبي
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh, Allah, Oh Most High, Oh Great, Oh Tolerant, and All-Knowing. You are my Lord; Your Knowledge is my sufficiency. How perfect is my Lord and my sufficiency.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma ya 'Aliyyu ya 'Azim ya Halim ya 'Alim. Anta rabbi wa 'ilmu ka hasbi. Fani'ma ar-rabbu rabbi wa ni'ma al-hasbu hasbi

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: تَنْصُرُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَأنْتَ العَزيزُ الرَّحِيمُ. نَسْألُكَ العِصْمَةَ فِي الحَرَكاتِ والسَّـكَنَـاتِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ والْإِرَادَاتِ وَالْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَ الشُكُوكِ والظُّنونِ والأوْهـَامِ السَّـاتِرَةِ للقُلُوبِ عنْ مُطَالَعَةِ الغُيُوبِ. فَقَدْ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: You give support to whom You choose; You are the Almighty and the Merciful. We ask Your protection throughout our motions and rest, in utterances, desires, and our thoughts from doubts, and suspicion, and the illusions that veil our hearts from the perception of the unseen. Truly have the Believers been really tested, and deeply shaken.(33:11).
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Tansuru man tasha’u wa anta al-'Azizu ar-Rahim. Nas'aluka al-'Ismata fi al-harakat wa as-sakanat wa al-kalimat wa al-'iradat wa al-khatarat mina ash-shukuki wa az-zununi wal-awham as-satira li qulubina 'an mutala'at al-ghuyub. Faqad ibtuliya al-mu'minun wa zulzilu zulzalan shadidan

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ إِلَّا غُرُورًا.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The Hypocrites, and the sick-hearted, would say 'Allah and His Messenger did not promise us other than delusion (33:12).
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa idh yaqulu al-munafiquna wal-ladhina fi qulubihim maradun ma wa'adana Allahu wa rasuluhu illa ghururan

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَثَبِّتْنَا وانْصُرْنَا وسَخِّرْ لَنَا هَذَا البَحْرَ كَمَا سخَّرْتَ البَحْرَ لمُوْسَى. وسَخَّرْتَ النَارَ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ. وسَخَّرْتَ الجِبَالَ والحَدِيْدَ لِدَاوُدَ. وَسَخَّرْتَ الرِّيحَ والشَّيَاطِينَ والجِنَّ لِسُلَيْمَانَ. وَسَخِّرْ لَنَا كُلَّ بَحْرٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي الأرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ. وَبَـحْرَ الدُّنْياَ وَبـَحْرَ الآخِرةِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: So, hold us on track, support us; and employ for us this ocean the way You employed the ocean for Musa; the fire for Ibrahim; the mountains and iron for Dawūd; and the wind, the demons and jinn for Solomon. Employ for us every ocean (means and trigger) that belongs to You, on the earth, or heavens, in the Seen or the Unseen worlds, as well as the ocean of this life and the ocean of the Afterlife.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Fathabbitna wa ansurna wa sakhkhir lana hadha al-bahra kama sakhkharta al-bahra li Musa. Wa sakhkharta an-nara li Ibrahim. Wa sakhkharta al-jibala wal-hadida li Dawud. Wa sakhkharta ar-riha wa ash-shayatin wal-jinna li Sulayman. Wa sakhkhir lana kulla bahrin huwa laka fi al-ard wa as-sama'i wa al-mulk wa al-malakut. Wa bahr al-dunya wa bahr al-akhira

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَسَخِّرْ لَنا كُلَّ شَيءٍ يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيءٍ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Employ for us everything; oh You in whose hand is the true control of everything.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sakhkhir lana kulla shay'in ya man biyadihi malakutu kulla shay'in

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: كَهَيَعَصَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: KAF-HA-YA-AIN-SAD.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ain-Sad

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اُنْصُرْنا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ النَّاصِرِيْن. * وافْتَحْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الفَاتِحِيْن * واغْفِرْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الغَافِرْين * وارْحَمْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْن * وارْزُقْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِيْن * واهْدِنَا وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ القَوْمِ الظَّالمِيْن * وَهَبْ لَنَا رِيْحَاً طَيِّبَةً كَمَا هِيَ في عِلْمِكَ. وانْشُرْهَا عَلَيْنَا مِنْ خَزائِنِ رَحْمَتِكَ. واحْمِلْناَ بِهَا حَمْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ مَعَ السَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيَةِ فِي الدِّيْنِ والدُّنْيَا والآخِرَةِ. إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لَنَا أُمُوْرَنَا مَعَ الرَّاحَةِ لِقُلُوبِنَا وأبْدَانِنَا. والسَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيةِ فِي دِيْنِنَا ودُنْيَانَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Support us; You are the best of supporters. Open the doors of opportunities to us; You are the best of Openers. Forgive us; You are the best of Forgivers. Have mercy on us; You are the Most Merciful. Give us sustenance; You are the best Sustainer. Guide us and save us from the wrongdoers. Grant us a goodly wind as may be in Your knowledge; and release it upon us from the storehouses of Your Mercy; carry us with this wind honourably with safety, protection and wellbeing in our religion in this world and the world to come. Truly You the All-Arranging. Allah, facilitate our affairs for us with ease for our hearts and bodies and security and wellbeing in our worldly life and religion.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Unsuruna fa innaka khayru an-nasirin. Waftah lana fa innaka khayru al-fatin. Waghfir lana fa innaka khayru al-ghafirin. Warhamna fa innaka khayru ar-rahimin. Warzuqna fa innaka khayru ar-razikin. Wahdina wa najjina min al-qawmi az-zalimin. Wahib lana rihan tayyibatan kama hiya fi ilmika. Unshurha alayna min khaza'in rahmatika. Wahmilna biha hamla al-karamati ma'a as-salamati wal-'afiyati fi ad-dini wa ad-dunya wal-akhirah. Innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Allahumma yassir lana umurana ma'a ar-rahati li qulubina wa abdanina. Was-salamati wal-'afiyati fi dinina wa dunyaana

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَنَا صَاحِبَاً فِي سَفَرِنَا.  وَخَلِيْفَةً فِي أَهْلِنَا. وَاطْمِسْ عَلَى وُجُوهِ أَعْدَائِنَا وامْسَخْهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهمْ فَلاَ يَسْتَطِيْعُونَ المُضِيَّ وَلاَ المَجِيءَ إلَيْنا
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Be our companion in our journeys, and keep watch over our families that we leave behind. Blind the faces of our enemies and paralyze them in places where they stand so they can neither move nor reach us.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa kun lana sahibatan fi safarina. Wa khalifatan fi ahlina. Watmas 'ala wujuh 'a'dainna wa msakhum 'ala makanitihim fala yasta'ti'una al-mudhiya wa la al-maji'a ilayna

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَى أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّى يُبْصِرُونَ.  وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ. يَس. وَالْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ. إِنَّكَ لَمِنْ الْمُرْسَلِينَ. عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ. تَنْزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ. لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَا أُنْذِرَ آبَاؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَافِلُونَ. لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ. إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُقْمَحُونَ. وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيْهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ.
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: If We wished, we could have blind their eyes so they miss the path; how could they see. If We wished, We could have paralyzed them in place, so they could not move forward or return back”; “Yasin, by the Wise Quran, you are one of the Messengers on the straight path. The revelation by the Almighty and Merciful is to warn a people whose ancestors were not warned; as a result, they were ignorant. Most of them were doomed; they do not believe. We have put yokes around their necks up to the chins. Therefore, their heads are forced up and they cannot see the way. We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and We have covered their eyes so they cannot see
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa law nasha'u latamassna 'ala a'yunihim fastabiqu al-sirata fa'an-naa yubsirun. Wa law nasha'u lamasakhnahum 'ala makanatihim fama istata'u mudi'an wala yarji'un. Yas. Wal-Qur'an al-Hakim. Innaka lamin al-mursalin. 'Ala siratin mustaqim. Tanzil al-Aziz al-Rahim. Litunzir qawman ma unzira aba'uhum fahum ghafilun. Laqad haqq al-qawlu 'ala aktharihim fahum la yu'minun. Inna ja'alna fi a'nakihim aghlal-an fahiya ila al-adhqan fahum muqmahun. Waja'alna min bayni aydeehim saddan wa min khalfihim saddan fa'ghashaynahum fahum la yubsirun.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: شَاهَتِ الْوُجُوهْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: May the faces be humbled.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Shāhatil wujūh

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsisting; those who carried wrong will be losers.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa 'anatil wujūhu lil-ḥayyil qayyūm, wa qad khāba man ḥamala ẓulman

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: طس. حم عسق. مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ. بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَا يَبْغِيَانِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: TASIN, ḤAMIM, AIN-SIN QAF. The two seas have met; there is a barrier between them so they do not mix.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Ṭā-Sīn. Ḥāmīm, 'Ayn-Sīn-Qāf. Maraja al-baḥrayni yaltaqiyān, baynahumā barzakhan lā yabghiyān

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: حَم
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: ḤA-MIM.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥāmīm

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: حُمَّ الأَمْرُ وَجَاءَ النَّصْرُ فَعَلَيْنَا لا يُنْصَرُوْن
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The issue is heated. Victory is hoped for, and no one can defeat us.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Hummal amru wa jā'a an-naṣru fa 'alaynā lā yunsarūn

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: حم.  تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ. غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ الْعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوْلِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Ḥa-mim. The Book was descended from Allah, the All-Powerful, The All-Knowing. Forgiver of sins, Accepter of repentance, strict in punishment, infinite in bounty. There is no god but Him; to Him is the final destination.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥāmīm. Tanzīlu al-kitābi min Allāhi al-‘Azīzi al-‘Alīm. Ghāfirī az-zanbi wa qābilī at-tawbī, shadīdi al-‘iqābi dhī at-ṭawli, lā ilāha illā huwa ilayhi al-maṣīr

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ بابُنَا. تَبَارَكَ حِيطَانُنَا. يس سَقْفُنا. كَهَيَعَصَ كِفايَتُنَا. حَم عَسِقَ حِمَـايَتُنَـا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Bismillah is our door; Surat Tabarak is our walls; Surat Yasin is our roof; Surat Kaf-Ha-Ya-ain-Ṣad is our sufficiency; Surat Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf is our protection.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi bābunā. Tabārakā ḥīṭānunā. Yāsīn saqfunā. Kā-Hā-Yā-‘Ayn-Ṣād kifāyatunā. Ḥāmīm-‘Ayn-Sīn-Qāf ḥimāyatunā

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Allah will suffice you against them; He is the Most Hearing and Knowledgeable.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Fasayakfīkahumu Allāhu wa huwa as-Samī‘u al-‘Alīm

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: سِتْرُ العَرْشِ مَسْبُولٌ عَلَيْنَا. وَعَيْنُ اللهِ نَاظِرَةٌ إِلَيْنَا.  بِحَوْلِ اللهِ لاَ يُقْدَرُ عَلَيْنَا. وَاللَّهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِمْ مُحِيْطٌ. بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ.  فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The veil of the Throne is lowered upon us. The eye of Allah is looking at us. By the power of Allah, they will not be able to defeat us. Allah is All-Embracing beyond their reach. Nay, it is a glorious Quran in a preserved tablet.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Sitrul ‘Arshi masbūlun ‘alaynā. Wa ‘Aynullāhi nāẓiratun ilaynā. Biḥawli Allāhi lā yuqdar ‘alaynā. Wa Allāhu min warā’ihim muḥīṭ. Bal huwa Qur’ānum majīd. Fī lawḥin maḥfūẓ

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: فَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Allah is the best protector. He is the Most Merciful of the Merciful.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa-Allāhu khayrun ḥāfiẓan wa huwa ar-ḥamu ar-rahimīn

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِينَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: My Guardian is Allah Who descends the Book; He cares for the Righteous.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna walīyyī Allāhu alladhī nazzala al-kitāba wahuwa yatawallā aṣ-ṣāliḥīn

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: حَسْبِي اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Allah is my sufficiency; there is no god but Him. On Him I rely; He is the Lord of the Great Throne.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥasbī Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa ‘alayhi tawakkaltu wahuwa rabbul-‘arshi al-‘aẓīm

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيءٌ في الأَرْضِ وَلَا في السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ العَليْم
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing may harm in earth or in heaven; He is the Most Hearing and All Knowing.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi alladhī lā yaḍurru ma‘a ismihi shay’un fī al-arḍi walā fī as-samā’i wahuwa as-Samī‘u al-‘Alīm

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ الله التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu bikalimāti Allāhi at-tāmmāti min sharri mā khalaq

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِالله العَلِيِّ العَظِيْم
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: No power, or strength, except by Allah, the Most High and Great.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Walā ḥawla walā quwwata illā bi-Allāhi al-‘Alīyi al-‘Azīm

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: وَصَلّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّم
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: Allah bless Honourable Muhammad, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: Waṣallā Allāhu ‘alā sayyidinā Muḥammadin wa ‘alā ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallam

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِين * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: Glorified is your Lord; the Lord of Honour above what they describe. Peace be on the Prophets. All Praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all universe.
wird_id_27.ar_wird_transliteration: Subḥāna rabbika rabbil-‘izzati ‘ammā yaṣifūn * Wasalāmun ‘alā al-mursalīn * Wal-ḥamdu li-Allāhi rabbil-‘ālamīn

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! Shower Your Blessings and Peace on our Most Honorable Prophet
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهـُمَّ بـِسَطـْوَةِ جَبـَرُوتِ قـَهـْرِكَ، وبـِسُرْعـَةِ إغـَاثـَةِ نـَصـْرِكَ، وَبـِغَـيرَتـِكَ لانـْـتـِهـَاكِ حُرُمَـاتِكَ، وَبـِحـِمَايَتِكَ لِـمَنِ احـْـتـَمـَى بـِآياتِكَ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! I ask you by the authority of Your Absolute power; by the speedy help of Your support; by the immediate protective response over the violation of what You have prohibited; and by Your inviolable protection for whomever seeks the protection in Your Signs.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma bi-satwatihi jabarooti qahri-ka, wa-bi-sur'ati ighaathati nasri-ka, wa-bi-ghayratika lan'tihaaki hurumaatika, wa-bi-himayatik liman-ihtama bi-ayaatika

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: نسْأَلـُكَ يَا اللهُ، يَا سَميعُ، يَا قـَرِيبُ، يَا مُجـِيبُ، يَا سَرِيعُ، يَا مُنـْتـَـقِمُ، يَا شـَدِيدَ البَـطـْشِ، يَا جَبَّارُ،  يَا قـَهـَّارُ،  يَا مَنْ لاَ يُعْـجـِزُهُ قـَهـْرُ الجَبـَابـِرَةِ، وَلاَ يَعْظـُمُ عـَلـَيْهِ هَلاَكُ المُتـَمَرِّدَةِ مِنَ المُلُوكِ واْلأَكـَاسِرَةِ، أَنْ تـَجْـعَلَ كـَيـْدَ مَنْ كـَادَناَ فِي نـَحْرِهِ، وَمَكـْرَ مَنْ مَكـَرَ بِنَا عَـائِداً عَلَيهِ، وَحُـفـْرَةَ مَنْ حَفـَرَ لَنَا وَاقِعاً فِيْهَا. وَمَنْ نـَصَبَ لَنَا شـَبـَكـَةَ الخِدَاعِ اجْعَلـْهُ يَا سَيِّدِي مُسَاقاً إِلَيْهَا وَمُصَـادًا فِيْهَا وَأسِيْراً لـَدَيْهـَا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: I implore You! Oh Allah! O All-Hearing! O the Near One! O the Responder! O the Swift One in Action! O Avenger! O Mighty Assaulter! O Subjugator! O Compeller! O You Who is not weakened by the power of tyrants! O You for whom the destruction of tyrants is no significant challenge! We ask You to make the trap of he who plots against us to be entrapped by it, and the plot of he who plots against us to fall prey to his own snare! I beg You to cause he who digs a hole for us to fall into it, and he who sets up a net of deception for us to be driven into it, trapped and imprisoned by it!
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Nas'aluka ya Allahu, ya Samee'u, ya Qareebu, ya Mujeebu, ya Saree'u, ya Muntaqimu, ya Shadeedu al-Batshi, ya Jabaaru, ya Qahhaaru, ya man laa yu'jizuhu qahru al-jabaabirati, wa laa ya'zumu 'alayhi halaaku al-mutamarridati mina al-mulooki wal-akaseerati, an taj'ala kayda man kaadana fee nahrihi, wa makra man makar bina 'aa'idan 'alayhi, wa hufrata man hafara lana waqi'an feeha. Wa man nasaba lana shabakata al-kidaai aj'ilhu ya sayyidee musaakan ilayhaa wa musaad-an feehaa wa aseeraan ladayhaa

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ بـِحَقِّ كَهَيَعَصَ، اِكـْـفِـنـَا هَمَّ العِدَا، وَلـَقـِّهـِمُ الرَّدَى، وَاجْعـَلهُمْ لِكـُلِّ حَبِيْبٍ فِداً، وَسَلـِّطْ عَلـَيـْهـِمْ عَاجـِلَ النـِّقـْمـَةِ فيِ الْيَوْمِ وَالْغـَدَا. اَللَّهُمَّ بَدِّدْ شـَمْلـَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـَرِّق جَمْـعَـهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أَقـْلِلْ عَدَدَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـُلَّ حَدَّهُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ الدَّائِرَة عَلـَيـْهـِمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أوْصِلْ العَذَابَ إِلَيهـِمْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the right of “KAF-HA-YA-AIN-ṢAD” relieve us from the fear of our enemies! Destroy them; make them a ransom for our beloved ones; and overpower them with a swift defeat, now and then. O God break their unity! O God disperse their assembly! O God lessen their numbers! O God blunt their edge! O God turn fate against them. O God unleash torment upon them. O God make them shackled by their own ring of fetters! O God make retribution to be upon them.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma bihqqi Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ain-Saad ikfina hamma al-‘idaa, wa laqqihim ar-radaa, wa aj'ilhum likulli habeebin fiddaa, wa sallit 'alayhim 'aajila an-niqmah fee al-yawmi wal-ghadaa. Allahumma baddid shamlahum. Allahumma farriq jama'ahum. Allahumma aqillil 'adaduhum. Allahumma fullil haddahum. Allahumma aj'il da'irah 'alayhim. Allahumma awsilil 'adhab ilayhim

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ أخـْرِجْـهـُمْ عَنْ دَائِرَةِ الحِلـْمِ، وَاسْـلـُبـْهـُمْ مَدَدَ الإمْـهـَالِ، وغـُلَّ أيْديَهـُمْ وَأَرْجُلَهُم، وأشْدُدْ عَلـَى قـُلوبـِهـِمْ ولا تـُبـَلـِّغـْهـُمُ الآمَالْ. اللَّهُمَّ مَزِّقـْهـُمْ كـُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍ مَزَّقـْـتـَهُ لِأَعْدَائِكَ انـْـتِصـَاراً لِأَنـْبـِياَئِكَ وَرُسُـلِكَ وَأوْلِياَئِـكَ.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O God exclude them from the shade of leniency! Deprive them of the support of sufficient time! Fetter their hands and feet, tie up their hearts and do not enable them to reach their goals.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma akhrijhum 'an da'irat al-hilm, wa aslubbihim madad al-imhaali, wa ghull aydeehim wa arjuluhum, wa ashdud 'ala quloobihim wa la tuballighum al-aamaal. Allahumma maziqqhum kulla mumazzaqin mazzaqtahu li-a'daa'ika intisaran li-anbiya'ika wa rusulika wa awliyaa'ika

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ انـْـتـَصِرْ لَناَ انـْـتـِصَارَكَ لأحْبـَابـِكَ عَلَى أعْدَائِكَ. اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تـُمَكـِّنِ الأعْدَاءَ فِينَا، وَلاَ تـُسـَلـِطـَهـُمْ عَـلـَيْـنـَا بـِذُنُوبـِنـَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: O God tear them apart in the way You make Your enemies perish in order to grant victory to Your Prophets, and dearest servants! O God grant us the victory of Your beloved ones over Your enemies! O God do not allow the enemy to overpower us and do not give them authority over us due to our sins.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma intasir lana intisaara-ka li-ahbaabika 'ala a'daa'ika. Allahumma laa tumakkinil a'daa'a feena, wa laa tusallitihim 'alayna bidhunoobina

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: حَمِ~
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Ḥa-Meem.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Ha-Meem

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: حُـمَّ الأمْرُ وَجَاءَ النـَّصـْرُ فـَعـَليْنـَا لاَ يـُنـْصـَرُونَ، حَمِ عسق حِمَايَتـُنـَا مِمَّا نـَخـَافُ، اَللَّهُمَّ قـِنـَا شـَرَّ الأسْوَاءِ وَلاَ تـَجْعـَلْنـَا مَحـَلاًّ لِلْبـَلـْوَاء، اَللَّهُمَّ أعْطِنـَا أمَلَ الرَّجَاءِ وَفـَوْقَ الأمَلِ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Matters have become intense; victory has arrived; they will not overpower us! Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf! Grant us protection from what we fear!  O Allah shield us from the evil of iniquities and make us not the site of tribulation. O Allah, grant us what we hope for and beyond what we hope for.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Hummal amru wa jaaa al-nasru fa'alaynaa laa yunsaroon, Ha-Meem 'Ain-Sin-Qaf! Himayatuna mimma nakhaafu, Allahumma qinaa sharra al-aswaa'i wa laa tajilna mahalan lil-balwaa, Allahumma a'tina amala ar-rajaa wa fawqa al-amal

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: يَا هُو
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: YA-HU.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Hu

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: يَا مَنْ بـِفـَضْـلِهِ لِفـَضْلِهِ نـَسْألـُكَ العَجـَلَ العَجـَلَ، إِلَهِيِ الْإِجَابَةَ الإِجَابَة. يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ نـُوحاً فيِ قـَوْمِهِ، يَا مَنْ نـَصَرَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلى أعْدَائِهِ، يَا مَنْ رَدَّ يُوسُفَ عَلَى يَعْـقُوبْ، يَا مَنْ كـَشـَفَ ضـُرَّ أيُّوبَ، يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ دَعْوَةَ زكـَرِيَّا، يَا مَنْ قـَبـِلَ تـَسـْبيحَ يُونـُسَ بْنِ مَتـَّى
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Oh, the One through Whose favours we ask for His favours! We ask You for haste; haste! O Allah, respond to us! O the One Who responded to Nuh against his people; O the One Who gave victory to Ibrahim over his enemies! O the One Who returned Yusuf to Yaqub! O the One Who removed the tribulation of Ayyub! O the One Who answered the call of Zakariyya! O the One Who answered the prayers of Yūnus son of Matta.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya man bifadlihi lifadlihi nas'aluka al-'ajala al-'ajala, Ilahi al-ijabataa al-ijabataa. Ya man ajaba Noohan fi qawmihi, ya man nasara Ibrahim 'ala a'daa'ihi, ya man radd Yousufa 'ala Ya'qub, ya man kashafa durr Ayyub, ya man ajaba da'wat Zakariyya, ya man qabila tasbeeh Yunus ibn Matta

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: نـَسْـألـُكَ بـِأَسْرَارِ هَذِهِ الدَّعَوَاتِ أنْ تـَقـْبـَلَ مَا بـِهِ دَعَوْنـَاكَ، وأنْ تـُعْطِيَنـَا مَا سَألنَاكَ. أنـْجـِزْ لَنـَا وَعْدَكَ الَّذِي وَعَدْتـَهُ لِعِـبَادِكَ المُؤْمِنِين
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: We implore You, O God, through the secrets of these invocations to accept what we call upon You for; to grant us what we ask for; and to manifest for us the promise which You have promised the believers.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Nas'alu-ka bi-asrari hadhihi ad-du'aati an taqbal ma bihi da'awnaaka, wa an tu'tiyna ma sa'alnaaka. Anjiz lana wa'daka alladhi wa'dtahu li'ibadika al-mu'mineen

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أنـْتَ سُبْحَانـَكَ إِنِّي كـُنـْتُ مِنَ الظـَّالِمِينَ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: There is no god but You, The Glorified! I have been among the wrongdoers.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa anta, subhanaka inni kuntu mina adh-dhalimeen

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: انـْـقـَطـَعـَتْ آمَالـُنـَا وَعِزَّتِكَ إِلاَّ مِنـْكَ. وَخـَابَ رَجَاؤُنـَا وَحَـقِـكَ إِلاَّ فِيكَ. إنْ أبْطـَأتْ غـَارَةُ الأرْحَامِ وابْـتـَعـَدَتْ، فـَأقـْرَبُ الشَّيءِ مِنـَّا غـَارَةُ اللهِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: By Your majesty, all our hopes have been lost except for our hope in You! By Your due right, all of our expectations have diminished except for our expectations from You! When the support of our kin slows down and stops, the closest thing to us is the immediate protective support of Allah.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Inqata'at amaluna wa 'izzati-ka illa minka. Wakhaba rajaa'una wa haqq-uka illa fikka. In abta'at ghirat al-arhami wa abta'adat, fa-aqrabu ash-shay'i minna ghirat Allah

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ جـِدِّي السـَّيـْرَ مُسْرِعَةً فِي حَلِّ عُـقـْدَتـِنـَا يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, come hastily to unravel our knots.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Gharata Allah, jiddi as-saira musri'atan fi halli 'uqdatina, ya Gharata Allah

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: عَدَتِ الْعَادُونَ وَجَارُوا، وَرَجَوْنـَا اللهَ مُجِـيرًا، وَكـَفـَى باِللهِ وَلـِيـًّا وَكـَفـَى باللهِ نـَصِيرًا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, the enemy has antagonized and violated; and we have turned to Allah seeking refuge! Allah is the Most Sufficient Guardian. Allah is the Most Sufficient Victor.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Adat al-'aduna wa jaaroo, wa rajawna Allah mujiran, wa kifa Billahi waliyyan wa kifa Billahi nasiran

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: وحَسْبـُنـَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الوَكِيلُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: God is sufficient for us; He is the Best Guardian
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa hasbuna Allahu wa ni'ma al-wakeel

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قـُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَليِّ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: There is no power or strength except through Allah the Most Exalted and Great.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa Billahi al-‘Aliyyi al-‘Azheem

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: سَلاَمٌ عَلَى نُوحٍ في الْعَالمَين، اِسْـتـَجـِبْ لـَنـَا آمِينْ، فـَقـُطِعَ دَابـِرُ القـَوْمِ الَّذِينَ ظـَلـَمُوا والْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ العَالـَمِين
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: (Oh Allah) Answer our prayers!  Amin! The plans of the oppressors have failed. All gratitude are to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Salaamun 'ala Noohin fi al-‘aalameen, istajib lana Ameen, faquti'a daabiru al-qawmilladhina zhalamoo wal-hamdu lillaahi rabbi al-‘aalameen

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: وَصَـلـَّى اللهُ عَـلـَى سَيـِّدِنـَا مُحَمَّدٍ النـَّبـِيّ الأمِيِّ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبـِهِ وَسَـلـَّمَ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: May Allah bless our Honourable Muhammad, the unlettered prophet, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sallallahu 'ala Sayyidina Muhammadin an-Nabi al-Ummi wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallam

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ الْعَظِيمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the Almighty Allah, from the accursed Devil.In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A'oozu billahi al-'azheemi mina ash-shaytani ar-rajeem, Bismillah ir-Rahman ir-Raheem

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَإِذَا جَاءَكَ الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِآيَاتِنَا فَقُلْ سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكُمْ كَتَبَ رَبُّكُمْ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ الرَّحْمَةَ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَمِلَ مِنْكُمْ سُوءًا بِجَهَالَةٍ ثُمَّ تَابَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَأَصْلَحَ فَأَنَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: And when those who believe in our signs come to you, say: Peace be upon you; your Lord has prescribed mercy for Himself: whoever of you does wickedness in ignorance, then afterwards repents and makes amends, He is All –forgiving, All Merciful.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa iza ja'aka alladhina yu'minoona bi ayatina faqul salaamun 'alaykum, kataba rabbukum 'ala nafsihi ar-rahmah annahu man 'amila minkum su'an bijahalah thumma taaba min ba'dihi wa aslaha fa'innahu ghafurun raheem

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ أَنَّى يَكُونُ لَهُ وَلَدٌ وَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُ صَاحِبَةٌ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ * ذَلِكُمُ اللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ فَاعْبُدُوهُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَكِيلٌ * لَا تُدْرِكُهُ الْأَبْصَارُ وَهُوَ يُدْرِكُ الْأَبْصَارَ وَهُوَ اللَّطِيفُ الْخَبِيرُ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Originator of the heavens and the earth” How should He have a son, but has no consort, but He has created everything and knows all things. That is Allah your Lord: there is No God but Him, Creator of everything, so worship Him, for everything is in His care. “Eyes see Him not but He sees eyes, and he is the All Subtle, The All- Aware.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Badee'u as-samawati wal-ard, anna yakoonu lahu waladun walam takun lahu saahibah, wakhalaqa kulla shay'in wa huwa bikulli shay'in 'aleem. Thalikumullahu rabbukum la ilaha illa huwa, khaliqu kulla shay'in fa'budoohoo wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in wakeel. La tudrikuhu al-absar wa huwa yudrikul-absar wa huwa al-lateefu al-khabeer

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: *آلر * كَهَيَعَصَ* حم عسق
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Alif-Lam-Ra; Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ayn-Sad; Hamim-Ayn-Sin-Qaf.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Alif-Lam-Ra; Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ayn-Sad; Hamim-Ayn-Sin-Qaf

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: رَبِّ احْكُمْ ‎بِالْحَقِّ وَرَبُّنَا الرَّحْمَنُ الْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَى مَا تَصِفُونَ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: My Lord Judges in truth; and our Lord is All Merciful, the Helper against what you Ascribe.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Rabbi hukm bi-l-haqqi wa rabbuna ar-Rahmanu al-musta'anu 'ala ma tasifoon

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: طه مَا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَى * إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِمَنْ يَخْشَى * تَنزِيلًا مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَا * الرَّحْمَنُ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ اسْتَوَى * لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَى * وَإِنْ تَجْهَرْ بِالْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Ta-Ha. We have not sent down the Quran upon you so that you be unfortunate, but rather as a reminder to those who fear. A sending down from Him Who created the earth and the high heavens. The All Merciful is exalted over the Throne. To Him belongs What is in the heavens and earth, and what is between and under the ground. And if you speak aloud He knows the hidden and more secret.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Ta-Ha. Ma anzalna 'alayka al-Qur'ana litashqa. Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha. Tanzilan mimman khalaqa al-arda wa as-samawati al-'ula. Ar-Rahmanu 'ala al-'arshi istawa. Lahu ma fi as-samawati wa ma fi al-ardi wa ma baynahuma wa ma taht as-saraa. Wa in tajhar bil-qawli fa'innahu ya'lamu as-sirra wa akhfa

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Allah, There is no God but He, to Him belongs the Grand names.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa, lahu al-asmaa' al-husna

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَعلَمُ أَنِّي باِلجَهَالَةِ مَعْرُوفٌ * وَأَنْتَ بِالعِلْمِ مَوْصُوفٌ * وَقَدْ وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ جَهَالَتي بِعِلْمِكَ * فَسَعْ ذَلِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ كَمَا وَسِعْتَهُ بِعِلْمِكَ وَاغْفِرْ لِي *إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: O Allah! You know well that I am known for ignorance, while knowledge is your attribute. You encompass everything of my ignorance with Your knowledge, so encompass it with your mercy as You have with your knowledge and forgive me: Truly You have power over all things.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma innaka ta'lamu anni bil-jahalah ma'roofun wa anta bil-'ilmi mawsufun wa qad wasi'ta kulla shay'in min jahalahati bi'ilmika, fa-sa' dhālika bi-rahmatika kama wasi'tahu bi'ilmika waghfir li, innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: يا اَللهُ يَا مَالِكُ يَا وَهَّابُ هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ نَعْمَائِكَ مَا عَلِمْتَ لَنَا فِيهِ رِضَاكَ وَاكْسُنَا كِسْوَةً تَقِينَا بِها مِنَ الفِتَنِ فِي جَمِيعِ عَطاياَكَ * وَقَدِّسْنَا بِهَا عَنْ كُلِّ وَصْفٍ يُوجِبُ نَقْصاً مِمَّا اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ في عِلْمِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: O Allah, O Master, and O Bounteous: Bestow on us of your gifts that which You know carries Your pleasure. Clothe us in garment with which You protect us from tribulations in all of your gifts; and cleanse us of every attribute that brings about shortcomings known to Your knowledge that You vouchsafe to no-one else.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Allahu ya Maaliku ya Wahhaabu hab lana min na'amayika ma 'alimta lana feehi ridhak wa kawnasa kiswatan tuqeena biha min al-fitani fee jamee'i 'ataayaka, wa quddisna biha 'an kulli wasfin yoojeebu naqsa mimma ista'tharta bihi fee 'ilmika 'amman siwaaka

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: يَا اَللهُ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَلِيُّ يَا كَبِيرُ * نَسْأَلُكَ الفَقْرَ مِمَّا سِوَاكَ * وَالْغِنَى بِكَ حَتَى لاَ نَشْهَدَ إِلاَّ إِيَّاكَ * وَالْطُفْ بِنَا فِيهِمَا لُطْفاً عَلِمْتَهُ يَصلُحُ لِمَنْ وَالاَكَ * وَاكْسُنَا جَلاَبِيْبَ الْعِصْمَةِ فِي الأنْفَاسِ واللَّحَظَاتِ * وَاجْعَلْنا عَبِيْداً لَكَ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحَالاَتِ * وَعَلِّمْنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ عِلْماً نَصِيرُ بِهِ كَامِلَينَ فِي الْمَحْيَا وَاْلمَمَاتِ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: O Allah, O Great, O High, O Immense, We ask You for poverty from everything but You, and richness through You until we see nothing besides; and show us in both a kindness You know befits those who love You. And clothe us in cloaks of protection in all breaths and moments; and make us slaves to You in all conditions; and teach us knowledge from You through which we reach perfection in life and after death.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Allahu ya 'azeemu ya 'alee ya kabeer, nas'aluka al-faqra mimma siwaaka, wal-ghinaaa bika hatta la nashhada illa 'iayaka, waltufu binaa feehimaa lutfan 'alimtahu yasluhoo liman walayaka, wakisooona jalabeeba al-'ismah fi al-anfasi wal-lahadhati, waja'ilna abidan laka fi jamee'i al-halaati, wa'allimna min ladunka 'ilman naseeru bihi kaamilayna fi al-mahyaa wal-mamaat

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْحَمِيْدُ * الرَّبُّ المَجِيْدُ الفَعَّالُ لِماَ تُرِيدُ * تَعْلَمُ فَرَحَنَا بِمَاذَا وَلِمَاذَا وَعَلَى مَاذَا وَتَعْلَمُ حُزْنَنَا كَذلِكَ * وَقَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ كَوْنَ مَا أَرَدْتَهُ فِيْنَا ومِنَّا وَلاَ نَسْأَلُكَ دَفْعَ مَا تُرِيدُ * وَلَكِنْ نَسْأَلُكَ التَّأيِيدَ بِرُوحٍ مِنْ عِندِكَ فِيمَا تُريدُ * كَمَا أيَّدْتَ أنْبِيَاءَكَ وَرُسُلَكَ وَخَاصَّةَ الصِّدِّيقِينَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ * إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
