wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ.  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful. “Say He is Allah, the Only. Allah the Absolute Master. He begets not nor is He begotten; none is His like.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ. مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَد
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful “Say I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of created things, and from the evil of the darkness as it overspreads, and from the mischief of the witchcrafts, and from the evil of the envier as he practices envy.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ. مَلِكِ النَّاسِ. إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ. مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ. الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ. مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful. Say I seek refuge in the Lord of humankind, the King of humankind, the God of humankind, from the evil of the withdrawing whisperers who whispers in the hearts of humankind; and from the evil of the Jinn and humankind.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَإِنْ مِنْ شَيْءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ. سُبْحَانَكَ يا عَلِيُّ يا عَظِيمْ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Everything is glorifying Him with praise. Glorified are You, the High and Great.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ الله
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Glorified is Allah.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّه
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Praise is due to Allah.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَر
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَرْ كَبِيْرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater; praise is abundantly due to Allah. Glorified is Allah with praise on day and night.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: أفضَلُ الذِّكْرِ وَالْقَولِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The best Dhikr and the best say is “No god but Allah alone; with no associate. To Him belong the Dominion and Praise. He is the All-Arranging.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels continually extend blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Honorable Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى أَسْعَدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Most Fortunate Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى نُوْرِ الْهُدَىْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Ultimate Guide Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Recognize that there is no god but Allah.

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: No God but Allah.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ، سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ الله
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: No God but Allah. Our Honourable Mohammad is the Messenger of Allah.

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Your Lord proclaimed 'Call Me; I will respond to you.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وسَلِّمْ عَلَى مَنْ مِنْهُ انْشَقَّتِ الأسْرَارُ. وَانْفَلَقَتِ الأنْوَارُ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, shower Your Peace and Blessing on the one from whom mysteries came into being, and illuminations emerged.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَفِيهِ ارْتَقَتِ الْحَقَائِقُ. وَتَنَزَّلَتْ عُلُومُ آدَمَ فَأعْجَزَ الْخَلاَئِقِ. وَلَهُ تَضَاءَلَتِ الْفُهُومُ فَلَمْ يُدْرِكْهُ مِنَّا سَابِقٌ وَلاَ لاَحِقٌ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: In him, realities were recognized; the knowledge of Adam descended upon him, so he went beyond the reach of any human; all understanding fell short of him; no one, in the past or future, can ever attain his reality.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: فَرِيَاضُ الْمَلَكُوتِ بِزَهْرِ جَمَالِهِ مُونِقَةٌ. وَحِيَاضُ الْجَبَرُوتِ بِفَيْضِ أنْوَارِهِ مُتَدَفِّقَة.ٌ وَلاَ شَيْءَ إِلاً وَهُوَ بِهِ مَنُوطٌ. إِذ لَوْلاَ الْوَاسِطَةُ لَذَهَبَ كَمَا قِيلَ الْمَوْسُوطُ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: The gardens of the Spiritual Kingdom [Malakut] bloom with the flowers of his beauty. The Divine Dominion [Jabarut] overflows with his illumination. Nothing, but is related to him; without a medium, no result would be attained.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: صَلاَةً تَلِيقُ بِكَ مِنْكَ إِلَيْهِ كَمَا هُوَ أهْلُهُ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: So bless him that is appropriate from Your Grandeur to him as befits his stature.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّهُ سِرُّكَ الْجَامِعُ الدَّالُ عَلَيْكَ. وَحِجَابُكَ الأعْظَمُ الْقَائِمُ لَكَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ. اللَّهُمَّ ألْحِقْنِي بِنَسَبِهِ. وَحَقِّقْنِي بِحَسَبِهِ. وَعَرِّفْنِي إِيَّاهُ مَعْرِفَةً أسْلَمُ بِهَا مِنْ مَوَارِدِ الْجَهْلِ. وَأكْرَعُ بِهَا مِنْ مَوَارِدِ الْفَضْلِ. وَاحْمِلْنِي عَلَى سَبِيلِهِ إِلَى حَضْرَتِكَ. حَمْلاً مَحْفُوفاً بِنُصْرَتِكَ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, he is Your all- encompassing creation that leads through You to You. He is Your supreme veil dedicated to You, and in Your presence. Oh, Allah, include me in his lineage and count me among his true followers. Oh, Allah let me know him in a way that saves me from the sources of ignorance, and satisfy me with the sources of grace. (Oh Allah) carry me on his path to Your presence; a carriage that is surrounded with Your support.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَاقْذِفْ بِيَ عَلَى الْبَاطِلِ فَأدْمَغَهُ وَزُجَّ بِي فِي بِحَارِ الأحَدِيَّةِ وَانْشُلْنِي مِنْ أوْحَالِ التِّوْحِيدِ وَأغْرِقْنِي فِي عَيْنِ بَحْرِ الْوَحْدَةِ حَتَّى لاَ أرَى وَلاَ أسْمَعَ وَلاَ أجِدَ وَلاَ أُحِسَّ إِلاً بِهَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Throw me on the falsehood to eliminate it and plunge me into the oceans of Your Onliness. Save me from drowning in the muds of oneness (with my self-consciousness); instead, drown me in the pure ocean of Oneness where I do not see, hear, sense, or feel except through it.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَاجْعَلِ اللَّهُمَّ الْحِجَابَ الأعْظَمَ حَيَاةَ رُوحِي؛ وَرُوحَهُ سِرَّ حَقِيقَتِي؛ وَحَقِيقَتَهُ جَامِعَ عَوَالِمِي بِتَحْقِيقِ الْحَقِّ الأوَّلِ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Oh Allah make the Greatest Veil [the Prophet] the life of my soul; make his soul the core of my reality; and make his reality the whole of my physical and non-physical worlds; by recognizing the ‘First Truth’.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: يَا أوَّلُ يَا آخِرُ يَا ظَاهِرُ يَا بَاطِنُ اسْمَعْ نِدَائِي بِمَا سَمِعْتَ بِهِ نِدَاءَ عَبْدِكَ زَكَرِيَّا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: (Oh Allah) You are, the First, the Last, the Outward, and the Inward. Hear my call the way you heard the call of your slave Zakariyya.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَانْصُرْنِي بِك لَكَ وَأيِّدْنِي بِكَ لَكَ وَاجْمَعْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَكَ وَحُلْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ غَيْرِكَ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Let me win, through You and for You. Support me through You and for You; and bring me together with You; and separate me from any other.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: الله
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allaah.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ الَّذِي فَرَضَ عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لَرَادُّكَ إِلَىٰ مَعَادٍ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Indeed, He, Who ordained the Qur’an for you, will return you to the station of your Ultimate Destiny.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا مِن لَّدُنْكَ رَحْمَةً وَهَيِّئْ لَنَا مِنْ أَمْرِنَا رَشَدًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: “Oh, Lord, bestow on us a mercy from Yourself and facilitate good results for our affairs.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: وَصَلَى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Oh Allah, have Your blessings and peace on our Master Muhammad, his Folks and Companions.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Peace and Blessing on our Most Honorable Muhammad, and his Folks and Companions.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ يا عَليُّ يا عَظيمُ يا حَلِيمُ يا عَلِيمُ. أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَعِلْمُكَ حَسْبِي. فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ رَبِّي وَنِعْمَ الحَسْبُ حَسْبي
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh, Allah, Oh Most High, Oh Great, Oh Tolerant, and All-Knowing. You are my Lord; Your Knowledge is my sufficiency. How perfect is my Lord and my sufficiency.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: تَنْصُرُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَأنْتَ العَزيزُ الرَّحِيمُ. نَسْألُكَ العِصْمَةَ فِي الحَرَكاتِ والسَّـكَنَـاتِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ والْإِرَادَاتِ وَالْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَ الشُكُوكِ والظُّنونِ والأوْهـَامِ السَّـاتِرَةِ للقُلُوبِ عنْ مُطَالَعَةِ الغُيُوبِ. فَقَدْ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: You give support to whom You choose; You are the Almighty and the Merciful. We ask Your protection throughout our motions and rest, in utterances, desires, and our thoughts from doubts, and suspicion, and the illusions that veil our hearts from the perception of the unseen. Truly have the Believers been really tested, and deeply shaken.(33:11).

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَّرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ إِلَّا غُرُورًا.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The Hypocrites, and the sick-hearted, would say “Allah and His Messenger did not promise us other than delusion (33:12).

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَثَبِّتْنَا وانْصُرْنَا وسَخِّرْ لَنَا هَذَا البَحْرَ كَمَا سخَّرْتَ البَحْرَ لمُوْسَى. وسَخَّرْتَ النَارَ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ. وسَخَّرْتَ الجِبَالَ والحَدِيْدَ لِدَاوُدَ. وَسَخَّرْتَ الرِّيحَ والشَّيَاطِينَ والجِنَّ لِسُلَيْمَانَ.  وَسَخِّرْ لَنَا كُلَّ بَحْرٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي الأرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ. وَبَـحْرَ الدُّنْياَ وَبـَحْرَ الآخِرةِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: So, hold us on track, support us; and employ for us this ocean the way You employed the ocean for Musa; the fire for Ibrahim; the mountains and iron for Dawūd; and the wind, the demons and jinn for Solomon. Employ for us every ocean (means and trigger) that belongs to You, on the earth, or heavens, in the Seen or the Unseen worlds, as well as the ocean of this life and the ocean of the Afterlife.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَسَخِّرْ لَنا كُلَّ شَيءٍ يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيءٍ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Employ for us everything; oh You in whose hand is the true control of everything.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: كَهَيَعَصَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: KAF-HA-YA-AIN-SAD.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اُنْصُرْنا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ النَّاصِرِيْن. * وافْتَحْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الفَاتِحِيْن * واغْفِرْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الغَافِرْين * وارْحَمْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْن * وارْزُقْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِيْن * واهْدِنَا وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ القَوْمِ الظَّالمِيْن * وَهَبْ لَنَا رِيْحَاً طَيِّبَةً كَمَا هِيَ في عِلْمِكَ. وانْشُرْهَا عَلَيْنَا مِنْ خَزائِنِ رَحْمَتِكَ. واحْمِلْناَ بِهَا حَمْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ مَعَ السَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيَةِ فِي الدِّيْنِ والدُّنْيَا والآخِرَةِ. إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لَنَا أُمُوْرَنَا مَعَ الرَّاحَةِ لِقُلُوبِنَا وأبْدَانِنَا. والسَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيةِ فِي دِيْنِنَا ودُنْيَانَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Support us; You are the best of supporters. Open the doors of opportunities to us; You are the best of Openers. Forgive us; You are the best of Forgivers. Have mercy on us; You are the Most Merciful. Give us sustenance; You are the best Sustainer. Guide us and save us from the wrongdoers. Grant us a goodly wind as may be in Your knowledge; and release it upon us from the storehouses of Your Mercy; carry us with this wind honourably with safety, protection and wellbeing in our religion in this world and the world to come. Truly You the All-Arranging. Allah, facilitate our affairs for us with ease for our hearts and bodies and security and wellbeing in our worldly life and religion.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَنَا صَاحِبَاً فِي سَفَرِنَا.  وَخَلِيْفَةً فِي أَهْلِنَا. وَاطْمِسْ عَلَى وُجُوهِ أَعْدَائِنَا وامْسَخْهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهمْ فَلاَ يَسْتَطِيْعُونَ المُضِيَّ وَلاَ المَجِيءَ إلَيْنا
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Be our companion in our journeys, and keep watch over our families that we leave behind. Blind the faces of our enemies and paralyze them in places where they stand so they can neither move nor reach us.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَى أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّى يُبْصِرُونَ.  وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ. يَس. وَالْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ. إِنَّكَ لَمِنْ الْمُرْسَلِينَ. عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ. تَنْزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ. لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَا أُنْذِرَ آبَاؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَافِلُونَ. لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ. إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُقْمَحُونَ. وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيْهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: If We wished, we could have blind their eyes so they miss the path; how could they see. If We wished, We could have paralyzed them in place, so they could not move forward or return back”; “Yasin, by the Wise Quran, you are one of the Messengers on the straight path. The revelation by the Almighty and Merciful is to warn a people whose ancestors were not warned; as a result, they were ignorant. Most of them were doomed; they do not believe. We have put yokes around their necks up to the chins. Therefore, their heads are forced up and they cannot see the way. We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and We have covered their eyes so they cannot see.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: شَاهَتِ الْوُجُوهْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: May the faces be humbled.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsisting; those who carried wrong will be losers.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: طس. حم عسق. مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ. بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَا يَبْغِيَانِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: TASIN, ḤAMIM, AIN-SIN QAF. The two seas have met; there is a barrier between them so they do not mix.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: حَم
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: ḤA-MIM.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: حُمَّ الأَمْرُ وَجَاءَ النَّصْرُ فَعَلَيْنَا لا يُنْصَرُوْن
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The issue is heated. Victory is hoped for, and no one can defeat us.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: حم.  تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ. غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ الْعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوْلِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Ḥa-mim. The Book was descended from Allah, the All-Powerful, The All-Knowing. Forgiver of sins, Accepter of repentance, strict in punishment, infinite in bounty. There is no god but Him; to Him is the final destination.

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ بابُنَا. تَبَارَكَ حِيطَانُنَا. يس سَقْفُنا. كَهَيَعَصَ كِفايَتُنَا. حَم عَسِقَ حِمَـايَتُنَـا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Bismillah is our door; Surat Tabarak is our walls; Surat Yasin is our roof; Surat Kaf-Ha-Ya-ain-Ṣad is our sufficiency; Surat Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf is our protection.

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Allah will suffice you against them; He is the Most Hearing and Knowledgeable.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: سِتْرُ العَرْشِ مَسْبُولٌ عَلَيْنَا. وَعَيْنُ اللهِ نَاظِرَةٌ إِلَيْنَا.  بِحَوْلِ اللهِ لاَ يُقْدَرُ عَلَيْنَا. وَاللَّهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِمْ مُحِيْطٌ. بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ.  فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The veil of the Throne is lowered upon us. The eye of Allah is looking at us. By the power of Allah, they will not be able to defeat us. Allah is All-Embracing beyond their reach. Nay, it is a glorious Quran in a preserved tablet.

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: فَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Allah is the best protector. He is the Most Merciful of the Merciful.

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِينَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: My Guardian is Allah Who descends the Book; He cares for the Righteous.

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: حَسْبِي اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Allah is my sufficiency; there is no god but Him. On Him I rely; He is the Lord of the Great Throne.

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيءٌ في الأَرْضِ وَلَا في السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ العَليْم
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing may harm in earth or in heaven; He is the Most Hearing and All Knowing.

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ الله التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِالله العَلِيِّ العَظِيْم
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: No power, or strength, except by Allah, the Most High and Great.

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: وَصَلّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّم
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: Allah bless Honourable Muhammad, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِين * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: Glorified is your Lord; the Lord of Honour above what they describe. Peace be on the Prophets. All Praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all universe.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! Shower Your Blessings and Peace on our Most Honorable Prophet

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهـُمَّ بـِسَطـْوَةِ جَبـَرُوتِ قـَهـْرِكَ، وبـِسُرْعـَةِ إغـَاثـَةِ نـَصـْرِكَ، وَبـِغَـيرَتـِكَ لانـْـتـِهـَاكِ حُرُمَـاتِكَ، وَبـِحـِمَايَتِكَ لِـمَنِ احـْـتـَمـَى بـِآياتِكَ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! I ask you by the authority of Your Absolute power; by the speedy help of Your support; by the immediate protective response over the violation of what You have prohibited; and by Your inviolable protection for whomever seeks the protection in Your Signs.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: نسْأَلـُكَ يَا اللهُ، يَا سَميعُ، يَا قـَرِيبُ، يَا مُجـِيبُ، يَا سَرِيعُ، يَا مُنـْتـَـقِمُ، يَا شـَدِيدَ البَـطـْشِ، يَا جَبَّارُ،  يَا قـَهـَّارُ،  يَا مَنْ لاَ يُعْـجـِزُهُ قـَهـْرُ الجَبـَابـِرَةِ، وَلاَ يَعْظـُمُ عـَلـَيْهِ هَلاَكُ المُتـَمَرِّدَةِ مِنَ المُلُوكِ واْلأَكـَاسِرَةِ، أَنْ تـَجْـعَلَ كـَيـْدَ مَنْ كـَادَناَ فِي نـَحْرِهِ، وَمَكـْرَ مَنْ مَكـَرَ بِنَا عَـائِداً عَلَيهِ، وَحُـفـْرَةَ مَنْ حَفـَرَ لَنَا وَاقِعاً فِيْهَا. وَمَنْ نـَصَبَ لَنَا شـَبـَكـَةَ الخِدَاعِ اجْعَلـْهُ يَا سَيِّدِي مُسَاقاً إِلَيْهَا وَمُصَـادًا فِيْهَا وَأسِيْراً لـَدَيْهـَا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: I implore You! Oh Allah! O All-Hearing! O the Near One! O the Responder! O the Swift One in Action! O Avenger! O Mighty Assaulter! O Subjugator! O Compeller! O You Who is not weakened by the power of tyrants! O You for whom the destruction of tyrants is no significant challenge! We ask You to make the trap of he who plots against us to be entrapped by it, and the plot of he who plots against us to fall prey to his own snare! I beg You to cause he who digs a hole for us to fall into it, and he who sets up a net of deception for us to be driven into it, trapped and imprisoned by it!

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ بـِحَقِّ كَهَيَعَصَ، اِكـْـفِـنـَا هَمَّ العِدَا، وَلـَقـِّهـِمُ الرَّدَى، وَاجْعـَلهُمْ لِكـُلِّ حَبِيْبٍ فِداً، وَسَلـِّطْ عَلـَيـْهـِمْ عَاجـِلَ النـِّقـْمـَةِ فيِ الْيَوْمِ وَالْغـَدَا. اَللَّهُمَّ بَدِّدْ شـَمْلـَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـَرِّق جَمْـعَـهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أَقـْلِلْ عَدَدَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـُلَّ حَدَّهُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ الدَّائِرَة عَلـَيـْهـِمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أوْصِلْ العَذَابَ إِلَيهـِمْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the right of “KAF-HA-YA-AIN-ṢAD” relieve us from the fear of our enemies! Destroy them; make them a ransom for our beloved ones; and overpower them with a swift defeat, now and then. O God break their unity! O God disperse their assembly! O God lessen their numbers! O God blunt their edge! O God turn fate against them. O God unleash torment upon them. O God make them shackled by their own ring of fetters! O God make retribution to be upon them.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ أخـْرِجْـهـُمْ عَنْ دَائِرَةِ الحِلـْمِ، وَاسْـلـُبـْهـُمْ مَدَدَ الإمْـهـَالِ، وغـُلَّ أيْديَهـُمْ وَأَرْجُلَهُم، وأشْدُدْ عَلـَى قـُلوبـِهـِمْ ولا تـُبـَلـِّغـْهـُمُ الآمَالْ. اللَّهُمَّ مَزِّقـْهـُمْ كـُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍ مَزَّقـْـتـَهُ لِأَعْدَائِكَ انـْـتِصـَاراً لِأَنـْبـِياَئِكَ وَرُسُـلِكَ وَأوْلِياَئِـكَ.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O God exclude them from the shade of leniency! Deprive them of the support of sufficient time! Fetter their hands and feet, tie up their hearts and do not enable them to reach their goals.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ انـْـتـَصِرْ لَناَ انـْـتـِصَـارَكَ لأحْبـَابـِكَ عَلَى أعْدَائِكَ. اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تـُمَكـِّنِ الأعْدَاءَ فِينَا، وَلاَ تـُسـَلـِطـَهـُمْ عَـلـَيْـنـَا بـِذُنُوبـِنـَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: O God tear them apart in the way You make Your enemies perish in order to grant victory to Your Prophets, and dearest servants! O God grant us the victory of Your beloved ones over Your enemies! O God do not allow the enemy to overpower us and do not give them authority over us due to our sins.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: حَمِ~
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Ḥa-Meem.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: حُـمَّ الأمْرُ وَجَاءَ النـَّصـْرُ فـَعـَليْنـَا لاَ يـُنـْصـَرُونَ، حَمِ عسق حِمَايَتـُنـَا مِمَّا نـَخـَافُ، اَللَّهُمَّ قـِنـَا شـَرَّ الأسْوَاءِ وَلاَ تـَجْعـَلْنـَا مَحـَلاًّ لِلْبـَلـْوَاء، اَللَّهُمَّ أعْطِنـَا أمَلَ الرَّجَاءِ وَفـَوْقَ الأمَلِ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Matters have become intense; victory has arrived; they will not overpower us! Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf! Grant us protection from what we fear!  O Allah shield us from the evil of iniquities and make us not the site of tribulation. O Allah, grant us what we hope for and beyond what we hope for.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: يَا هُو
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: YA-HU.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: يَا مَنْ بـِفـَضْـلِهِ لِفـَضْلِهِ نـَسْألـُكَ العَجـَلَ العَجـَلَ، إِلَهِيِ الْإِجَابَةَ الإِجَابَة. يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ نـُوحاً فيِ قـَوْمِهِ، يَا مَنْ نـَصَرَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلى أعْدَائِهِ، يَا مَنْ رَدَّ يُوسُفَ عَلَى يَعْـقُوبْ، يَا مَنْ كـَشـَفَ ضـُرَّ أيُّوبَ، يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ دَعْوَةَ زكـَرِيَّا، يَا مَنْ قـَبـِلَ تـَسـْبيحَ يُونـُسَ بْنِ مَتـَّى
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Oh, the One through Whose favours we ask for His favours! We ask You for haste; haste! O Allah, respond to us! O the One Who responded to Nuh against his people; O the One Who gave victory to Ibrahim over his enemies! O the One Who returned Yusuf to Yaqub! O the One Who removed the tribulation of Ayyub! O the One Who answered the call of Zakariyya! O the One Who answered the prayers of Yūnus son of Matta.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: نـَسْـألـُكَ بـِأَسْرَارِ هَذِهِ الدَّعَوَاتِ أنْ تـَقـْبـَلَ مَا بـِهِ دَعَوْنـَاكَ، وأنْ تـُعْطِيَنـَا مَا سَألنَاكَ. أنـْجـِزْ لَنـَا وَعْدَكَ الَّذِي وَعَدْتـَهُ لِعِـبَادِكَ المُؤْمِنِين
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: We implore You, O God, through the secrets of these invocations to accept what we call upon You for; to grant us what we ask for; and to manifest for us the promise which You have promised the believers.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أنـْتَ سُبْحَانـَكَ إِنِّي كـُنـْتُ مِنَ الظـَّالِمِينَ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: There is no god but You, The Glorified! I have been among the wrongdoers.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: انـْـقـَطـَعـَتْ آمَالـُنـَا وَعِزَّتِكَ إِلاَّ مِنـْكَ. وَخـَابَ رَجَاؤُنـَا وَحَـقِـكَ إِلاَّ فِيكَ. إنْ أبْطـَأتْ غـَارَةُ الأرْحَامِ وابْـتـَعـَدَتْ، فـَأقـْرَبُ الشَّيءِ مِنـَّا غـَارَةُ اللهِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: By Your majesty, all our hopes have been lost except for our hope in You! By Your due right, all of our expectations have diminished except for our expectations from You!  When the support of our kin slows down and    stops, the closest thing to us is the immediate protective support of Allah.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ جـِدِّي السـَّيـْرَ مُسْرِعَةً فِي حَلِّ عُـقـْدَتـِنـَا يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, come hastily to unravel our knots.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: عَدَتِ الْعَادُونَ وَجَارُوا، وَرَجَوْنـَا اللهَ مُجِـيرًا، وَكـَفـَى باِللهِ وَلـِيـًّا وَكـَفـَى باللهِ نـَصِيرًا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, the enemy has antagonized and violated; and we have turned to Allah seeking refuge! Allah is the Most Sufficient Guardian. Allah is the Most Sufficient Victor.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: وحَسْبـُنـَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الوَكِيلُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: God is sufficient for us; He is the Best Guardian

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قـُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَليِّ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: There is no power or strength except through Allah the Most Exalted and Great.

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: سَلاَمٌ عَلَى نُوحٍ في الْعَالمَين، اِسْـتـَجـِبْ لـَنـَا آمِينْ، فـَقـُطِعَ دَابـِرُ القـَوْمِ الَّذِينَ ظـَلـَمُوا والْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ العَالـَمِين
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: (Oh Allah) Answer our prayers!  Amin! The plans of the oppressors have failed. All gratitude are to Allah, Lord of the worlds.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: وَصَـلـَّى اللهُ عَـلـَى سَيـِّدِنـَا مُحَمَّدٍ النـَّبـِيّ الأمِيِّ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبـِهِ وَسَـلـَّمَ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: May Allah bless our Honourable Muhammad, the unlettered prophet, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: حسبنا الله ونعم الوكيل
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Allah is our Sufficiency, He is the Best Agent

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: يَا لَطِيْفُ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O, the Most Subtle.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: ياَ رَبِّ صَلِّ عَلَى الْمُخْتَارِ مِنْ مُضَرِ  [.....] وَالْأَنْبِياَ وَجَمِيْعِ الرُّسْلِ مَا ذُكِرُوا
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah send blessings upon the Chosen One from the tribe of Mudar, And upon all Messengers and Prophets as they are mentioned.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَصَلِّ رَبِّ عَلَى الْهَادِي وَشِيْعَتِهِ  [.....] وَصَحْبِهِ مَنْ لِطَيِّ الدِّينِ قَدْ نَشَرُوْا
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Send blessings, O my Lord, upon the Guide and his followers, And upon his companions who propagated the faith.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: وَجَاهَدُوا مَعَهُ فيِ اللهِ وَاجْتَهَدُوا  [.....] وَهَاجَرُوا وَلَهُ آوَوْا وَقَدْ نَصَرُوا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Fought with him, strove for Allah, Migrated, sheltered and supported.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَبَيَّنُوا الْفَرْضَ وَالْمَسْنُونَ وَاعْتَصَبُوا  [.....] لِلَّهِ وَاعْتَصَمُوْا بِاللهِ فَانْتَصَرُوا
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: They clarified what is obligatory and what is Sunna, sought refuge in Allah and thus triumphed.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: أَزْكَى صَلَاةٍ وَأَنْمَاهَا وَأَشْرَفَهَا [.....]  يُعَطِّرُ الْكَوْنَ رَيَّا نَشْرُهَا الْعَطِرُ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: May it be the purest, most flourishing and most noble blessing one that fragrances the universe.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: مَعْبُوْقَةً بِعَبِيْقِ الْمِسْكِ زَاكِيَةً  [.....] مِنْ طِيْبِهَا أَرَجُ الرِضْوَانِ يَنْتَشِرُ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Diffusing the pure fragrance of musk and from its fragrance may the scent of pleasure spread.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: عَدَّ الْحَصَى وَالثَّرَى وَالرَّمْلِ يَتْبَعُهَا  [.....] نَجْمُ السَّمَا وَنَبَاتُ الْأَرْضِ وَالْمَدَرُ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: May it be multiplied by the number of stones, the grains of soil and sand, followed by the stars in the sky, and the vegetation on the earth!

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ وَزْنِ مَثَاقِيْلِ الْجِبَالِ كَمَا [.....]  يَلِيْهِ قَطْرُ جَمِيْعِ الْمَاءِ وَالْمَطَرُ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: And by the weight of the mountains, followed by the drops of water and rain

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مَا حَوَتِ اْلأَشْجَارُ مِنْ وَرَقٍ  [.....] وَكُلِّ حَرْفٍ غدَا يُتُلَى وَيَسْتَطَرُ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: May it be multiplied by the number of leaves that the trees hold,

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَالْوَحْشِ وَالطيْرِ وَاْلأَسْمَاكِ مَعْ نَعَمِ [.....]  يَلِيْهِمُ الْجِنُّ وَاْلأَمْلَاكُ وَالْبَشَرُ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: And every letter ever to be uttered read and scribed. And (by the number) of beasts, birds, fish and animals, and by the Jinn, the Angels and humans

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: وَالذَّرُ وَالنَّمْلُ مَعْ جَمْعِ الْحُبُوْبِ كَذَا  [.....] وَالشَّعْرُ وَالصُوْفُ وَاْلأَرْيَاشُ وَالْوَبَرُ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: And by the number of atoms, ants and all the grains and also by the numbers of hair, wool feather and fur.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَمَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ الْعِلْمُ المُحِيْطُ وَمَا  [.....] جَرَى بِهِ الْقَلَمُ الْمأَمُوْرُ وَالْقَدَرُ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: And by the amount of knowledge that Allah encompasses and by what the pen of decree and destiny has written

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ نَعْمَائِكَ اللاَّتِي مَنَنْتَ بِهَا [.....]  عَلَى الْخَلاَئِقِ مُذْ كَانُوْا وَمُذْ حُشِرُوا
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: And by the number of all the blessings that Allah has bestowed upon the creation from the time of their creation to the time of their resurrection.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مِقْدَارِهِ السَّامِي الَّذِي شَرُفَتْ  [.....] بِهِ النَّبِيُّوْنَ وَاْلأَمْلَاكُ وَافْتَخَرُوا
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: And by the magnitude of the sublime that honoured the Prophets and the Angels and gave them glory.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ مَا كَانَ فيِ اْلأَكْوَانِ يَا سَنَدِي [.....]  وَمَا يَكُونُ إِلَى أَنْ تُبْعَثَ الصُّوَرُ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: And by the number of all the things in the universes, O my Helper, and by everything that will be until the horn blows.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: فيِ كُلِّ طَرْفَةِ عَيْنٍ يَطْرِفُوْنَ بِهَا  [.....] أَهْلُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَاْلأَرْضِيْنَ أَوْ يَذَرُوا
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: And with every blinking of the eyes of the people in the heavens and the earth and in their moments of stillness

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: مِلْءَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَاْلأَرْضِيْنَ مَعْ جَبَلٍ  [.....] وَالْفَرْشِ وَالْعَرْشِ وَالْكُرْسِي وَمَا حَصَرُوا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: And multiply it by everything that the heavens and the earth contains, including the mountains, and the lands, the Throne, the Chair , and whatever they encompass,

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: مَا أَعْدَمَ اللهُ مَوْجُوْداً وَأَوْجَدَ مَعْـ ــدُوْماً  [.....] صَلَاةً دَوَاماً لَيْسَ تَنْحَصِرُ
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: And may the blessings be by the number of what Allah has not created, and by that that which He has created, with a continual blessing that does not end.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: تَسْتَغْرِقُ الْعَدَّ مَعْ جَمْعِ الدُّهُورِ  [.....] كَمَا تُحِيْطُ بِالْحَدِّ لاَ تُبْقِي وَلاَ تَذَرُ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: May it encompass the number of all things that have passed throughout the ages

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: لاَ غَايَةً وَانْتِهَاءً يَا عَظِيْمُ لَهَا  [.....] وَلاَ لَهَا أَمَدٌ يُقْضَى فَيُعْتَبَرُ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: May it have no end or limitation, O Great One, nor a period that is concluded or contained

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: وَعَدَّ أَضْعَافِ مَا قَدْ مَرَّ مِنْ عَدَدٍ  [.....] مَعْ ضِعْفِ أَضْعَافِهِ يَامَنْ لَهُ الْقَدَرُ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: And double the amount that has been enumerated, doubled again, and multiplied, O The One who is Most Able,

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: كَمَا تُحِبُّ وَتَرْضَى سَيِّدِيْ وَكَمَا [.....]  أَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ نُصَلِّيْ أَنْتَ مُقْتَدِرُ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: As you are happy and pleased, my master as your request for us to salute, for You are most able

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: مَعَ السَّلاَمِ كَمَا قَدْ مَرَّ مِنْ عَدَدٍ [.....]  رَبِّي وَضَاعِفْهُمَا وَالْفَضْلُ مُنْتَشِرُ
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: And send blessings with peace, by the number of all that has been mentioned my Lord, and multiply it, so that the blessings are spread far and wide.

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ ذَلِكَ مَضْرُوْبٌ بِحَقِّكَ فيِ [.....]  أَنْفَاسِ خَلْقِكَ إِنْ قَلُّوْا وَإِنْ كَثُرُوْا
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: And may it all be multiplied by Your worth and by the breaths of Your creation whether it be much or little

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ وَاغْفِرْ لِقَارِيْهَا وَسَامِعِهَا [.....]  وَالْمُسْلِمِيْنَ جَمِيْعًا أَيْنَمَا حَضَرُوْا
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: And my Lord, forgive all those who recite it, listen to it, and all the Muslims wherever they may be.

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: وَوَالِدِيْناَ وَأَهْلِيْنَا وَجِيْرَتِنَا  [.....] وَكُلُّنَا سَيِّدِي لِلْعَفْوِ مُفْتَقِرُ
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: And forgive our Parents, our families, our Neighbours and all of us, Oh my Master we are in need of your forgiveness

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ أَتَيْتُ ذُنُوْباً لاَ عِدَادَ لَهَا  [.....] لَكِنَّ عَفْوَكَ لاَ يُبْقِي وَلاَ يَذَرُ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: I have come with sins that are innumerable, but your forgiveness does not end or perish

wird_id_28.ar_wird_description: وَالْهَمُّ عَنْ كُلِّ مَا أَبْغِيْهِ أَشْغَلَنِي  [.....] وَقَدْ أتى خَاضِعاً وَالْقَلْبُ مُنْكَسِرُ
wird_id_28.en_wird_description: And with grief that occupies me from all that I aspire to, and I come with humility and heartbroken

wird_id_29.ar_wird_description: أَرْجُوْكَ يَا رَبِّ فيِ الدَّارَيْنِ تَرْحَمُنَا  [.....] بِجَاهِ مَنْ فيِ يَدَيْهِ سَبَّحَ الْحَجَرُ
wird_id_29.en_wird_description: I beg You, Oh Lord, In both worlds to have mercy on us, by his in whose hands the stones glorified Allah.

wird_id_30.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ أَعْظِمْ لَنَا أَجْراً وَمَغْفِرَةً [.....]  فَإِنَّ جُوْدَكَ بَحْرٌ لَيْسَ يَنْحَصِرُ
wird_id_30.en_wird_description: Oh Lord, increase the good favour upon us and forgive us for indeed Your generosity is an ocean unlimited

wird_id_31.ar_wird_description: وَاقْضِ دُيُوْناً لَهَا الْأَخْلاَقُ ضَائِقَةٌ  [.....] وَفَرِّجِ الْكَرْبَ عَنَّا أَنْتَ مُقْتَدِرُ
wird_id_31.en_wird_description: And alleviate the anxieties of a distressing nature, and relieve us of sorrow, You are Most Able.

wird_id_32.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَطِيْفًا بِنَا فيِ كُلِّ نَازِلَةٍ  [.....] لُطْفاً جَمِيْلاً بِهِ اْلأَهْوَالُ تَنْحَسِرُ
wird_id_32.en_wird_description: And be kind with us in every calamity with a beautiful kindness by which distress is no more

wird_id_33.ar_wird_description: بِالْمُصْطَفَى الْمُجْتَبَى خَيْرِ اْلأَنَامِ وَمَنْ  [.....] جَلاَلَةً نَزَلَتْ فِي مَدْحِهِ السُّوَرُ
wird_id_33.en_wird_description: By the honour of Mustafa, the chosen one, the best of creation. In his praise the chapters of the Quran was revealed.

wird_id_34.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الصَّلاَةُ عَلَى الْمُخْتَارِ مَا طَلَعَتْ [.....]  شَمْسُ النَّهَارِ وَمَا قَدْ شَعْشَعَ الْقَمَرُ
wird_id_34.en_wird_description: And blessing be upon the chosen one for as long as the sun rises and the moon shines

wird_id_35.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الرِّضَا عَنْ أَبِي بَكْرٍ خَلِيْفَتِهِ  [.....] مَنْ قَامَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ لِلدِّيْنِ يَنْتَصِرُ
wird_id_35.en_wird_description: And may Your pleasure be on Abu-Bakr, his Khalifa, who maintained the religion after him victoriously.

wird_id_36.ar_wird_description: وَعَنْ أَبِيْ حَفْصٍ الْفَارُوْقِ صَاحِبِهِ  [.....] مَنْ قَوْلُهُ الْفَصْلُ فيِ أَحْكَامِهِ عُمَرُ
wird_id_36.en_wird_description: And Upon Abi-Hafs, Al Faruq, his companion Umar, who had the final word by his judgement

wird_id_37.ar_wird_description: وَجُدْ لِعُثْمَانَ ذِي النُّوْرَيْنِ مَنْ كَمُلَتْ  [.....] لَهُ الْمَحَاسِنُ فيِ الدَّارَيْنِ وَالظَّفَرُ
wird_id_37.en_wird_description: And grant Othman, the possessor of the two lights, whose good qualities were accomplished with victory in both abodes

wird_id_38.ar_wird_description: كَذَا عَلِيٌّ مَعَ ابْنَيْهِ وَأُمِّهِمَا [.....]  أَهْلُ الْعَبَاءِ كَمَا قَدْ جَاءَنَا الْخَبَرُ
wird_id_38.en_wird_description: And likewise to Ali with his two sons and upon their mother, the people of the mantle as has been related in the Hadith

wird_id_39.ar_wird_description: سَعْدٌ سَعِيْدُ بْنُ عَوْفٍ طَلْحَةٌ وَأَبُوْ  [.....] عُبَيْدَةٍ وَزُبَيرٌ سَادَةٌ غُرَرُ
wird_id_39.en_wird_description: And upon Sa’d and Saeed, ibn-Auf, Talha, Abu Ubaida and Zubayr, all nobles.

wird_id_40.ar_wird_description: وَحَمْزَةٌ وَكَذَا الْعَبَّاسُ سَيِّدُنَا [.....]  وَنَجْلُهُ الْحَبُرُ مِنْ زَالَتْ بِهِ الغِيَرُ
wird_id_40.en_wird_description: And upon Hamza and our master Abbas and upon his son, the scholar through whom obscurities were no more

wird_id_41.ar_wird_description: وَاْلآلُ وَالصَّحْبُ وَاْلأَتْبَاعُ قَاطِبَةً  [.....] مَاجَنَّ لَيْلُ الدَّيَاجِي أَوْ بَدَا السَّحَرُ
wird_id_41.en_wird_description: And upon all the family, companions and followers for as long as the dark night covers the day and dawn appears.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ الله
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I ask Allah for forgiveness!
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullāh

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ الله الْعَظِيْمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهْ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: I ask Allah, the Almighty, Whom there is NO God but Him; and I repent to Him!
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullāh al-‘Azīm al-Ladhī Lā Ilāha Illā Huwa al-Ḥayy al-Qayyūm wa Atūbu ilayh

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: There is NO God but Allah.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā Ilāha Illā Allāh

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ، صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Our Most Honorable Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; may Allah shower him with His Blessing and Peace
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Sayyidinā Muḥammadin Rasūlu Allāh, Ṣallā Allāh ʿalayh wa Ālih wa Sallam

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامْ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are the Peace; from You comes the Peace; Most Blessed You are, the Owner of Awe and Nobleness
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma Anta as-Salām, wa Minka as-Salām, Tabārakta Yā Dhāl-Jalāli wal-Ikrām

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: سَمِعْنا وأَطَعْنا غُفْرانَكَ رَبَّنا وإلَيْكَ المَصِيرُ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: We heard and obeyed; forgive us, Lord; ultimate destination is to You
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Sami‘nā wa Aṭa‘nā Ghufrānak, Rabbānā wa ilayka al-Maṣīr

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنَّا على ذِكرِكَ وشُكرِكَ وحُسنِ عِبادتِكَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: O Allah help us do Dhikr and Shukr with excellence in devotion
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma A‘innā ʿalā Dhikrik wa Shukrik wa Ḥusni ʿibādatik

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah from the Accursed Devil.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَإِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Your God is One. No god but Him, the Most Gracious and Merciful.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Living and Self-subsisting. Neither drowse nor sleep can seize Him. Unto Him belong whatever is in the heavens and in earth. No one can intercede except by His permission. He knows what happens to them in this world and in the Hereafter. They will never compass anything of His knowledge except what He wills. His Chair accommodates heavens and earth; and it does not burden Him to keep them. He is the Most High and Great.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ.  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful. “Say He is Allah, the Only. Allah the Absolute Master. He begets not nor is He begotten; none is His like.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ. مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَد
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful “Say I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of created things, and from the evil of the darkness as it overspreads, and from the mischief of the witchcrafts, and from the evil of the envier as he practices envy.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ. مَلِكِ النَّاسِ. إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ. مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ. الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ. مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful. Say I seek refuge in the Lord of humankind, the King of humankind, the God of humankind, from the evil of the withdrawing whisperers who whispers in the hearts of humankind; and from the evil of the Jinn and humankind.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَإِنْ مِنْ شَيْءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ. سُبْحَانَكَ يا عَلِيُّ يا عَظِيمْ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Everything is glorifying Him with praise. Glorified are You, the High and Great.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ الله
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Glorified is Allah.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّه
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Praise is due to Allah.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَر
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَرْ كَبِيْرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater; praise is abundantly due to Allah. Glorified is Allah with praise on day and night.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: أفضَلُ الذِّكْرِ وَالْقَولِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The best Dhikr and the best say is “No god but Allah alone; with no associate. To Him belong the Dominion and Praise. He is the All-Arranging.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels continually extend blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Honorable Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى أَسْعَدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Most Fortunate Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى نُوْرِ الْهُدَىْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Ultimate Guide Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Recognize that there is no god but Allah.

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: No God but Allah.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ، سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ الله
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: No God but Allah. Our Honourable Mohammad is the Messenger of Allah.

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Your Lord proclaimed 'Call Me; I will respond to you.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Peace and Blessing on our Most Honorable Muhammad, and his Folks and Companions.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ يا عَليُّ يا عَظيمُ يا حَلِيمُ يا عَلِيمُ. أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَعِلْمُكَ حَسْبِي. فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ رَبِّي وَنِعْمَ الحَسْبُ حَسْبي
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh, Allah, Oh Most High, Oh Great, Oh Tolerant, and All-Knowing. You are my Lord; Your Knowledge is my sufficiency. How perfect is my Lord and my sufficiency.

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: تَنْصُرُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَأنْتَ العَزيزُ الرَّحِيمُ. نَسْألُكَ العِصْمَةَ فِي الحَرَكاتِ والسَّـكَنَـاتِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ والْإِرَادَاتِ وَالْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَ الشُكُوكِ والظُّنونِ والأوْهـَامِ السَّـاتِرَةِ للقُلُوبِ عنْ مُطَالَعَةِ الغُيُوبِ. فَقَدْ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: You give support to whom You choose; You are the Almighty and the Merciful. We ask Your protection throughout our motions and rest, in utterances, desires, and our thoughts from doubts, and suspicion, and the illusions that veil our hearts from the perception of the unseen. Truly have the Believers been really tested, and deeply shaken.(33:11).

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَّرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ إِلَّا غُرُورًا.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The Hypocrites, and the sick-hearted, would say “Allah and His Messenger did not promise us other than delusion (33:12).

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَثَبِّتْنَا وانْصُرْنَا وسَخِّرْ لَنَا هَذَا البَحْرَ كَمَا سخَّرْتَ البَحْرَ لمُوْسَى. وسَخَّرْتَ النَارَ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ. وسَخَّرْتَ الجِبَالَ والحَدِيْدَ لِدَاوُدَ. وَسَخَّرْتَ الرِّيحَ والشَّيَاطِينَ والجِنَّ لِسُلَيْمَانَ.  وَسَخِّرْ لَنَا كُلَّ بَحْرٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي الأرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ. وَبَـحْرَ الدُّنْياَ وَبـَحْرَ الآخِرةِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: So, hold us on track, support us; and employ for us this ocean the way You employed the ocean for Musa; the fire for Ibrahim; the mountains and iron for Dawūd; and the wind, the demons and jinn for Solomon. Employ for us every ocean (means and trigger) that belongs to You, on the earth, or heavens, in the Seen or the Unseen worlds, as well as the ocean of this life and the ocean of the Afterlife.

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَسَخِّرْ لَنا كُلَّ شَيءٍ يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيءٍ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Employ for us everything; oh You in whose hand is the true control of everything.

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: كَهَيَعَصَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: KAF-HA-YA-AIN-SAD.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اُنْصُرْنا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ النَّاصِرِيْن. * وافْتَحْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الفَاتِحِيْن * واغْفِرْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الغَافِرْين * وارْحَمْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْن * وارْزُقْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِيْن * واهْدِنَا وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ القَوْمِ الظَّالمِيْن * وَهَبْ لَنَا رِيْحَاً طَيِّبَةً كَمَا هِيَ في عِلْمِكَ. وانْشُرْهَا عَلَيْنَا مِنْ خَزائِنِ رَحْمَتِكَ. واحْمِلْناَ بِهَا حَمْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ مَعَ السَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيَةِ فِي الدِّيْنِ والدُّنْيَا والآخِرَةِ. إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لَنَا أُمُوْرَنَا مَعَ الرَّاحَةِ لِقُلُوبِنَا وأبْدَانِنَا. والسَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيةِ فِي دِيْنِنَا ودُنْيَانَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Support us; You are the best of supporters. Open the doors of opportunities to us; You are the best of Openers. Forgive us; You are the best of Forgivers. Have mercy on us; You are the Most Merciful. Give us sustenance; You are the best Sustainer. Guide us and save us from the wrongdoers. Grant us a goodly wind as may be in Your knowledge; and release it upon us from the storehouses of Your Mercy; carry us with this wind honourably with safety, protection and wellbeing in our religion in this world and the world to come. Truly You the All-Arranging. Allah, facilitate our affairs for us with ease for our hearts and bodies and security and wellbeing in our worldly life and religion.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَنَا صَاحِبَاً فِي سَفَرِنَا.  وَخَلِيْفَةً فِي أَهْلِنَا. وَاطْمِسْ عَلَى وُجُوهِ أَعْدَائِنَا وامْسَخْهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهمْ فَلاَ يَسْتَطِيْعُونَ المُضِيَّ وَلاَ المَجِيءَ إلَيْنا
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Be our companion in our journeys, and keep watch over our families that we leave behind. Blind the faces of our enemies and paralyze them in places where they stand so they can neither move nor reach us.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَى أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّى يُبْصِرُونَ.  وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ. يَس. وَالْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ. إِنَّكَ لَمِنْ الْمُرْسَلِينَ. عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ. تَنْزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ. لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَا أُنْذِرَ آبَاؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَافِلُونَ. لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ. إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُقْمَحُونَ. وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيْهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: If We wished, we could have blind their eyes so they miss the path; how could they see. If We wished, We could have paralyzed them in place, so they could not move forward or return back”; “Yasin, by the Wise Quran, you are one of the Messengers on the straight path. The revelation by the Almighty and Merciful is to warn a people whose ancestors were not warned; as a result, they were ignorant. Most of them were doomed; they do not believe. We have put yokes around their necks up to the chins. Therefore, their heads are forced up and they cannot see the way. We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and We have covered their eyes so they cannot see.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: شَاهَتِ الْوُجُوهْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: May the faces be humbled.

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsisting; those who carried wrong will be losers.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: طس. حم عسق. مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ. بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَا يَبْغِيَانِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: TASIN, ḤAMIM, AIN-SIN QAF. The two seas have met; there is a barrier between them so they do not mix.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: حَم
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: ḤA-MIM.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: حُمَّ الأَمْرُ وَجَاءَ النَّصْرُ فَعَلَيْنَا لا يُنْصَرُوْن
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The issue is heated. Victory is hoped for, and no one can defeat us.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: حم.  تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ. غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ الْعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوْلِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Ḥa-mim. The Book was descended from Allah, the All-Powerful, The All-Knowing. Forgiver of sins, Accepter of repentance, strict in punishment, infinite in bounty. There is no god but Him; to Him is the final destination.

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ بابُنَا. تَبَارَكَ حِيطَانُنَا. يس سَقْفُنا. كَهَيَعَصَ كِفايَتُنَا. حَم عَسِقَ حِمَـايَتُنَـا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Bismillah is our door; Surat Tabarak is our walls; Surat Yasin is our roof; Surat Kaf-Ha-Ya-ain-Ṣad is our sufficiency; Surat Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf is our protection.

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Allah will suffice you against them; He is the Most Hearing and Knowledgeable.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: سِتْرُ العَرْشِ مَسْبُولٌ عَلَيْنَا. وَعَيْنُ اللهِ نَاظِرَةٌ إِلَيْنَا.  بِحَوْلِ اللهِ لاَ يُقْدَرُ عَلَيْنَا. وَاللَّهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِمْ مُحِيْطٌ. بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ.  فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The veil of the Throne is lowered upon us. The eye of Allah is looking at us. By the power of Allah, they will not be able to defeat us. Allah is All-Embracing beyond their reach. Nay, it is a glorious Quran in a preserved tablet.

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: فَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Allah is the best protector. He is the Most Merciful of the Merciful.

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِينَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: My Guardian is Allah Who descends the Book; He cares for the Righteous.

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: حَسْبِي اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Allah is my sufficiency; there is no god but Him. On Him I rely; He is the Lord of the Great Throne.

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيءٌ في الأَرْضِ وَلَا في السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ العَليْم
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing may harm in earth or in heaven; He is the Most Hearing and All Knowing.

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ الله التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِالله العَلِيِّ العَظِيْم
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: No power, or strength, except by Allah, the Most High and Great.

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: وَصَلّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّم
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: Allah bless Honourable Muhammad, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِين * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: Glorified is your Lord; the Lord of Honour above what they describe. Peace be on the Prophets. All Praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all universe.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ الله
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I ask Allah for forgiveness!
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullāh

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ الله الْعَظِيْمَ الَّذِي لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهْ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: I ask Allah, the Almighty, Whom there is NO God but Him; and I repent to Him!
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullāh al-‘Azīm al-Ladhī Lā Ilāha Illā Huwa al-Ḥayy al-Qayyūm wa Atūbu ilayh

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: There is NO God but Allah.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā Ilāha Illā Allāh

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللهِ، صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَآلِهِ وَسَلَّمْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Our Most Honorable Muhammad is the Messenger of Allah; may Allah shower him with His Blessing and Peace
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Sayyidinā Muḥammadin Rasūlu Allāh, Ṣallā Allāh ʿalayh wa Ālih wa Sallam

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ أَنْتَ السَّلَامُ، وَمِنْكَ السَّلَامُ، تَبَارَكْتَ يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامْ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are the Peace; from You comes the Peace; Most Blessed You are, the Owner of Awe and Nobleness
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma Anta as-Salām, wa Minka as-Salām, Tabārakta Yā Dhāl-Jalāli wal-Ikrām

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: سَمِعْنا وأَطَعْنا غُفْرانَكَ رَبَّنا وإلَيْكَ المَصِيرُ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: We heard and obeyed; forgive us, Lord; ultimate destination is to You
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Sami‘nā wa Aṭa‘nā Ghufrānak, Rabbānā wa ilayka al-Maṣīr

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ أَعِنَّا على ذِكرِكَ وشُكرِكَ وحُسنِ عِبادتِكَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: O Allah help us do Dhikr and Shukr with excellence in devotion
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma A‘innā ʿalā Dhikrik wa Shukrik wa Ḥusni ʿibādatik

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah from the Accursed Devil.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu billāh min ash-Shayṭān ar-Rajīm

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَإِلَٰهُكُمْ إِلَٰهٌ وَاحِدٌ ۖ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الرَّحْمَٰنُ الرَّحِيمُ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Your God is One. No god but Him, the Most Gracious and Merciful.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ilāhukum ilāh wāḥid, Lā ilāha illā huwa ar-Raḥmān ar-Raḥīm

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ ۚ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ ۚ لَّهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ ۗ مَن ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِندَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ ۚ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ ۖ وَلَا يُحِيطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِّنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ ۚ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ ۖ وَلَا يَئُودُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا ۚ وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ.
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Allah, there is no god but Him, the Living and Self-subsisting. Neither drowse nor sleep can seize Him. Unto Him belong whatever is in the heavens and in earth. No one can intercede except by His permission. He knows what happens to them in this world and in the Hereafter. They will never compass anything of His knowledge except what He wills. His Chair accommodates heavens and earth; and it is not difficult for Him to keep them. He is the Most High and Great.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāh Lā ilāha illā huwa al-Ḥayy al-Qayyūm. Lā ta’khudhuhu sinatan wa lā nawmun, Lahu mā fī as-samāwāt wa mā fī al-‘arḍ. Man dhā al-ladhī yashfa’u ‘indahu illā bi-idhnihi. Ya’lamu mā bayna aydeehim wamā khalfahum, wa lā yuḥīṭūna bishay’in min ‘ilmihi illā bimā shā’. Wasi’a kursīyuhu as-samāwāt wal-‘arḍ, wa lā ya’ūdūhu ḥifẓuhumā, wa huwa al-‘Aliyy al-‘Azīm

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ.  اللَّهُ الصَّمَدُ. لَمْ يَلِدْ وَلَمْ يُولَدْ. وَلَمْ يَكُنْ لَهُ كُفُوًا أَحَدٌ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful. “Say He is Allah, the Only. Allah the Absolute Master. He begets not nor is He begotten; none is His like.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul huwa Allāhū ahad, Allāh as-Samād, Lam yalid wa lam yūlad, wa lam yakun lahu kufu’ā ahad

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ. مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ غَاسِقٍ إِذَا وَقَبَ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ النَّفَّاثَاتِ فِي الْعُقَدِ. وَمِنْ شَرِّ حَاسِدٍ إِذَا حَسَد
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful “Say I seek refuge in the Lord of the daybreak, from the evil of created things, and from the evil of the darkness as it overspreads, and from the mischief of the witchcrafts, and from the evil of the envier as he practices envy.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul a’ūdhu birabbi al-falaq, min sharri mā khalaq, wa min sharri ghāsiqin idhā waqab, wa min sharri an-naffāthāti fī al-‘uqad, wa min sharri ḥāsidin idhā ḥasad

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ. مَلِكِ النَّاسِ. إِلَٰهِ النَّاسِ. مِنْ شَرِّ الْوَسْوَاسِ الْخَنَّاسِ. الَّذِي يُوَسْوِسُ فِي صُدُورِ النَّاسِ. مِنَ الْجِنَّةِ وَالنَّاسِ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, Most Gracious and Merciful. Say I seek refuge in the Lord of humankind, the King of humankind, the God of humankind, from the evil of the withdrawing whisperers who whispers in the hearts of humankind; and from the evil of the Jinn and humankind.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Qul a’ūdhu birabbi an-nās, Maliki an-nās, Ilāhi an-nās, min sharri al-waswās al-khannās, al-ladhī yuwaswisu fī ṣudūri an-nās, mina al-jinnati wa an-nās

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَإِنْ مِنْ شَيْءٍ إِلَّا يُسَبِّحُ بِحَمْدِهِ. سُبْحَانَكَ يا عَلِيُّ يا عَظِيمْ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Everything is glorifying Him with praise. Glorified are You, the High and Great.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa in min shay’in illā yusabbihu biḥamdiḥ, Subḥānaka yā ‘Alīyyu yā ‘Aẓīm

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ الله
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Glorified is Allah.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Subḥān Allāh

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: اَلْحَمْدُ لِلَّه
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Praise is due to Allah.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-ḥamdu lillāh

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَر
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhu Akbar

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللهُ أَكْبَرْ كَبِيْرًا وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ كَثِيرًا، وَسُبْحَانَ اللهِ وَبِحَمْدِهِ بُكْرَةً وَأَصِيلاً
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Allah is Absolutely Greater; praise is abundantly due to Allah. Glorified is Allah with praise on day and night.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhu Akbar kabīran, wal-ḥamdu lillāh kathīran, wa subḥān Allāh wa biḥamdiḥ bukratan wa aṣīlā

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: أفضَلُ الذِّكْرِ وَالْقَولِ لاَ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ وَحْدَهُ لاَ شَرِيكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الْحَمْدُ، وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The best Dhikr and the best say is “No god but Allah alone; with no associate. To Him belong the Dominion and Praise. He is the All-Arranging.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Afḍalu adh-dhikri wal-qawli Lā ilāha illā Allāh waḥdahu lā sharīka lahu, lahu al-mulku walahu al-ḥamdu, wa huwa ‘alā kulli shay’in qadīr

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels [continually] extend their blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Innā Allāha wamala’ikatuhu yuṣallūna ‘alā an-nabī, yā ayyuhā al-ladhīna āmanū ṣallū ‘alayhi wasallimū taslīmā

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Honorable Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli wa sallim wa bārik ‘alā sayyidinā Muḥammad wa ‘alā ālihi ‘adada kamā Lillāh wa kamā yalīqu bikamālihi

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى أَسْعَدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Most Fortunate Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli wa sallim wa bārik ‘alā as‘adīnā Muḥammad wa ‘alā ālihi ‘adada kamā Lillāh wa kamā yalīqu bikamālihi

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ وَبَارِكْ عَلَى نُوْرِ الْهُدَىْ مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ عَدَدَ كَمَا لِلَّهِ وَكَمَا يَلِيْقُ بِكَمَالِهِ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: O, Allah, bless and save our Ultimate Guide Muhammad and his Folks as much as what belongs to Allah, and as befits his perfection.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli wa sallim wa bārik ‘alā nūr al-hudā Muḥammad wa ‘alā ālihi ‘adada kamā Lillāh wa kamā yalīqu bikamālihi

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: فاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّا الله
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Recognize that there is no god but Allah.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa‘lam annahu Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: No God but Allah.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāh

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُوْلُ الله
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: No God but Allah. Our Honourable Mohammad is the Messenger of Allah.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā ilāha illā Allāh sayyidunā Muḥammadun Rasūlu Allāh

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Your Lord proclaimed that if you call Me, I will respond to you.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qāla rabbukum ud‘ūnī astajib lakum

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Peace and Blessing on our Most Honorable Muhammad, and his Folks and Companions.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala Sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ يا عَليُّ يا عَظيمُ يا حَلِيمُ يا عَلِيمُ. أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَعِلْمُكَ حَسْبِي. فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ رَبِّي وَنِعْمَ الحَسْبُ حَسْبي
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh, Allah, Oh Most High, Oh Great, Oh Tolerant, and All-Knowing. You are my Lord; Your Knowledge is my sufficiency. How perfect is my Lord and my sufficiency.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma ya 'Aliyyu ya 'Azim ya Halim ya 'Alim. Anta rabbi wa 'ilmuka hasbi. Fani'ma rabbu rabbi wa ni'ma al-hasbu hasbi

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: تَنْصُرُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَأنْتَ العَزيزُ الرَّحِيمُ. نَسْألُكَ العِصْمَةَ فِي الحَرَكاتِ والسَّـكَنَـاتِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ والْإِرَادَاتِ وَالْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَ الشُكُوكِ والظُّنونِ والأوْهـَامِ السَّـاتِرَةِ للقُلُوبِ عنْ مُطَالَعَةِ الغُيُوبِ. فَقَدْ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: You give support to whom You choose; You are the Almighty and the Merciful. We ask Your protection throughout our motions and rest, in utterances, desires, and our thoughts from doubts, and suspicion, and the illusions that veil our hearts from the perception of the unseen. Truly have the Believers been really tested, and deeply shaken.(33:11).
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Tansuru man tashaoo wa anta al-'Azizu ar-Rahim. Nas'aluka al-'Ismata fi al-harakat wa as-sakanat wa al-kalimati wa al-iradat wa al-khatarat min ash-shukooki wa adhdhanooni wa al-awham as-satirat li-quloobina 'an mutala'ati al-ghuyub. Faqad abtuliya al-mu'minoona wa zulzilu zulzalan shadidan

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَّرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ إِلَّا غُرُورًا.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The Hypocrites, and the sick-hearted, would say “Allah and His Messenger did not promise us other than delusion (33:12).
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ith yaqulu al-munafiqoona wal-ladhina fi quloobihim maradun ma wa'adana Allahu wa Rasuluhu illa ghurooran

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَثَبِّتْنَا وانْصُرْنَا وسَخِّرْ لَنَا هَذَا البَحْرَ كَمَا سخَّرْتَ البَحْرَ لمُوْسَى. وسَخَّرْتَ النَارَ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ. وسَخَّرْتَ الجِبَالَ والحَدِيْدَ لِدَاوُدَ. وَسَخَّرْتَ الرِّيحَ والشَّيَاطِينَ والجِنَّ لِسُلَيْمَانَ.  وَسَخِّرْ لَنَا كُلَّ بَحْرٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي الأرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ. وَبَـحْرَ الدُّنْياَ وَبـَحْرَ الآخِرةِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: So, hold us on track, support us; and employ for us this ocean the way You employed the ocean for Musa; the fire for Ibrahim; the mountains and iron for Dawūd; and the wind, the demons and jinn for Solomon. Employ for us every ocean (means and trigger) that belongs to You, on the earth, or heavens, in the Seen or the Unseen worlds, as well as the ocean of this life and the ocean of the Afterlife.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Fathabbitna wa ansurna wa sakhkhir lana hatha al-bahra kama sakhkharta al-bahra limusa. Wa sakhkharta an-nara li-ibrahim. Wa sakhkharta al-jibala wal-hadida lidawuda. Wa sakhkharta ar-rih wa ash-shayateena wal-jinna lisulaymana. Wa sakhkhir lana kulla bahrin huwa laka fi al-ardhi wa as-sama'i wal-mulki wal-malakooti. Wa bahr ad-dunya wa bahr al-akhirati

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَسَخِّرْ لَنا كُلَّ شَيءٍ يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيءٍ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Employ for us everything; oh You in whose hand is the true control of everything.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sakhkhir lana kulla shay'in ya man biyadihi malakootu kulla shay'in

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: كَهَيَعَصَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: KAF-HA-YA-AIN-SAD.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ain-Sad

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اُنْصُرْنا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ النَّاصِرِيْن. * وافْتَحْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الفَاتِحِيْن * واغْفِرْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الغَافِرْين * وارْحَمْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْن * وارْزُقْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِيْن * واهْدِنَا وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ القَوْمِ الظَّالمِيْن * وَهَبْ لَنَا رِيْحَاً طَيِّبَةً كَمَا هِيَ في عِلْمِكَ. وانْشُرْهَا عَلَيْنَا مِنْ خَزائِنِ رَحْمَتِكَ. واحْمِلْناَ بِهَا حَمْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ مَعَ السَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيَةِ فِي الدِّيْنِ والدُّنْيَا والآخِرَةِ. إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لَنَا أُمُوْرَنَا مَعَ الرَّاحَةِ لِقُلُوبِنَا وأبْدَانِنَا. والسَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيةِ فِي دِيْنِنَا ودُنْيَانَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Support us; You are the best of supporters. Open the doors of opportunities to us; You are the best of Openers. Forgive us; You are the best of Forgivers. Have mercy on us; You are the Most Merciful. Give us sustenance; You are the best Sustainer. Guide us and save us from the wrongdoers. Grant us a goodly wind as may be in Your knowledge; and release it upon us from the storehouses of Your Mercy; carry us with this wind honourably with safety, protection and wellbeing in our religion in this world and the world to come. Truly You the All-Arranging. Allah, facilitate our affairs for us with ease for our hearts and bodies and security and wellbeing in our worldly life and religion.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Unsur-na fa innaka khayru an-nasireen. Waftah lana fa innaka khayru al-fateheen. Waghfir lana fa innaka khayru al-ghaafireen. Warhamna fa innaka khayru ar-raahimeen. Warzuqna fa innaka khayru ar-raazikeen. Wahdina wa najjina min al-qawmi az-zalimeen. Wahab lana riihan tayyibatan kama hiya fi 'ilmika. Unshurha 'alayna min khazaa'ini rahmatika. Wahmilna biha hamla al-karaamati ma'a as-salaamati wal-'aafiyah fi ad-deen wa ad-dunya wa al-akhirah. Inna ka 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer. Allahumma yassir lana umoorana ma'a ar-raa'hati li-quloobina wa abdaamina. Was-salaamati wal-'aafiyati fi deenina wa dunyanaa

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَنَا صَاحِبَاً فِي سَفَرِنَا.  وَخَلِيْفَةً فِي أَهْلِنَا. وَاطْمِسْ عَلَى وُجُوهِ أَعْدَائِنَا وامْسَخْهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهمْ فَلاَ يَسْتَطِيْعُونَ المُضِيَّ وَلاَ المَجِيءَ إلَيْنا
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Be our companion in our journeys, and keep watch over our families that we leave behind. Blind the faces of our enemies and paralyze them in places where they stand so they can neither move nor reach us.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa kun lana saahiban fi safarina. Wa khalifatan fi ahlina. Wamtis 'ala wujoohi a'da'ina wa msikh'hum 'ala makaanatihim falaa yasta'tee'oona al-mudee wa laa al-majeea ilaayna

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَى أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّى يُبْصِرُونَ.  وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: If We had so willed, We would have obliterated their eyes; and they would race for the path but how could they see?
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaw nashaa'u latamassna 'ala a'yunihim fastabaqoo as-sirata fa anna yubseeroon. Walaw nashaa'u lamasakhnahum 'ala makaanatihim fama asta'too mudiyyan wa laa yarji'oon

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: شَاهَتِ الْوُجُوهْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: May the faces be humbled.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Shāhatil wujūh

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsisting; those who carried wrong will be losers.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa 'anatil wujūhoo lil-ḥayyil qayyūmi wa qad khāba man ḥamala ẓulman

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: طس. حم عسق. مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ. بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَا يَبْغِيَانِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: TASIN, ḤAMIM, AIN-SIN QAF. The two seas have met; there is a barrier between them so they do not mix.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Tā-Sīn, Ḥāmīm, 'Ayn-Sīn Qāf. Maraja al-baḥrayni yaltaqiyān. Baynahumā barzakhu la yabghiyān

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: حَم
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: ḤA-MIM.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥām

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: حُمَّ الأَمْرُ وَجَاءَ النَّصْرُ فَعَلَيْنَا لا يُنْصَرُوْن
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The issue is heated. Victory is hoped for, and no one can defeat us.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥumma al-amru wa jā'a an-naṣru fa'alaynā lā yunsarūn

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: حم.  تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ. غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ الْعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوْلِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Ḥa-mim. The Book was descended from Allah, the All-Powerful, The All-Knowing. Forgiver of sins, Accepter of repentance, strict in punishment, infinite in bounty. There is no god but Him; to Him is the final destination.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥāmīm. Tanzīlu al-kitābi mina Allāhi al-‘Azīzi al-‘Alīmi. Ghāfiri ad-dhanbi wa Qābili at-tawbi shadīdi al-‘iqābi dhī at-ṭawli lā ilāha illā huwa ilayhi al-maṣīru

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ بابُنَا. تَبَارَكَ حِيطَانُنَا. يس سَقْفُنا. كَهَيَعَصَ كِفايَتُنَا. حَم عَسِقَ حِمَـايَتُنَـا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Bismillah is our door; Surat Tabarak is our walls; Surat Yasin is our roof; Surat Kaf-Ha-Ya-ain-Ṣad is our sufficiency; Surat Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf is our protection.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi bābunā. Tabāraka ḥīṭānunā. Yā-Sīn saqfunā. Kaf-Hā-Yā-‘Ayn-Ṣād kifāyatunā. Ḥām ‘Ayn-Sīn-Qāf ḥimāyatunā

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Allah will suffice you against them; He is the Most Hearing and Knowledgeable.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Fasayakfīkahumu Allāhu wa huwa as-Samī‘u al-‘Alīmu

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: سِتْرُ العَرْشِ مَسْبُولٌ عَلَيْنَا. وَعَيْنُ اللهِ نَاظِرَةٌ إِلَيْنَا.  بِحَوْلِ اللهِ لاَ يُقْدَرُ عَلَيْنَا. وَاللَّهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِمْ مُحِيْطٌ. بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ.  فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The veil of the Throne is lowered upon us. The eye of Allah is looking at us. By the power of Allah, they will not be able to defeat us. Allah is All-Embracing beyond their reach. Nay, it is a glorious Quran in a preserved tablet.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Sitrul ‘Arshi masbūlun ‘alaynā. Wa ‘Aynu Allāhi Nāẓiratun ilaynā. Biḥawli Allāhi lā yuqdar ‘alaynā. Wa Allāhu min warā’ihim muḥīṭun. Bal huwa Qur’ānun Majīdun. Fī Lawḥin Maḥfūẓin

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: فَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Allah is the best protector. He is the Most Merciful of the Merciful.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa-Allāhu khayrun ḥāfiẓan wa huwa Arḥamu ar-Rāḥimīn

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِينَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: My Guardian is Allah Who descends the Book; He cares for the Righteous.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna walīyyī Allāhu allathee nazzala al-kitāba wa huwa yatwallya aṣ-ṣāliḥīn

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: حَسْبِي اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Allah is my sufficiency; there is no god but Him. On Him I rely; He is the Lord of the Great Throne.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥasbī Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa ‘alayhi tawakkaltu wa huwa rabbu al-‘Arshi al-‘Aẓīm

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيءٌ في الأَرْضِ وَلَا في السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ العَليْم
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing may harm in earth or in heaven; He is the Most Hearing and All Knowing.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi alladhī lā yaḍurru ma'a ismihi shay'un fī al-arḍi wa lā fī as-samā'i wa huwa as-Samī'u al-‘Alīm

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ الله التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu bikalimāti Allāhi at-tammāti min sharri mā khalaq

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِالله العَلِيِّ العَظِيْم
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: No power, or strength, except by Allah, the Most High and Great.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa lā ḥawla wa lā quwwata illā billāhi al-‘Alīyi al-‘Aẓīm
