wird_id_8.en_wird_description: The litany of this Qadiri Shadhili order is for the seeker of Allah to invoke in the morning and evening
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna wīrda hādhihi at-Ṭarīqah al-Qādiriyyah ash-Shādhiliyyah an yaqūla al-Murīd ṣabāḥan masā’an.

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ السَّمِيْعِ العَلِيْمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيْمِ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah the All-Hearing and All-Seeing from the Accursed Shaytan
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu Billāhi as-Samī‘i al-‘Alīm min ash-Shayṭān ar-Rajīm.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَمَا تُقَدِّمُوا لِأَنْفُسِكُمْ مِنْ خَيْرٍ تَجِدُوهُ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ هُوَ خَيْرًا وَأَعْظَمَ أَجْرًا وَاسْتَغْفِرُوا اللَّهَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Whatever good you send before you for yourselves, you will certainly find it with Allah as better and greater in reward. Ask the forgiveness of Allah; surely Allah is All-Forgiving, All-Merciful.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa mā tuqaddimū li-anfusikum min khayrin tajidūhū ‘ind Allāh huwa khayran wa a‘ẓama ajrā, wa-istaġfirū Allāh inna Allāh Ghafūr raḥīm.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ تَقُولُ أسْتَغْفرُ اللهَ (99 مَرَّة)
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Then you say “I ask Allah for forgiveness” (99 times).
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqūl Asṭaghfirullāh (99 marrā)

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وفِي تَمَامِ المِائَةِ تَقُوْلُ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: On the 100th, you say:
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa fī tamām al-mī’ah taqūl.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: اسْتَغْفِرُ اللهَ العَظِيْمَ الَّذِي لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّاْ هُوَ الحَيَّ القَيُّوْمَ وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: I ask forgiveness of Allah, the Great, Whom there is no god but Him, the Living and Self-subsistent. And I repent to Him.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfirullāh al-‘Aẓīm al-ladhī Lā Ilāha Illā Huwa al-Ḥayy al-Qayyūm wa atūbu ilayh.

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: ثم تقرأ قوله تعالى:
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Then you recite Allah's saying:
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqrā qawluhu ta‘ālā:

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Allah sends His blessings on the Prophet; and also His angels too. O, you who believe! Send your prayers for him and submit unconditionally to him.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna Allāh wa malā’ikatahu yuṣallūna ‘alā an-Nabī, Yā ayyuhā al-ladhīna āmanū, ṣallū ‘alayh wa sallimū taslīmā.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: ثم تقول:
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Then you say:
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqūl:

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: الَّلهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ عَبْدِكَ وَرَسُوْلِكَ النَّبِيِّ الْأُمِّيِّ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ (99 مرة)
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: O, Allah, extend Your prayers and blessings on our Most Honourable Mohammad, Your Servant and Messenger, the Unlettered Prophet, and on his Folks and Companions (99 times)
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā Sayyidinā Muḥammadin ‘Abdika wa Rasūlika an-Nabī al-‘Ummī wa ‘alā ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallim (99 marrā).

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: في تمام المائة تقول: تَسْلِيْمَاً كَثِيْرَاً بِقَدْرِ عَظَمَةِ ذَاْتِكَ فِيْ كُلِّ وَقْتٍ وَحِيْنٍ.
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Then on the 100th you say, “so much as befits Your Essence at every time and moment.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Fī tamām al-mī’ah taqūl: Taslīmāً kathīrāً biqadr ‘aẓamatī dhātika fī kulli waqtin wa ḥīn.

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ تَقْرَأُ قَوْلَهُ تَعَالَى (فَاعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا إِلَٰهَ إِلَّا اللَّهُ)
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: Then you recite Allahs saying (Know that no god is there but Allah)
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqrā qawluhu ta‘ālā: (Fa‘lam annahu Lā Ilāha Illā Allāh).

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ تَقُوْلُ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Then you say
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqūl.

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّاْ اللهُ وَحْدَهُ لَاْ شَرِيْكَ لَهُ. لَهُ الْمُلْكُ وَلَهُ الحَمْدُ وُهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيْرٌ (99 مرة)
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: Then you say “No god but Allah, Alone, with no associate; to Him belongs the dominion and praise. He inspires life and claims souls. He is powerful over everything.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā Ilāha Illā Allāh waḥdah, Lā Sharīka Lahu, Lahu al-Mulk wa Lahu al-Ḥamd wa huwa ‘alā kulli shay’in qadīr (99 marrā).

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: لَاْ إِلَهَ إِلَّا اللهُ. سَيِّدُنَا مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُوْلُ اللهِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمْ
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: No god but Allah. Our Honorable Mohammad, Peace and Blessings be upon him, is the Messenger of Allah
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Lā Ilāha Illā Allāh. Sayyidinā Muḥammad Rasūlullāh, Ṣallā Allāhu ‘alayh wa Sallam.

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ تَقْرَأُ سُوْرَةَ الإِخْلَاْصِ 3 مَرَّاتٍ، ثُمَّ تَقْرَأُ سُوْرَةَ الفَاتِحَةِ مَرَّة وَاحِدَةً، ثُمَّ تَدْعُو اللهَ لَكَ وَلِشَيْخِكَ وَلِأَهْلِكَ وَإِخْوَانِكَ وَالمُسْلِمِيْن
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: Then you read the Ikhlas surah 3 times, and Al-Fatiha surah one time, and then you make duaa for yourself, your Shaykh, your family, brothers and all Muslims.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma taqrā’ Sūrat al-Ikhlāṣ thalāth marāt, thumma taqrā’ Sūrat al-Fātiḥah marratan wāḥidah, thumma tad‘ū Allāh laka wa li-shaykhika wa li-ahlika wa li-ikhwānika wa al-Muslimīn.

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: إِخْوَانِي، العَهْدُ الَّذِي بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَكُمْ تَقْوَى اللهِ تَعَاْلَى وَالمُحَافَظَةِ عَلَى الصَّلَوَاْتِ وَكَثْرَةِ ذِكْرِ اللهِ تَعَالَى. وأَنَّ النَّاجِيَ مِنَّا يَأخُذُ بِيَدِ أَخِيْهِ إِنْ شَاءَ الله
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: Brothers, the pledge between us is to commit to the mindfulness of Allah, keeping of our prayers, and making lots of remembrance of Allah Most High, and that the survivor of us shall take by the hand of his other brother God willing.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Ikhwānī, al-‘Ahd al-ladhī baynanā wa baynakum taqwā Allāh ta‘ālā wa al-muḥāfaẓah ‘alā aṣ-Ṣalawāt wa kathrat Dhikr Allāh ta‘ālā. Wa ann an-Nājī minnā yakhudh biyadī akhīh in-shā’ Allāh.

wird_sub_cat_id_2.wird_sub_cat_title_en: Principles of the Way to Allah

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: واعْلَمْ أَنَّهُ لَا ُبدَّ لِمُرِيدي الْحَقِّ تَعَالَى مِنَ الْاْلتِزَامِ بِمَبَادِئَ سِتَّة، وَهِيَ: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ، وَمُجَاهَدَةُ النَّفْسِ، والذِّكْرُ، والْمُذَاكَرَةُ، والْحُبُّ والرابطة الروحية
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Seekers of God must observe six principles on their way to God. 1 Seeking knowledge,2 Self-discipline, 3 Dhikr, 4 Sharing thoughts with Shaykh, 5 Love 6 Spiritual connection.

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: طَلَبُ الْعِلْمِ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Seeking Knowledge

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: أكَّدَ رَبُّنَا عَزَّ وَجَلَّ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ هُنَاكَ أيَّ مُسَاوَاةٍ بَيْنَ أَهْلِ الْعِلْمِ وَغَيْرِهِمْ. وَقَدْ بَشَّرَ النَّبِيُّ بِأَنَّ مَنْ سَلَكَ طَرِيقَاً يَلْتَمِسُ فِبْهِ عِلْمَا سَهَّلَ اللهُ لَهُ طَريقَا إلى الْجَنَّة
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Allah Almighty declares that those who have knowledge cannot be held equal to those who do not.  The Prophet confirmed that whoever starts on a path to seek knowledge, Allah will put on a path to Paradise.

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: لذلك على المريد أن يجتهد في طلب العلم بالله تعالى أولا حتى يزكو القلب. وعلم توحيد الله تعالى لا بد منه لكل سالك يطلب الحق تبارك وتعالى
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: So, seekers of the Divine are expected to attain more knowledge about Allah, whereby the hearts are purified. This knowledge [`ILM] is critical to your journey of seeking the Ultimate Truth Most High.

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: مجاهدة النفس
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Self Discipline

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: لقد أكد الحق تبارك وتعالى بأنه سوف يهدي الذين جاهدوا أنفسهم من أجله إلى الطريق الموصلة إليه تعالى. وقد جعل هذه المجاهدة نظيرا لإتقان العبادة فسمى أهل تلك المجاهدة بـ 'المحسنين' وأكد بانه معهم. فقال تعالى 'وَالَّذِينَ جَاهَدُوا فِينَا لَنَهْدِيَنَّهُمْ سُبُلَنَا ۚ وَإِنَّ اللَّهَ لَمَعَ الْمُحْسِنِينَ' وقد أكد النبي أن الجهاد الأكبر هو جهاد النفس
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Allah Almighty ascertained that He will guide those who strive to keep themselves on the path of Allah Most High; He called them ‘people of excellence’, and ascertained being WITH them.  Further, the Prophet declared that the bigger Struggle [Jihad] is that against our ego [nafs].

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: لا بد للسالك من تزكية نفسه، ولا تحصل التزكية إلا بمجاهدة النفس. وقد أكد سيدنا عبد الغني النابلسي أن تزكية النفس هي نوع من العبادة لا يتحصل إلا بالمجاهدة والعلم
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Purification of the soul is critical; we can reach this only by striving.  Our Sufi Master, Shaykh Abdul Ghani al-Nabulsi [RA] confirmed that purification of the soul is a form of Worship only reached by Strife and `ILM.

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: الذكر
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Remembrance of Allah

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: أوصانا الحق تعالى أن نذكره ذكرا كثيرا، وجعل هذا الذكر طريقا للنجاح في تحقيق المطلوب. وقد كان النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم يذكر الله في جميع أحيانه
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Allah commanded us to make lot of Dhikr of Him Most High “Oh Ye who Believe! Remember Allah much”  The Prophet used to make Dhikr at ALL times and conditions of his life.

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: لذلك، فالذكر عماد قوي للسالك إلى الحق تعالى، ولا يمكن لأحد أن يتذوق حلاوة الإنس بالله تعالى مالم يحافظ على ذكر الله تعالى في جميع أحواله. والذكر، كما قال سيدي علي الدقاق هو دليل واضح على الولاية. وهذا الذكر يشتمل قراءة الأوراد والمواظبة على حضور حلق الذكر
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Therefore, Dhikr is a strong Pillar on the Path to Almighty Allah, and nobody can attain a taste of His Presence unless one keeps remembering ALLAH all the time. Shaykh Abu Ali Daqaq [R.A] said that being continuously engaged with the Dhikr of Allah Almighty is a solid proof of sainthood [wilayah]. This Pillar includes observing the daily litanies as well as attending the Dhikr circles.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: المذاكرة
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Discussion with Shaykh

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: لقد ندبنا الحق تعالى أن نسأل أهل الذكر، كلما قصر علمنا عن شيء. وبالتالي، فإن مذاكرة المسائل التي قد تخطر ببالك مع الشيخ أو مع الإخوان المتقدمين في طريق الحق تعالى، هو مطلب لكل مريد
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: Allah Most High commanded us to “ask the people of Dhikr if we did not know” . Accordingly, discussing things that may come across mind on the way to Allah, with Shaykh or senior brothers, is a requirement for the Divine Seeker.

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: الـمَحَبَّة
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Love

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: وصف الحق تعالى الحب الذي بينه وبين المؤمنين بأنه متبادل، وليس يقتصر على طرف واحد فقط. وقد أكد النبي بأن من أحب لقاء الله أحب الله لقاءه. وقد أكد سيدنا الجنيد بأن شمائل المحبوب تدخل قلب المحب وتظهر عليه، أي أن المحبة تستأثر على قلب المريد، وتجعله في حالة تذكر ووعي دائم لمحبوبه وهو الحق تعالى. وقد أكد سيدنا الشبلي بأن المحبة سميت كذلك لأنها تخرج كل شيء من القلب ما عدا المحبوب تبارك وتعالى. لذا يتعين على المريد أن يزرع في قلبه محبة الشيخ، ومحبة النبي  ومحبة الحق تعالى، ثم محبة إخوانه في الله تعالى
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Allah Almighty described love between Him and believers as mutual.  The Prophet confirmed that ‘whoever loves to meet Allah, Allah will love to meet them as well’ . Shaykh Imam Junaid al-Baghdadi [R.A.] said that by love, the Character of the Beloved comes into the heart of the one Loving Him; that is love catches the heart of the Divine Seeker, keeping it aware of the Beloved i.e. Allah.  Imam Shibli [R.A.] said that love is named as such because it releases everything from the heart except Allah. The Divine Seeker must inculcate the love of the Shaykh, the Prophet Allah Almighty and fellow Divine Seeker brothers in heart.

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: الرابطة الروحية
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Spiritual Connection.

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: وهي الارتباط الروحي بالشيخ، والتي تبدأ في اللحظة التي يضع بها المريد يده بيد شيخه عند أخذ البيعة، ثم تستمر عند قراءة الأوراد اليومية. وكنتيجة لهذا الارتباط الروحي بالوارث المحمدي، ترتبط روح المريد بالنَّبي صلى الله عليه وسلم
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: It refers to spiritual link with Shaykh which started when the Divine Seeker put his hand with the Shaykh on taking pledge [Bay`ah] and then continuously reciting the daily litany. Because of this connection, the Divine Seeker becomes connected to the Prophet Peace be upon him.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعوذُ باللهِ من الشيْطانِ الرَّجيْمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah from the accursed Shaytan.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu billāh min ash-Shayṭān ar-Rajīm

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ ۚ يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels [continually] extend their blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna Allāh wa malā’ikatahu yuṣallūna ‘alā an-Nabī. Yā ayyuhā al-ladhīna āmanū, ṣallū ‘alayh wa sallimū taslīmā

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَىْ سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وآلِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: O, Allah, extend Your prayers on our Most Honourable Mohammad and his Family.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma ṣalli ‘alā Sayyidinā Muḥammadin wa ālihi wa sallim

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اَسْتَغْفِرُ الله الْعَظِيمَ الَّذِي لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ، الْحَيَّ الْقَيُّومَ غَفَّارَ الذُّنُوبِ ذَا الْجَلاَلِ وَالإِكْرَامِ، وَأَتُوبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ جَمِيعِ الْمَعَاصِي كُلِّهَا وَالذُّنُوبِ وَالآثَامِ، وَمِنْ كُلِّ ذَنْبٍ أَذْنَبْتُهُ عَمْداً وَخَطَأً ظَاهِراً وَبَاطِناً قَوْلاً وَفِعْلاً، فِي جَمِيعِ حَرَكَاتِي وَسَكَنَاتِي وَخَطَرَاتِي وَأَنْفَاسِي كُلِّهَا دَائِماً أَبَداً سَرْمَداً، مِنَ الذَّنْبِ الَّذِي أَعْلَمُ وَمِنَ الذَّنْبِ الَّذِي لاَ أَعْلَمُ، عَدَدَ مَا أَحَاطَ بِهِ الْعِلْمُ وَأَحْصَاهُ الْكِتَابُ وَخَطَّهُ الْقَلَمُ، وَعَددَ مَا أَوْجَدَتْهُ الْقُدْرَةُ وَخَصَّصَتْهُ الإِرَادَةُ، وَمِدَادَ كَلِمَاتِ الله كَمَا يَنْبَغِي لِجَلاَلِ وَجْهِ رَبِّنَا وَجَمَالِهِ وَكَمَالِهِ وكَمَا يُحِبُّ رَبُّنَا وَيَرْضَى
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek the forgiveness of Allah the Great. No god save He, the Living and Self-Subsistent, the Forgiver of sins, the Majestic and Noble. I repent to Him from all acts of disobedience, sins and offenses, and from every sin that I have committed intentionally or unintentionally, openly or in secret, in word or in action, during any motion or stillness, any thought or breath forever without end. I repent from the sin of which I am aware or not, as much as there in the Knowledge, listed in the Book, written by the Pen, and as much as the Divine Power created, the Divine Will specified, and as much as the number of Allah’s words, in a way that befits and satisfy the Majestic Countenance, beauty and perfection of Allah.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Astaghfiru Allah al-‘Azim al-ladhi la ilaha illa huwa, al-Hayy al-Qayyum Ghaffar al-Dhunub dha al-Jalal wal-Ikram, wa atubu ilayhi min jami‘ al-ma‘asi kulliha wa al-dhunub wa al-atham, wa min kulli dhanbin athnabtuhu ‘amdan wa khata’an zahiran wa batinan qawlan wa fi‘lan, fi jami‘ harakati wa sakanati wa khatarati wa anfasi kulliha da’iman abadan sarmadan, min al-dhanbi al-ladhi a‘lamu wa min al-dhanbi al-ladhi la a‘lamu, ‘adad ma ahata bihi al-‘ilm wa ahsahu al-kitab wa khattahu al-qalam, wa ‘adad ma awjadathu al-qudratu wa khassasathu al-irada, wa midad kalimat Allah kama yanbaghi li-jalali wajhi rabbina wa jamalihi wa kamalihi wa kama yuhibbu rabbuna wa yarda

wird_sub_cat_id_3.wird_sub_cat_title_en: Supplication by The Perfect Names of Allah

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: الْحَمْدُ للهِ الَّذِي تَحَمَّدَا [.....] كَلَّمَ مُوسَى وَاصْطَفَى مُحَمَّدًا
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Praise is to Allah Who praised Himself, talked to Moses and chose Muhammad .
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-hamdu lillahi alladhi tahammada [.....] kallama Musa wa ishtafa Muhammadan

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: ثُمَّ الصَّلاَةُ وَالسَّلاَمُ تُهْتَدَى [.....] لِخَيْرِ مُرْسَلٍ هَدَى وَسَدَّدَا
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Then Salawat and Salam are gifted to the Best Messenger who guided and directed.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Thumma al-salatu wa al-salam tuhtada [.....] likhayri mursalin hadha wa saddada

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: وَالآلِ وَالصَّحْبِ وَمَنْ يَهْدِيْنَا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Together with his Family and Companion and our guides.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa al-ali wa al-sahbi wa man yahdina

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: بِاسْمِ اْلإِلهِ وَبِهِ بَدَيْنَا [.....] وَلَوْ عَبَدْنَا غَيْرَهُ شَقِيْنَا
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: In the name of God; by Him we start. If we worship any other, we would be losers.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismi al-ilahi wa bihi badayna [.....] walaw abidna ghayrahu shaqina

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: يَا حَبَّذَا رَبًّا وَحَبَّ دِيْنَا [.....] وَحَبَّذَا مُحَمَّدٌ هَادِيْنَا
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Best is our Lord; best is our faith; and best is our guide Muhammad .
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya habbaza rabb'an wa habb dinana [.....] wa habbaza Muhammadan hadina

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: لَوْلاَه مَا كُنَّا وَلاَ بَقِيْنَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Had it not been for him, we would not have been started or in existence.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Law laah ma kunna wa la baqina

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللهُمَّ لَوْلاَ أَنْتَ مَا اهْتَدَيْنَا [.....] وَلاَ تَصَدَّقْنَا وَلاَ صَلّيْنَا
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: O Allah, had it not been for you, we could never have been guided, We would have never given charity or stood in prayer.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma lawla anta ma ihtadayna [.....] wa la tasaddaqna wa la sallina

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: فَأَنْزَلَنْ سَكِيْنَةً عَلَيْنَا [.....] وَثَبِّتِ الأَقْدَامَ إِنْ لاَقَيْنَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Descend tranquillity on us and make us steady when we meet enemy.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa anzilan sakina alayna [.....] wa thabbit al-aqdam in laqayna

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: نَحْنُ الْأُولَى جَاؤُوكَ مُسْلِمِيْناَ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: We are the first to come in submission to You.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Nahnu al-ula ja'uka muslimina

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَالْمُشْرِكُونَ قَدْ بَغَوْ عَلَيْنَا [.....] إِذَا أَرَادُوا فِتْنَةً أَبَيْنَا
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: The infidels have wronged us; whenever they seek trouble, we seek peace.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Wal-mushrikuna qad baghaw alayna [.....] idha araduna fitnatan abayna

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ تَدَاعَى جَمْعُهُمْ علَيْنَا [.....] طِبْقَ الْأَحَادِيثِ الَّتِي رَوَيْنَا
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: They came to attack us in great groups, as per the revelations we narrated.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Waqad tada'a jam'uhum 'alayna [.....] tiba' al-ahadith al-lati rawayna

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: فَارْدُدْهُمُ اللهُمَّ خَاسِرِيْناَ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: O Allah send them back with full loss.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Fardudhum Allahumma khasirina

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا رَحْمَانُ يَا رَحِيْمُ [.....] اللهُ يَا حَيُّ وَيَا قَيُّوم
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Gracious and Merciful O Allah the Living and Sustaining.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma ya Rahmanu ya Rahimu [.....] Allahuma ya Hayyu wa ya Qayyum

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا قَوِيُّ يَا قَدِيْمُ [.....] اللهُ يَا عَلِيُّ يَا عَظِيْمُ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Strong with No Beginning O Allah Most High and Grand.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma ya Qawiyyu ya Qadimu [.....] Allahuma ya Aliyyu ya Azimu

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: لاَ يَنْبَغِي لِلظُّلْمِ أَنْ يَعْلُونَا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Wrongfulness should never overcome us.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: La yanbagi lil-zulmi an ya'lonana

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا لَطِيْفُ يَا عَلِيْمُ [.....] اللهُ يَا رَؤُوفُ يَا حَكِيْمُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Kind and Knowledgeable O Allah Most Compassionate and Wise.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma ya Latifu ya Alimu [.....] Allahuma ya Ra'ufu ya Hakimu

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا تَوَّابُ يَا حَلِيْمُ [.....] اللهُ يَا وَهَّابُ يَا كَرِيْمُ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Absolving and TolerantO Allah Most Giving and Noble.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Tawwab Ya Halim [.....] Allahuma Ya Wahhab Ya Karim

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Gift us with the upper hand over our enemy.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Habna al-Ula wa ajil 'Idana al-Dawna

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مَالِكُ يَا مُنِيْرُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مَلِيْكُ يَا قَدِيْرُ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: O Allah the Owner and Enlightening O Allah the King and Most Powerful.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Malik Ya Munir [.....] Allahuma Ya Maliku Ya Qadir

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مَوْلَى وَيَا نَصِيْرُ [.....] اللهُ أَنْتَ الْمَلِكُ الْكَبِيْرُ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: O Allah the Sponsor and Supporter O Allah You are the Grand King.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Mawla wa Ya Nasir [.....] Allah Anta al-Malik al-Kabir

wird_id_21.en_wird_description: Our enemies are under Your control.

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا شَاكِرُ يَا شَكُورُ [.....] اللهُ يَا عَفُوُّ يَا غَفُورُ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Grateful and Rewarding O Allah Most Pardoning and Forgiving.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Shakir Ya Shakur [.....] Allahuma Ya 'Afuww Ya Ghafur

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا عَالِمُ يَا خَبِيْرُ [.....] اللهُ يَا فَتَّاحُ يَا بَصِيْرُ
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Knowledgeable and Expert O Allah Most Opening and Sightful.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya 'Alim Ya Khabir [.....] Allahuma Ya Fattah Ya Basir

wird_id_24.en_wird_description: Do not prevent us from Your Grand Opening.

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا ظَاهِرُ يَا جَلِيْلُ [.....] اللهُ يَا بَاطِنُ يَا وَكِيْلُ
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Apparent and Awe-inspiring O Allah Most Hidden and Trustworthy.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Zahir Ya Jalil [.....] Allahuma Ya Batin Ya Wakil

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا صَادِقُ يَا جَمِيْلُ [.....] اللهُ يَا حَافِظُ يَا كَفِيْلُ
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Truthful and Beatiful O Allah Most Keeping and Guarding.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Sadiq Ya Jamil [.....] Allahuma Ya Hafiz Ya Kafil

wird_id_27.ar_wird_transliteration: Kun Hafizan Lana wa Kun Mu'ina

wird_id_28.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا غَنِيُّ يَا حَمِيْدُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مُغْنِي وَيَا رَشِيْدُ
wird_id_28.en_wird_description: O Allah the Most Rich and Praiseworth O Allah Most Enriching and Wise.
wird_id_28.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Ghaniyy Ya Hamid [.....] Allahuma Ya Mughni wa Ya Rashid

wird_id_29.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مُبْدِئُ يَا مُعِيْدُ [.....] اللهُ يَا عَزِيْزُ يَا مَجِيْدُ
wird_id_29.en_wird_description: O Allah the Starter and Returner O Allah the Mighty and Glorified.
wird_id_29.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Mubdi' Ya Mu'id [.....] Allahuma Ya Aziz Ya Majid

wird_id_30.en_wird_description: No one can glorify Your oneness enough.

wird_id_31.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا قَادِرُ يَا مُقْتَدِرُ [.....] اللهُ يَا قَاهِرُ يَا مُؤَخِّرُ
wird_id_31.en_wird_description: O Allah Most Able and Resourceful O Allah Most Defeating and Delaying.
wird_id_31.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Qadir Ya Muqtadir [.....] Allahuma Ya Qahir Ya Mu'akhkhir

wird_id_32.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا فَاطِرُ يَا مُصَوِّرُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مُحْصِي وَيَا مُدَبِّرُ
wird_id_32.en_wird_description: O Allah the Innovator and Fashioner O Allah the Reckoner and Resolver.
wird_id_32.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Fatr Ya Musawwir [.....] Allahuma Ya Muhsi wa Ya Mudabbir

wird_id_33.en_wird_description: Resolve our issues and destroy our enemies.

wird_id_34.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا دَائِمُ لاَ يَمُوتُ [.....] اللهُ يَا قَائِمُ لاَ يَفُوتُ
wird_id_34.en_wird_description: O Allah the Everlasting Who never dies O Allah the Upholding Who never drop.
wird_id_34.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Daimu La Yamutu [.....] Allahuma Ya Qaimu La Yafutu

wird_id_35.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مُحْيِي وَيا َمُمِيْتُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مُغِيْثُ يَا مُقِيْتُ
wird_id_35.en_wird_description: O Allah the Life-giver, the Soul Claimer O Allah the Rescue, and Nourisher.
wird_id_35.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Muhyi wa Ya Mumitu [.....] Allahuma Ya Mughithu Ya Muqit

wird_id_36.en_wird_description: Help us and be our Strongest Protection.

wird_id_37.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا بَاسِطُ أَنْتَ الْوَاسِعُ [.....] اللهُ يَا قَابِضُ أَنْتَ الْمَانِعُ
wird_id_37.en_wird_description: O Allah the Expander, You are the Expansive O Allah the Contractor, You are the Withholder.
wird_id_37.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Basitu Anta al-Wasi'u [.....] Allahuma Ya Qabidu Anta al-Maniu

wird_id_38.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا خَالِقُ أَنْتَ الْجَامِعُ [.....] اللهُ يَا خَافِضُ أَنْتَ الرَّافِعُ
wird_id_38.en_wird_description: O Allah the Abaser, You are the Elevator O Allah the Creator, You are the Joiner.
wird_id_38.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Khaliqu Anta al-Jami'u [.....] Allahuma Ya Khafidu Anta al-Rafi'u

wird_id_39.en_wird_description: Elevate our ranks to the highest.

wird_id_40.ar_wird_description: اللهُ ذُو الْمَعَارِجِ الرَّفِيْعُ [.....] اللهُ يَا وَافِي وَيَا سَرِيْعُ
wird_id_40.en_wird_description: O Allah You have endlessly high ranks O Allah Most Responding and Fast.
wird_id_40.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Dhul-Ma'ariji ar-Rafi'u [.....] Allahuma Ya Wafi wa Ya Saree'u

wird_id_41.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا كَافِي وَيَا سَمِيْعُ [.....] يَا نُورُ يَا هَادِى وَيَا بَدِيْع
wird_id_41.en_wird_description: O the Light, the Guide and Peerless.
wird_id_41.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Kafi wa Ya Sami'u [.....] Ya Nur Ya Hadi wa Ya Badi'u

wird_id_42.en_wird_description: You have disciplined us; what happened is enough!.

wird_id_43.ar_wird_description: اللهُ ذُو الجَلَالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ [.....] اللهُ ذُو الطَّوْلِ عَلَى الدَّوَامِ
wird_id_43.en_wird_description: O Allah, the Awe-inspiring and Noble O Allah Most Rich over time.
wird_id_43.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Dhul-Jalali wal-Ikrami [.....] Allahuma Dhul-Tawli 'Ala al-Dawami

wird_id_44.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا ذَا الْفَضْلِ وَالْإِنْعَامِ [.....] وَالسَّيِّدُ الْمُطْلَقُ لِلْأَنَامِ
wird_id_44.en_wird_description: O Allah the Source of all favours and blessings. The Ultimate Master of People.
wird_id_44.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Dhal-Fadli wal-In'ami [.....] wa al-Sayyidu al-Mutlaq li al-Anami

wird_id_45.en_wird_description: Have mercy on slaves worshiping You.

wird_id_46.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا أَوَّلُ أَنْـت َالْوَاحِدُ [.....] اللهُ يَا آخِرُ أَنْتَ الرَّاشِدُ
wird_id_46.en_wird_description: O Allah You are First and the One O Allah You are the Last and Wise.
wird_id_46.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Awwalu Anta al-Wahidu [.....] Allahuma Ya Akhiru Anta al-Rashidu

wird_id_47.ar_wird_description: يَا وِتْرُ يَا مُتَكَبِّرُ يَا وَاجِدُ [.....] يَا بَرُّ يَا مُتَفَضِّلُ يَا مَاجِدُ
wird_id_47.en_wird_description: O the Odd, the Haughty, and Founder O the Most Generous, Giving and Glorified.
wird_id_47.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Witr Ya Mutakabbiru Ya Wajidu [.....] Ya Barru Ya Mutafaddilu Ya Majidu

wird_id_48.en_wird_description: By a grace of you, accept us as we are.

wird_id_49.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مُبِيْنُ يَا وَدُودُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مُحِيْطُ يَا شَهِيْدُ
wird_id_49.en_wird_description: O Allah the Clarifying and Loving O Allah the Surrounding and Witnessing.
wird_id_49.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Mubinu Ya Wadudu [.....] Allahuma Ya Muhitu Ya Shahidu

wird_id_50.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مَتِيْنُ يَا شَدِيْدُ [.....] يَامَنْ هُوَ الْفَعَّالُ مَا يُرِيْدُ
wird_id_50.en_wird_description: O Allah the Relentlessly Strong and Mighty You are the One Who does what He wills.
wird_id_50.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Mateenu Ya Shadidu [.....] Ya Man Huwa al-Fa'alu Ma Yureedu

wird_id_51.en_wird_description: We are weak; to you we resorted.

wird_id_52.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا مُعِزُّ يَا مُقَدِّمُ [.....] اللهُ يَا مُذِلُّ يَا مُنْتَقِمُ
wird_id_52.en_wird_description: O Allah the Honouring, the Advancing O Allah, the Dishonouring, the Revenging.
wird_id_52.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Mu'izu Ya Muqaddimu [.....] Allahuma Ya Muzhillu Ya Muntaqimu

wird_id_53.ar_wird_description: الْبَادِئُ البَاقي فَلاَ يَنْعَدِمُ [.....] المُحْسِنُ الْوَالِي الْحَفِيْظُ الأكْرَمُ
wird_id_53.en_wird_description: The Starting, the Lasting, without end. The Giver, the Guardian, the Keeper and Most Generous.
wird_id_53.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Badi'u al-Baqi Fala Yandimu [.....] Al-Muhsinu al-Wali al-Hafizu al-Akramu

wird_id_54.en_wird_description: We have none to protect us except You.

wird_id_55.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا وَارِثُ أَنْتَ الأَبَدُ [.....] اللهُ يَا بَاعِثُ أَنْتَ الأَحَدُ
wird_id_55.en_wird_description: O Allah, the Inheritor, You are the Everlasting. O Allah, the Raiser, You are the Only One.
wird_id_55.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Warithu Anta al-Abadu [.....] Allahuma Ya Ba'ithu Anta al-Ahadu

wird_id_56.ar_wird_description: يَا مَالِكَ الْمُلْكِ الإِلهُ الصَّمَدُ [.....] لاَ كُفْؤٌ لاَ وَالِدٌ لاَ وَلَدُ
wird_id_56.en_wird_description: The Owner of the Domain, the God, the Resort for All. No peer, no parent, no child.
wird_id_56.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Maliki al-Mulki al-Ilahu al-Samadu [.....] La Kufu'un La Walidun La Waladu

wird_id_57.en_wird_description: Save us from the enemy; we have been hurt.

wird_id_58.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا غَالِبُ يَا قَهَّارُ [.....] اللهُ يَا نَافِعُ أَنْتَ الضَّارُّ
wird_id_58.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are the Winner, the Defeater. O Allah, You are the benefactor, You are the Harming.
wird_id_58.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Ghalibu Ya Qaharu [.....] Allahuma Ya Nafi'u Anta al-Darru

wird_id_59.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا بَارِئُ يَا غَفَّارُ [.....] يَا رَبِّ يَا ذَا الْقُوَّةِ الجَبَّارُ
wird_id_59.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are the Inspirer of Souls the Often Forgiver. O Lord of Might and Power.
wird_id_59.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Bari'u Ya Ghafaru [.....] Ya Rabbi Ya Dhal-Quwati al-Jabbaru

wird_id_60.en_wird_description: Fix our worldly affairs for us and strengthen our faith.
wird_id_60.ar_wird_transliteration: Qawim Lana al-Dunya wa Qawi al-Dinana

wird_id_61.ar_wird_description: اللهُ رَبُّ الْعِزَّةِ السَّلاَمُ [.....] المُؤْمِنُ الْمُهَيْمِنُ الْعَلَّامُ
wird_id_61.en_wird_description: O Allah the Lord of Honour and Peace. The Securer, the Dominator, the Most Knowledgeable.
wird_id_61.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Rabbu al-'Izzati al-Salam [.....] al-Mu'minu al-Muhayminu al-'Allamu

wird_id_62.ar_wird_description: ذُو الرَّحْمَةِ الأَعْلَى الْأَعَزُّ التَّامُّ [.....] مَنْ دِيْنُهُ الْحَقُّ هُوَ الإِسْلاَمُ
wird_id_62.en_wird_description: The Merciful Most High and Honourable the Perfect. Whose True Faith is Islam.
wird_id_62.ar_wird_transliteration: Dhu al-Rahmat al-A'la al-A'zu al-Tammu [.....] Man Dinuhu al-Haqqu huwa al-Islamu

wird_id_63.en_wird_description: O Allah have Supporters for it.

wird_id_64.ar_wird_description: اللهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْمُتَعَالِي الحَكَمُ [.....] الفَرْدُ ذُو العَرْشِ الوَلِيُّ الأَحْكَمُ
wird_id_64.en_wird_description: Allah You are the Transcending, the Judge. The Only One, Owner of the Throne, the Care-taker, and the Wisest.
wird_id_64.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Anta al-Mut'ali al-Hakamu [.....] al-Fardu Dhu al-'Arshi al-Waliyyu al-Ahkamu

wird_id_65.ar_wird_description: الْغَافِرُ الْمُعْطِي الْجَوَادُ الْمُنْعِمُ [.....] العَادِلُ العَدْلُ الصَّبُورُ الأَرْحَمُ
wird_id_65.en_wird_description: The Forgiver, the Giver, the Generous, the Blessing. The Just, Perfect, Patient and Most Merciful.
wird_id_65.ar_wird_transliteration: Al-Ghafiru al-Mu'ti al-Jawadu al-Mun'imu [.....] al-'Adilu al-'Adlu al-Saburu al-Arhamu

wird_id_66.en_wird_description: Establish us strongly on our land.

wird_id_67.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا قُدُّوسُ يَا بُرْهَانُ [.....] يَا بَرُّ يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ
wird_id_67.en_wird_description: O Allah, You are the Purifier, the Proof-giver. You are the Source of Goodness, the Tender, and Favouring.
wird_id_67.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Quddusu Ya Burhanu [.....] Ya Barru Ya Hannan Ya Mannan

wird_id_68.ar_wird_description: يَا حَقُّ يَا مُقْسِطُ يَا دَيَّانُ [.....] تَبَارَكْت أَسْمَاؤُكَ الْحِسَانُ
wird_id_68.en_wird_description: You are the Truth, the Justice Giver, the Rewarder. Blessed are Your Perfect Names.
wird_id_68.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Haqqu Ya Muqsitu Ya Dayyanu [.....] Tabarakta Asma'uka al-Hisan

wird_id_69.en_wird_description: We have knocked Your Honourable Door with them.

wird_id_70.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا خَلَّاقُ يَا مُنِيْبُ [.....] اللهُ يَا رَزَّاقُ يَا حَسِيْبُ
wird_id_70.en_wird_description: O Allah the Creator, and Forgiver O Allah the Sustainer and.
wird_id_70.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Khallaqu Ya Munibu [.....] Allahuma Ya Razzaku Ya Hasibu

wird_id_71.ar_wird_description: اللهُ يَا قَرِيْبُ يَا رَقِيْبُ [.....] المُسْتَعَانُ السَّامِعُ المُجِيْبُ
wird_id_71.en_wird_description: O Allah You are the Close One and Observer. The Helper, the Hearer and Responder.
wird_id_71.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Ya Qaribu Ya Raqibu [.....] al-Musta'anu al-Sami'u al-Mujibu

wird_id_72.en_wird_description: We have entreated You; answer our supplications. Ameen.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللهم صل وسلم وبارك على [.....] سيدنا محمد وعلى آله [.....] عدد كما لله وكما يليق بكماله [.....] واجزه عنا ما هو أهله
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Blessing, Peace and Bounty on our Most Honorable Muhammad and his Folk, as much as that belongs to Allah, and as befit his perfection. Reward him on our behalf as befits him.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahuma Salli Wa Sallim Wa Barik 'Ala [.....] Sayyidina Muhammad Wa 'Ala Alihi [.....] 'Adada Kamaa Lillah Wa Kamaa Yaliqu Bikamalihi [.....] Wa Ajirzeh 'Anna Ma Huwa Ahluh

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: يَاْ مَنْ يُغِيْثُ المُسْتَغِيْثْ [.....] إنْ لَمْ تُغِثْنَا مَنْ يُغِيْثْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O You Who helps the desperate callerIf you do not respond, none will
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Yaa man yughīthu al-mustaghīth [.....] in lam tughīthnā man yughīth

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَمَا لَنَا رَبٌّ مُغِيْثْ [.....] سِوَاكَ يَا رَبَّ العِبَادْ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: We do not have any responding Lord Except You, the Lord of All People.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Wamaa lanā rabbun mughīth [.....] siwaaka yaa rabba al-‘ibaad

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: فِيْنَا صِغَارٌ رُضَّعُ [.....] فِيْنَا شُيُوخٌ رُكَّعُ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: We have among us suckling babies, We have kneeling elderlies.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Fīnā ṣighārun ruḍ‘a‘u [.....] fīnā shuyūkhun ruk‘ā‘u

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: كَذَا بَهَائـِــمْ رُتَّــعُ [.....] وَأَنْتَ لِلْكُلِّ مُرَاْدْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Also, we have dumb animals. You are the destination of all.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Kadhā bahā’im ruṭṭa‘u [.....] wa anta lil-kulli murād

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: جَهْدُ البَلَا حَلَّ بِنَا [.....] ضَاقَ الفَلَا مِنْ كَرْبِنَا
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Severe calamities have befallen us; The wilderness no longer accommodate our distress.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Jahdu al-balaa ḥalla binā [.....] ḍāqa al-falā min karbinā

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَكُلُّ ذَا مِنْ ذَنْبِنَا [.....] فَهُوَ الَّذِيْ طَمَسَ الفُؤَادْ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: All of that is because of our sin. It is the one that defaced the heart.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa kullu dhā min dhanbinā [.....] fahuwa alladhī ṭamasa al-fu’ād

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: إنْ كُنْتَ غَيْثَ الطَّائِعِيْن [.....] فَمَنْ يُغِيْثُ المُذْنِبِيْن
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: If you only respond to the obedient, who will respond to the sinners?
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: In kunta ghaytha al-ṭā‘i‘īn [.....] faman yughīthu al-mudhnibīn

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: رَحْمَةُ خَيْرِ الرَّاحِمِيْن [.....] مُطْلَقَةٌ بِلَا قِيَاْد
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: The mercy of the Best of All the Merciful Has no limits.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Raḥmatu khayri ar-rāḥimīn [.....] muṭlaqatun bilā qiyād

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: إنْ كَانَ لَا يَرْجُو عَطَاكْ [.....] إلَّا المُطِيْعُ إلَى هُدَاْك
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: If only the obedient can hope for your blessing,
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: In kāna lā yarjū ‘aṭāak [.....] illā al-muṭī‘u ilā hudāk

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: بِمَنْ يَلُوْذُ مَنْ عَصَاْك [.....] أَنْتَ لِمَنْ قَدْ ضَلَّ هَاْد
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: To whom shall the disobedient resort? You are the guide for the lost.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Biman yalūdh man ‘aṣāk [.....] anta liman qad ḍallā hād

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ عَاْمِلْنَا بِمَا [.....] أَنْتَ لَهُ أَهْلٌ كَمَاْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: O God, treat us the way that befits You,
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Yā rabbī ‘āmilnā bimā [.....] anta lahu ahlun kamā

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: عَوَّدْتَ هَذَا كَرَمَا [.....] عَبِيْدَ جُوْدِكَ يَا جَوَاْد
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The way You made us used to, out of Your grace. We are slaves of Your Grace, Most Noble.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: ‘Awwadta hādhā karamā [.....] ‘abīdā jūdika yā jawād

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبِّ قُلْتَ اسْتَغْفِرُوْا [.....] رَبَّكُـــمُ فَيَــغْفِرُ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: O God, You asked us to seek forgiveness of our Lord, in order for You to forgive.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Yā rabbī qultu istafghirū [.....] rabbakum fayaghfiru

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: يَأْتِيْ السَّحَابُ المُمْطِرُ [.....] يُرْوِيْ العِبَادَ والْبِلَاْد
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Bring rainy clouds that Water people and places.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya’tee as-sahābu al-mumṭiru [.....] yurwī al-‘ibād wa al-bilād

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: فَيَا رَحِيْمَ الرُّحمَاَ [.....] وَيَا كَرِيْمَ الْكُرَمَا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O the Merciful of All, The Noblest of All.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Fayā raḥīmā ar-raḥamā [.....] wa yā karīmā al-karamā

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: أَفِضْ أَفضْ غَيْثَ السَّمَا [.....] فِيْ الأَرْضِ فَهْيَ لَنَا مِهَاْد
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Bring down on us the rain of heavens To earth our place of living.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Afidh afid ghaytha as-samā [.....] fī al-arḍi fahya lanā mihād

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: رَحْمةُ رَبِّي وَسِعَتْ [.....] لِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ جَمَعَتْ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: The mercy of my Lord accommodates Everything.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Raḥmatu rabbī wasi‘at [.....] likulli shay’in jama‘at

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: عَاْدَاْتُها مَا انْقَطَعَتْ [.....] وَلَمْ تَزَلْ فِيْ الْاِزْدِيَاْد
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: It never stops, It continues to increase.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: ‘Ādatuhā mā inqaṭa‘at [.....] wa lam tazal fī al-izdiyād

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: بِالمُصْطَفَىْ جُدْ يَاْ كَرِيْم [.....] فَهُوَ الرَّؤُوْفُ بِنَا الرَّحِيْم
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: By the Chosen O God, favour us He is the Compassionate and Merciful with us.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Bil-muṣṭafā jūd yā karīm [.....] fahuwa ar-ra’ūfu binā ar-raḥīm

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: مَن ْكَاْنَ فِيْ العِلْمِ القَدِيْم [.....] مِنْهُ الوُجُوْدُ مُسْتَفَاْد
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: The one who used to be in the pre-eternal knowledge the mercy to the universe.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Man kāna fī al-‘ilm al-qadīm [.....] minhu al-wujūd mustafād

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: صَلَّى عَلَيْهِ اللهُ مَا [.....] غَيْثُ السَّمَاءِ انْسَجَمَا
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: May Allah send blessing on him so long as the rains fall down
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Ṣallā ‘alayhī Allāhu mā [.....] ghaythu as-samā’i insajamā

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ هَمَــا فَعَمَّمَا [.....] كُلَّ الأَبَاطِحِ وَالْوِهَاْد
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Heavily covering All plains and valleys
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Waqad hammā fa‘ammamā [.....] kulla al-abāṭiḥi wal-wihād

wird_id_23.en_wird_description: And on his Family and Companions, Group and Followers.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ālihi wa ṣiḥbihī [.....] wa rahṭihī wa ḥizbihī

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: فَهُمْ غُيُوثُ سُحْبِهِ [.....] لِلْخَلْقِ فِيْ نَهْجِ السَّدَاْد
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: They are the rain of his clouds For people on the right path.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: Fahum ghuyūthū suḥbihī [.....] lil-khalqi fī nahji as-sadād

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: فَاغْفِرْ لِلنَّاظِمْ يَاْ تَوَّاب [.....] أَيْضَاً وَالنَّاشِرْ يَا ْوَهَّاب
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: Forgive the author, O Forgiver. And the publisher O Giver.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Faghfir lil-nāẓim yā tawwāb [.....] ayḍan wal-nāshir yā wahhāb

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: عَبْدٌ وَقِيْعٌ فِي ْالأَعْتَاْب [.....] يَرْجُوْ النَّجَاْةَ فِيْ الْمَعَاْد
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: A slave at the doorstep Hoping for survival at resurrection.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: ‘Abdun waqī‘un fī al-a‘tāb [.....] yarjū an-najāh fī al-ma‘ād

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ بِنُورِ وَجْهِ الله الْعَظِيمِ، الَّذِي مَلأَ أَرْكَانَ عَرْشِ الله الْعَظِيمِ، وَقَامَتْ بِهِ عَوَالِمُ الله الْعَظِيمِ، أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مَوْلاَنَا مُحَمَّدٍ ذِي الْقَدْرِ الْعَظِيمِ، وَعَلَى آلِ نَبِيِّ الله الْعَظِيمِ، بِقَدْرِ عَظَمَةِ ذَاتِ الله الْعَظِيمِ، فِي كُلِّ لَمْحَةٍ وَنَفَسٍ عَدَد مَا فِي عِلْمِ الله الْعَظِيمِ، صَلاَةً دَائِمَةً بِدَوَامِ الله الْعَظِيمِ، تَعْظِيماً لِحَقِّكَ يَا مَوْلاَنَا يَا مُحَمَّدُ يَا ذَا الْخُلُقِ الْعَظِيمِ، وَسَلِّمْ عَلَيْهِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ مِثْلَ ذَلِكَ، وَاجْمَعْ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَهُ كَمَا جَمَعْتَ بَيْنَ الرُّوحِ وَالنَّفْسِ، ظَاهِراً وَبَاطِناً، يَقَظَةً وَمَنَاماً، وَاجْعَلْهُ يَا رَبِّ رُوحاً لِذَاتِي مِنْ جَمِيعِ الْوُجُوهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا قَبْلَ الآخِرَةِ يَا عَظِيمُ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the Great Light of Your Countenance that filled the pillars of Your Great Throne, and by which Your great dominions subsist, I ask You to bless our Most Honorable Muhammad of the great esteem. I ask You also to bless the Folks of our great Prophet as befits Your Great Essence throughout every glance and breath, as numerous as Allah the Great knows. Make that blessing perpetual, as You would like it to be, in glorification of the right of our Most Honorable Muhammad, who has the noblest character. Likewise, pass our commitment to him and his Folks. Join me with him the same way You join body and soul, outwardly and inwardly, in wakefulness and in sleep. Make him, O Lord, a soul for my essence in every aspect, in this world and the Next, O You the Great.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma innī as’alu-ka binūri wajhi Allāh al-‘aẓīm, alladhī mala’a arkan ‘arshi Allāh al-‘aẓīm, wa qāmat bihi ‘awālimu Allāh al-‘aẓīm, an tuṣallī ‘alā mawlānā Muḥammadin dhī al-qadri al-‘aẓīm, wa ‘alā āli nabīyī Allāh al-‘aẓīm, biqadri ‘aẓamatī dhāti Allāh al-‘aẓīm, fī kulli lamḥatin wa nafaṣin ‘adad mā fī ‘ilmī Allāh al-‘aẓīm, ṣalātan dā’imatan bidawāmī Allāh al-‘aẓīm, ta‘ẓīmān li-ḥaqqika yā mawlānā yā Muḥammadu yā dhā al-khuluqi al-‘aẓīm, wa sallim ‘alayhī wa ‘alā ālihi mithla dhālika, wa ajmi‘ bainī wa bainahū kamā jama‘ta bayna ar-rūḥi wa an-nafs, ẓāhiran wa bāṭinan, yaqẓatan wa manāmā, wa ajil-hu yā rabbī rūḥan li dhātī min jamī‘ al-wujūhi fī ad-dunyā qablal-ākhirah yā ‘aẓīm

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: َيَا بَدِيعَ الصُّنع يَا مَنْ كُلَّمَا [.....] دَهَمَ الأَمْرُ جَلَا مَا دَهَمَا
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Wonderful Creator, the One Whom whenever a concern hits, He clears that concern.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Yā Badī‘a as-ṣun‘i yā man kullamā [.....] dahama al-amru jalā mā dahamā

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: َيَا غِيَاثَ المُسْتَغِيثِينَ وَيَا [.....] مَاضِيَ الحُكْمِ إِذَا مَا حَكَمَا
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: You the Responder to the Desperate Whose irrefutable order is executed at once
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Yā Ghīyātha al-mustaghīthīn wa yā [.....] Māḍiya al-ḥukmi idhā mā ḥakama

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: َفَرِّجِ الكَرْبَ إِلَهِي عَاجِلاً  [.....] إِنَّمَا الكَرْبُ عَلَيْنَا عَظُمَا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Clear our concerns quickly; concerns became too heavy for us.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Farrijī al-karba ilāhī ‘ājilan [.....] innamā al-karbu ‘alaynā ‘aẓumā

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: َوَاسْتَجِبْ مِنَّا دُعَانَا كَرَمَاً [.....] يَا كَرِيمَاً أنْتَ رَبُّ الكُرَمَا
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Answer our entreats out of your grace; You are the Noble and Lord of all the noble.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Wāstajib minnā du‘ānā karamā [.....] yā karīmā anta rabb al-kuramā

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: َوَتَدَارَكْنَا بِلُطْفٍ عَاجِلٍ [.....] يَا رَحِيمَاً أَنْتَ رَبُّ الرُّحَمَا
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Come fast to us with Your prompt care; You are the Merciful; Lord of all the merciful.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa tadāraknā biluṭfin ‘ājilin [.....] yā raḥīmā anta rabb ar-raḥamā

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: َوَعَلَى خَيْرِ البَرَايَا المُصْطَفَى [.....] صَلِّ يَا رَبِّ وَسَلِّمْ دَائِمَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: On the best of humanity, the Chosen, shower your Peace and Blessing. Ameen
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa ‘alā khayri al-barāyā al-muṣṭafā [.....] ṣalli yā rabbī wa sallim dā’imā

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: مَوْلَايَ صَلِّ وَسَـلِّمْ دَاْئِمَاً أَبَدَا  [.....] عَلَىْ حَبِيْبِكَ خَيْرِ الخَلْقِ كُلِّهِمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Lord extend everlasting Blessing and Peace on Your Beloved, Best of Creation.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Mawlâyā ṣalli wa sallim dā’iman abadan [.....] ‘alā ḥabībika khayri al-khalqi kullihim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ أَشْرَفُ الأعْرَابِ والعَجَمِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ مَنْ يَمْشِي عَلَى قَدَم
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the noblest of the Arabs and the non-Arabs. Muhammad is the best of all those who walk on feet.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan ashrafu al-‘Arabī wal-‘ajamī [.....] Muḥammadan khayru man yamshī ‘alā qadam

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ بَاسِطُ الـمَــعْرُوْفِ جَاْمِعُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صاحبُ الإِحْسَانِ والْكَرَمِ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the most expansive giver of all good things, Muhammad is the master of excellence and generosity.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan bāsiṭu al-ma‘rūfi jāmi‘uhu [.....] Muḥammadan ṣāḥibu al-‘iḥsāni wal-karami

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ تَاْجُ رُسْلِ اللهِ قَاطِبَة ً [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صَاْدِقُ الأَقْوَالِ والْكَلِمِ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the crown of all Messengers of God, Muhammad, is most truthful in speech and word.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan tāju rusuli Allāhi qāṭibatan [.....] Muḥammadan ṣādiqu al-aqwāli wal-kalimi

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ثَابِتُ الـْمِيْثَاقِ حَافِظُهُ ُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ طَيِّبُ الأَخْلَاقِ وَالشِّيَمِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Muhammad is utterly reliable in keeping pledges, Muhammad has the best character and qualities.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan thābitu al-mīthāqi ḥāfiẓuhu [.....] Muḥammadan ṭayyibu al-akhlaqi wal-shiyami

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ جُبِلَتْ بالنُّورِ طِينَتُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ لـَمْ يَزَلْ نُوْرَاً مِنَ القِدَمِ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Muhammad is fair and wise in judgment, with nobleness. Muhammad is the source of kindness and wisdom.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan jubilat bi-n-nūri ṭīnatuhu [.....] Muḥammadan lam yazal nūrāan min al-qidami

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ حَاْكِمٌ بالْعَدْلِ ذُو شَرَفٍ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَعْدِنُ الإِنْعَاْمِ وَالْـحِكَمِ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Muhammad, his substance was watered with light, Muhammad has always been light from eternity.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan ḥākimun bil-‘adli dhu sharafin [.....] Muḥammadan ma‘dinul in‘āmi wal-ḥikami

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ خَلْقِ الله مِنْ مُضَرٍ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ رُسْلِ الله كُلِّهِمِ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Muhammad is the finest of God’s creation, from the tribe of Mudar, Muhammad is the best of all God’s Messengers.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan khayru khalqi Allāhi min Mudarin [.....] Muḥammadan khayru rusuli Allāhi kullihim

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ دِينُهُ حَقٌّ نَدِينُ بِهِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مُـشْرِقٌ حَقَّاً عَلَى عَلَمِ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Muhammad – his creed is true, by it we profess our faith, Muhammad is eminent, the embodiment of truth.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan dīnuhu ḥaqqan nadīnū bihi [.....] Muḥammadan mushriqun ḥaqqan ‘alā ‘alamī

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ذِكْـرُهُ رَوْحٌ لِأَنْفُسِنَا  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ شُكْرُهُ فَرْضٌ عَلَى الأُمَمِ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Muhammad – to mention him brings refreshment to our souls, Muhammad – praising him is a duty upon all peoples.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan dhikruhu rawḥun li anfusinā [.....] Muḥammadan shukruhu farḍun ‘alā al-umami

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ رَحِمَ اللهُ العِبَادَ بِهِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ سَبَبُ الإِنْشَاء مِنْ عَدَمِ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: Muhammad, Allah has provided mercy to people through him. Muhammad is the means for creation from nothing.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan raḥimallāhu al-‘ibāda bihi [.....] Muḥammadan sababu al-inshā’i min ‘adami

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ زِيْنَة ُالدُّنْيَا وَبَهْجَتُهَا  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ كَاشِفُ الغُمَّاتِ والظُّلَمِ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: Muhammad – the beauty of the world and its splendor, Muhammad lifts the veils of darkness and distress.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan zīnata ad-dunyā wa bahjatuhā [.....] Muḥammadan kāshifu al-ghummāti wal-ẓulami

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ سَيِّدٌ طَابَتْ مَنَاقِبُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ صَاْغَهُ الرَّحْمَنُ بِالنِّعَمِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a master, whose virtues bring delight Muhammad is the Most Merciful fashioned him from grace
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan sayyidun ṭābat manāqibuhu [.....] Muḥammadan ṣāghahu ar-raḥmānu bin-ni‘ami

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ شَرَّفَ البَارِي مَرَاتِبَه [.....]  مُحَمَّدٌ خَصَّهُ الرَّحْمَنُ بِالنِّعَمِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Muhammad, the Creator has elevated his ranks. Muhammad, the Gracious has allocated blessings to him.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan sharrafa al-bārī marātibahu [.....] Muḥammadan khaṣṣahu ar-raḥmānu bin-ni‘ami

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ صَفْوَة ُالبَّارِيْ وَخِيْرَتُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ طَاْهِرٌ مِنْ سَائِرِ التُّهَمِ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Muhammad – the flower of the Creator, and His elect Muhammad – pure beyond all suspicion
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan ṣafwata al-bārī wa khīratuhu [.....] Muḥammadan ṭāhirun min sā’ir at-tuhami

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ضَاْحِكٌ لِلضَّيْفِ مُكْرِمُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ جَارُهُ وَالله لَمْ يُضَمِ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Muhammad is smiling and cheerful to his guest to honor him. Muhammad – by God, no neighbor of his was ever wronged.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Muḥammadan ḍāḥikun lil-ḍayfi mukrimuhu [.....] Muḥammadan jāruhu wa-llāhu lam yuḍammi

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ طَاْبَتِ الدُّنْيَا بِبِعْثَتِهِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ جَاْءَ بِالآيَاتِ والحِكَمِ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Muhammad – this world was made delightful by his being sent, Muhammad – he came with signs and with wisdom.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad - taabatid dunya biba'tatihi [.....] Muhammad jaa'a bil-ayat wal-hikami

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ ظَهَرَتْ فِينَا هِدايَتُه  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ هَدْيُهُ نُورٌ لِكُلِّ عَمِيّْ
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Muhammad, his guidance has appeared in us. Muhammad, his guidance is light for every blind.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, zaharati fina hidayatuhu [.....] Muhammad, hadyuhu noorun likulli 'ami

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ عَمَّنَا إحْسَانُ نِعْمَتِهِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ سِرُّ عِلْمِ اللَّوْحِ وَالقَلَمِ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we have been overshadowed by his blessings. Muhammad is the means for knowledge in the Tablet and the Pen.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, 'ammana ihsanu ni'matihi [.....] Muhammad sirru 'ilmi al-lawhi wal-qalami

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ غَيْثُ مَعْرُوفٍ يَدُوْمُ لَنَا  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَدْحُهُ يَشْفِي مِنَ السَّقَم
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a relief that lasts for us. Muhammad, his praise is a cure of ailments.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, ghaythu ma'roofin yadoomu lana [.....] Muhammad, madhuhu yashfi mina as-saqami

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ فَاقَ كُلَّ الأنْبِيَا شَرَفَاً [.....]  مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ أَحَلَّ الدِّيْنَ فِيْ حَرَمِ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: Muhammad, he has surpassed all prophets in honour. Muhammad, he has made a sanctuary of the faith.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, faqaa kulla al-anbiya sharafan [.....] Muhammad, qad ahalla ad-deena fi harami

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ قَاْئِمٌ للهِ ذُوْ هِمَمٍ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ كُلُّ إحْسَانٍ إلَيْهِ نُمِي
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Muhammad stands for Allah, with high determination. Muhammad, all kindness belongs to him.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, qa'imun lillahi dhu himamin [.....] Muhammad, kullu ihsanin ilayhi numi

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ كُلُّ مَا فِي الكَوْنِ مَظْهَرُهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ فِيْ البَرَايَا خَيْرُ مُعْتَصَمِ
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: Muhammad, all in universe is a presentation of him. Muhammad is the best refuge among people.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, kullu ma fi al-kawni mazhruhu [.....] Muhammad fi al-braaya khayru mu'tasam

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ لَمْ نَجِدْ عَنْ حُبِّهِ بَدَلَاً  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ نَرْتَجِيْهِ عِنْدَ مُضْطَرِمِ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we cannot find a substitute to his love. Muhammad, we hope for him on turbulence.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, lam najid 'an hubbihi badalan [.....] Muhammad, nartajiihi 'inda muttarim

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ مَنْ رَجَاهُ نَالَ غَايَتَهُ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ يُسْعِفُ المَلْهُوفَ عَنْ أَمَمِ
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: Muhammad, whoever hope for him gets his desire. Muhammad rescues the desperate very closely.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, man rajahu naal ghayatuhu [.....] Muhammad, yus'ifu al-malhoof 'an amam

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ نِعْمَةٌ كُبْرَى لَنَا شَمِلَتْ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ مَنْشَأُ الخَيْرَاتِ وَالنِّعَمِ
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: Muhammad is a great inclusive blessing for us. Muhammad is the source of goodness and blessings.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, ni'matun kubra lana shamilat [.....] Muhammad, mansha'ul khayrat wal-ni'am

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ وَاصَلَ الدُّنْيَا بِأنْعُمِه  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ تَسَامَى كُلَّ ذِيْ كَرَمِ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: Muhammad has reached out the world with his blessings. Muhammad has ranked above the nobility of any human.
wird_id_27.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, wasala ad-dunya bi an'oomihi [.....] Muhammad, qad tasama kulla dhi karam

wird_id_28.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ هَدْيُهُ فُزْنَا بِغَايَتِهِ  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ قَدْ وَفَى لِلهِ مِنْ قِدَمِ
wird_id_28.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we have gained the benefit of his guidance. Muhammad has fulfilled his promise to Allah since eternity.
wird_id_28.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, hadyuhu fuzna bighaytihi [.....] Muhammad, qad wafa lillahi min qadam

wird_id_29.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ لا نَرَى إلا شَفَاعَتَه  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَيْرُ دَاعٍ عِنْدَ مُزْدَحَمِ
wird_id_29.en_wird_description: Muhammad, we do not see except his intercession. Muhammad is the best caller on crowdy places.
wird_id_29.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, la nara illa shafa'atuhu [.....] Muhammad, khayru da'in 'inda muzdahim

wird_id_30.ar_wird_description: مُحَمَّدٌ يَوْمَ بَعْثِ النَّاسِ شَافِعُنَا  [.....] مُحَمَّدٌ خَاتَمٌ لِلرُّسْلِ كُلِّهِمِ
wird_id_30.en_wird_description: Muhammad is our intercessor on the Day mankind is resurrected. Muhammad – his light is the guide out of darkness.
wird_id_30.ar_wird_transliteration: Muhammad, yawm ba'thi an-naasi shafi'unaa [.....] Muhammad, khatamun lil-rusli kullihim

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: یٰسٓۚ(۱) وَ الْقُرْاٰنِ الْحَكِیْمِۙ(۲) اِنَّكَ لَمِنَ الْمُرْسَلِیْنَۙ(۳) عَلٰى صِرَاطٍ مُّسْتَقِیْمٍؕ(۴) تَنْزِیْلَ الْعَزِیْزِ الرَّحِیْمِۙ(۵) لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَّاۤ اُنْذِرَ اٰبَآؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غٰفِلُوْنَ(۶) لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلٰۤى اَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا یُؤْمِنُوْنَ(۷) اِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِیْۤ اَعْنَاقِهِمْ اَغْلٰلًا فَهِیَ اِلَى الْاَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُّقْمَحُوْنَ(۸) وَ جَعَلْنَا مِنْۢ بَیْنِ اَیْدِیْهِمْ سَدًّا وَّ مِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَاَغْشَیْنٰهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا یُبْصِرُوْنَ(۹) وَ سَوَآءٌ عَلَیْهِمْ ءَاَنْذَرْتَهُمْ اَمْ لَمْ تُنْذِرْهُمْ لَا یُؤْمِنُوْنَ(۱۰) اِنَّمَا تُنْذِرُ مَنِ اتَّبَعَ الذِّكْرَ وَ خَشِیَ الرَّحْمٰنَ بِالْغَیْبِۚ-فَبَشِّرْهُ بِمَغْفِرَةٍ وَّ اَجْرٍ كَرِیْمٍ(۱۱) اِنَّا نَحْنُ نُحْیِ الْمَوْتٰى وَ نَكْتُبُ مَا قَدَّمُوْا وَ اٰثَارَهُمْۣؕ-وَ كُلَّ شَیْءٍ اَحْصَیْنٰهُ فِیْۤ اِمَامٍ مُّبِیْنٍ۠(۱۲) وَ اضْرِبْ لَهُمْ مَّثَلًا اَصْحٰبَ الْقَرْیَةِۘ-اِذْ جَآءَهَا الْمُرْسَلُوْنَۚ(۱۳) اِذْ اَرْسَلْنَاۤ اِلَیْهِمُ اثْنَیْنِ فَكَذَّبُوْهُمَا فَعَزَّزْنَا بِثَالِثٍ فَقَالُوْۤا اِنَّاۤ اِلَیْكُمْ مُّرْسَلُوْنَ(۱۴)قَالُوْا مَاۤ اَنْتُمْ اِلَّا بَشَرٌ مِّثْلُنَاۙ-وَ مَاۤ اَنْزَلَ الرَّحْمٰنُ مِنْ شَیْءٍۙ-اِنْ اَنْتُمْ اِلَّا تَكْذِبُوْنَ(۱۵) قَالُوْا رَبُّنَا یَعْلَمُ اِنَّاۤ اِلَیْكُمْ لَمُرْسَلُوْنَ(۱۶) وَ مَا عَلَیْنَاۤ اِلَّا الْبَلٰغُ الْمُبِیْنُ(۱۷) قَالُوْۤا اِنَّا تَطَیَّرْنَا بِكُمْۚ-لَىٕنْ لَّمْ تَنْتَهُوْا لَنَرْجُمَنَّكُمْ وَ لَیَمَسَّنَّكُمْ مِّنَّا عَذَابٌ اَلِیْمٌ(۱۸) قَالُوْا طَآىٕرُكُمْ مَّعَكُمْؕ-اَىٕنْ ذُكِّرْتُمْؕ-بَلْ اَنْتُمْ قَوْمٌ مُّسْرِفُوْنَ(۱۹) وَ جَآءَ مِنْ اَقْصَا الْمَدِیْنَةِ رَجُلٌ یَّسْعٰى قَالَ یٰقَوْمِ اتَّبِعُوا الْمُرْسَلِیْنَۙ(۲۰) اتَّبِعُوْا مَنْ لَّا یَسْــٴَـلُكُمْ اَجْرًا وَّ هُمْ مُّهْتَدُوْنَ(۲۱) وَ مَا لِیَ لَاۤ اَعْبُدُ الَّذِیْ فَطَرَنِیْ وَ اِلَیْهِ تُرْجَعُوْنَ(۲۲) ءَاَتَّخِذُ مِنْ دُوْنِهٖۤ اٰلِهَةً اِنْ یُّرِدْنِ الرَّحْمٰنُ بِضُرٍّ لَّا تُغْنِ عَنِّیْ شَفَاعَتُهُمْ شَیْــٴًـا وَّ لَا یُنْقِذُوْنِۚ(۲۳) اِنِّیْۤ اِذًا لَّفِیْ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِیْنٍ(۲۴) اِنِّیْۤ اٰمَنْتُ بِرَبِّكُمْ فَاسْمَعُوْنِؕ(۲۵) قِیْلَ ادْخُلِ الْجَنَّةَؕ-قَالَ یٰلَیْتَ قَوْمِیْ یَعْلَمُوْنَۙ(۲۶) بِمَا غَفَرَ لِیْ رَبِّیْ وَ جَعَلَنِیْ مِنَ الْمُكْرَمِیْنَ(۲۷) وَ مَاۤ اَنْزَلْنَا عَلٰى قَوْمِهٖ مِنْۢ بَعْدِهٖ مِنْ جُنْدٍ مِّنَ السَّمَآءِ وَ مَا كُنَّا مُنْزِلِیْنَ(۲۸) اِنْ كَانَتْ اِلَّا صَیْحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَاِذَا هُمْ خٰمِدُوْنَ(۲۹)یٰحَسْرَةً عَلَى الْعِبَادِۣۚ-مَا یَاْتِیْهِمْ مِّنْ رَّسُوْلٍ اِلَّا كَانُوْا بِهٖ یَسْتَهْزِءُوْنَ(۳۰) اَلَمْ یَرَوْا كَمْ اَهْلَكْنَا قَبْلَهُمْ مِّنَ الْقُرُوْنِ اَنَّهُمْ اِلَیْهِمْ لَا یَرْجِعُوْنَؕ(۳۱) وَ اِنْ كُلٌّ لَّمَّا جَمِیْعٌ لَّدَیْنَا مُحْضَرُوْنَ۠(۳۲) وَ اٰیَةٌ لَّهُمُ الْاَرْضُ الْمَیْتَةُ ۚۖ-اَحْیَیْنٰهَا وَ اَخْرَجْنَا مِنْهَا حَبًّا فَمِنْهُ یَاْكُلُوْنَ(۳۳) وَ جَعَلْنَا فِیْهَا جَنّٰتٍ مِّنْ نَّخِیْلٍ وَّ اَعْنَابٍ وَّ فَجَّرْنَا فِیْهَا مِنَ الْعُیُوْنِۙ(۳۴) لِیَاْكُلُوْا مِنْ ثَمَرِهٖۙ-وَ مَا عَمِلَتْهُ اَیْدِیْهِمْؕ-اَفَلَا یَشْكُرُوْنَ(۳۵) سُبْحٰنَ الَّذِیْ خَلَقَ الْاَزْوَاجَ كُلَّهَا مِمَّا تُنْۢبِتُ الْاَرْضُ وَ مِنْ اَنْفُسِهِمْ وَ مِمَّا لَا یَعْلَمُوْنَ(۳۶) وَ اٰیَةٌ لَّهُمُ الَّیْلُ ۚۖ-نَسْلَخُ مِنْهُ النَّهَارَ فَاِذَا هُمْ مُّظْلِمُوْنَۙ(۳۷) وَ الشَّمْسُ تَجْرِیْ لِمُسْتَقَرٍّ لَّهَاؕ-ذٰلِكَ تَقْدِیْرُ الْعَزِیْزِ الْعَلِیْمِؕ(۳۸) وَ الْقَمَرَ قَدَّرْنٰهُ مَنَازِلَ حَتّٰى عَادَ كَالْعُرْجُوْنِ الْقَدِیْمِ(۳۹) لَا الشَّمْسُ یَنْۢبَغِیْ لَهَاۤ اَنْ تُدْرِكَ الْقَمَرَ وَ لَا الَّیْلُ سَابِقُ النَّهَارِؕ-وَ كُلٌّ فِیْ فَلَكٍ یَّسْبَحُوْنَ(۴۰) وَ اٰیَةٌ لَّهُمْ اَنَّا حَمَلْنَا ذُرِّیَّتَهُمْ فِی الْفُلْكِ الْمَشْحُوْنِۙ(۴۱)َ خَلَقْنَا لَهُمْ مِّنْ مِّثْلِهٖ مَا یَرْكَبُوْنَ(۴۲) وَ اِنْ نَّشَاْ نُغْرِقْهُمْ فَلَا صَرِیْخَ لَهُمْ وَ لَا هُمْ یُنْقَذُوْنَۙ(۴۳) اِلَّا رَحْمَةً مِّنَّا وَ مَتَاعًا اِلٰى حِیْنٍ(۴۴) وَ اِذَا قِیْلَ لَهُمُ اتَّقُوْا مَا بَیْنَ اَیْدِیْكُمْ وَ مَا خَلْفَكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تُرْحَمُوْنَ(۴۵) وَ مَا تَاْتِیْهِمْ مِّنْ اٰیَةٍ مِّنْ اٰیٰتِ رَبِّهِمْ اِلَّا كَانُوْا عَنْهَا مُعْرِضِیْنَ(۴۶) وَ اِذَا قِیْلَ لَهُمْ اَنْفِقُوْا مِمَّا رَزَقَكُمُ اللّٰهُۙ-قَالَ الَّذِیْنَ كَفَرُوْا لِلَّذِیْنَ اٰمَنُوْۤا اَنُطْعِمُ مَنْ لَّوْ یَشَآءُ اللّٰهُ اَطْعَمَهٗۤ ﳓ اِنْ اَنْتُمْ اِلَّا فِیْ ضَلٰلٍ مُّبِیْنٍ(۴۷) وَ یَقُوْلُوْنَ مَتٰى هٰذَا الْوَعْدُ اِنْ كُنْتُمْ صٰدِقِیْنَ(۴۸) مَا یَنْظُرُوْنَ اِلَّا صَیْحَةً وَّاحِدَةً تَاْخُذُهُمْ وَ هُمْ یَخِصِّمُوْنَ(۴۹) فَلَا یَسْتَطِیْعُوْنَ تَوْصِیَةً وَّ لَاۤ اِلٰۤى اَهْلِهِمْ یَرْجِعُوْنَ۠(۵۰) وَ نُفِخَ فِی الصُّوْرِ فَاِذَا هُمْ مِّنَ الْاَجْدَاثِ اِلٰى رَبِّهِمْ یَنْسِلُوْنَ(۵۱) قَالُوْا یٰوَیْلَنَا مَنْۢ بَعَثَنَا مِنْ مَّرْقَدِنَاﱃ هٰذَا مَا وَعَدَ الرَّحْمٰنُ وَ صَدَقَ الْمُرْسَلُوْنَ(۵۲) اِنْ كَانَتْ اِلَّا صَیْحَةً وَّاحِدَةً فَاِذَا هُمْ جَمِیْعٌ لَّدَیْنَا مُحْضَرُوْنَ(۵۳) فَالْیَوْمَ لَا تُظْلَمُ نَفْسٌ شَیْــٴًـا وَّ لَا تُجْزَوْنَ اِلَّا مَا كُنْتُمْ تَعْمَلُوْنَ(۵۴) اِنَّ اَصْحٰبَ الْجَنَّةِ الْیَوْمَ فِیْ شُغُلٍ فٰكِهُوْنَۚ(۵۵) هُمْ وَ اَزْوَاجُهُمْ فِیْ ظِلٰلٍ عَلَى الْاَرَآىٕكِ مُتَّكِــٴُـوْنَ (۵۶) لَهُمْ فِیْهَا فَاكِهَةٌ وَّ لَهُمْ مَّا یَدَّعُوْنَۚۖ(۵۷) سَلٰمٌ قَوْلًا مِّنْ رَّبٍّ رَّحِیْمٍ(۵۸) وَ امْتَازُوا الْیَوْمَ اَیُّهَا الْمُجْرِمُوْنَ(۵۹)َلَمْ اَعْهَدْ اِلَیْكُمْ یٰبَنِیْۤ اٰدَمَ اَنْ لَّا تَعْبُدُوا الشَّیْطٰنَۚ-اِنَّهٗ لَكُمْ عَدُوٌّ مُّبِیْنٌۙ(۶۰) وَّ اَنِ اعْبُدُوْنِیْﳳ-هٰذَا صِرَاطٌ مُّسْتَقِیْمٌ(۶۱) وَ لَقَدْ اَضَلَّ مِنْكُمْ جِبِلًّا كَثِیْرًاؕ-اَفَلَمْ تَكُوْنُوْا تَعْقِلُوْنَ(۶۲) هٰذِهٖ جَهَنَّمُ الَّتِیْ كُنْتُمْ تُوْعَدُوْنَ(۶۳) اِصْلَوْهَا الْیَوْمَ بِمَا كُنْتُمْ تَكْفُرُوْنَ(۶۴) اَلْیَوْمَ نَخْتِمُ عَلٰۤى اَفْوَاهِهِمْ وَ تُكَلِّمُنَاۤ اَیْدِیْهِمْ وَ تَشْهَدُ اَرْجُلُهُمْ بِمَا كَانُوْا یَكْسِبُوْنَ(۶۵) وَ لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلٰۤى اَعْیُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَاَنّٰى یُبْصِرُوْنَ(۶۶) وَ لَوْ نَشَآءُ لَمَسَخْنٰهُمْ عَلٰى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوْا مُضِیًّا وَّ لَا یَرْجِعُوْنَ۠(۶۷) وَ مَنْ نُّعَمِّرْهُ نُنَكِّسْهُ فِی الْخَلْقِؕ-اَفَلَا یَعْقِلُوْنَ(۶۸) وَ مَا عَلَّمْنٰهُ الشِّعْرَ وَ مَا یَنْۢبَغِیْ لَهٗؕ-اِنْ هُوَ اِلَّا ذِكْرٌ وَّ قُرْاٰنٌ مُّبِیْنٌۙ(۶۹) لِّیُنْذِرَ مَنْ كَانَ حَیًّا وَّ یَحِقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى الْكٰفِرِیْنَ(۷۰)اَوَ لَمْ یَرَوْا اَنَّا خَلَقْنَا لَهُمْ مِّمَّا عَمِلَتْ اَیْدِیْنَاۤ اَنْعَامًا فَهُمْ لَهَا مٰلِكُوْنَ(۷۱) وَ ذَلَّلْنٰهَا لَهُمْ فَمِنْهَا رَكُوْبُهُمْ وَ مِنْهَا یَاْكُلُوْنَ(۷۲) وَ لَهُمْ فِیْهَا مَنَافِعُ وَ مَشَارِبُؕ-اَفَلَا یَشْكُرُوْنَ(۷۳) وَ اتَّخَذُوْا مِنْ دُوْنِ اللّٰهِ اٰلِهَةً لَّعَلَّهُمْ یُنْصَرُوْنَؕ(۷۴) لَا یَسْتَطِیْعُوْنَ نَصْرَهُمْۙ-وَ هُمْ لَهُمْ جُنْدٌ مُّحْضَرُوْنَ(۷۵) فَلَا یَحْزُنْكَ قَوْلُهُمْۘ-اِنَّا نَعْلَمُ مَا یُسِرُّوْنَ وَ مَا یُعْلِنُوْنَ(۷۶) اَوَ لَمْ یَرَ الْاِنْسَانُ اَنَّا خَلَقْنٰهُ مِنْ نُّطْفَةٍ فَاِذَا هُوَ خَصِیْمٌ مُّبِیْنٌ(۷۷) وَ ضَرَبَ لَنَا مَثَلًا وَّ نَسِیَ خَلْقَهٗؕ-قَالَ مَنْ یُّحْیِ الْعِظَامَ وَ هِیَ رَمِیْمٌ(۷۸) قُلْ یُحْیِیْهَا الَّذِیْۤ اَنْشَاَهَاۤ اَوَّلَ مَرَّةٍؕ-وَ هُوَ بِكُلِّ خَلْقٍ عَلِیْمُۙ (۷۹) الَّذِیْ جَعَلَ لَكُمْ مِّنَ الشَّجَرِ الْاَخْضَرِ نَارًا فَاِذَاۤ اَنْتُمْ مِّنْهُ تُوْقِدُوْنَ(۸۰) اَوَ لَیْسَ الَّذِیْ خَلَقَ السَّمٰوٰتِ وَ الْاَرْضَ بِقٰدِرٍ عَلٰۤى اَنْ یَّخْلُقَ مِثْلَهُمْ بَلٰىۗ وَ هُوَالْخَلّٰقُ الْعَلِیْمُ(۸۱) اِنَّمَاۤ اَمْرُهٗۤ اِذَاۤ اَرَادَ شَیْــٴًـا اَنْ یَّقُوْلَ لَهٗ كُنْ فَیَكُوْنُ(۸۲) فَسُبْحٰنَ الَّذِیْ بِیَدِهٖ مَلَكُوْتُ كُلِّ شَیْءٍ وَّ اِلَیْهِ تُرْجَعُوْنَ۠(۸۳)
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Ya Sin.By the Qur´an, full of Wisdom,-Thou art indeed one of the messengers,On a Straight Way.It is a Revelation sent down by (Him), the Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.In order that thou mayest admonish a people, whose fathers had received no admonition, and who therefore remain heedless (of the Signs of Allah).The Word is proved true against the greater part of them: for they do not believe.We have put yokes round their necks right up to their chins, so that their heads are forced up (and they cannot see).And We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and further, We have covered them up; so that they cannot see.The same is it to them whether thou admonish them or thou do not admonish them: they will not believe.Thou canst but admonish such a one as follows the Message and fears the (Lord) Most Gracious, unseen: give such a one, therefore, good tidings, of Forgiveness and a Reward most generous.Verily We shall give life to the dead, and We record that which they send before and that which they leave behind, and of all things have We taken account in a clear Book (of evidence).Set forth to them, by way of a parable, the (story of) the Companions of the City. Behold!, there came messengers to it.When We (first) sent to them two messengers, they rejected them: But We strengthened them with a third: they said, “Truly, we have been sent on a mission to you.”The (people) said: “Ye are only men like ourselves; and (Allah) Most Gracious sends no sort of revelation: ye do nothing but lie.”They said: “Our Lord doth know that we have been sent on a mission to you:“And our duty is only to proclaim the clear Message.”The (people) said: “for us, we augur an evil omen from you: if ye desist not, we will certainly stone you. And a grievous punishment indeed will be inflicted on you by us.”They said: “Your evil omens are with yourselves: (deem ye this an evil omen). If ye are admonished? Nay, but ye are a people transgressing all bounds!”Then there came running, from the farthest part of the City, a man, saying, “O my people! Obey the messengers:“Obey those who ask no reward of you (for themselves), and who have themselves received Guidance.“It would not be reasonable in me if I did not serve Him Who created me, and to Whom ye shall (all) be brought back.“Shall I take (other) gods besides Him? If (Allah) Most Gracious should intend some adversity for me, of no use whatever will be their intercession for me, nor can they deliver me.“I would indeed, if I were to do so, be in manifest Error.“For me, I have faith in the Lord of you (all): listen, then, to me!”It was said: “Enter thou the Garden.” He said: “Ah me! Would that my People knew (what I know)!-“For that my Lord has granted me Forgiveness and has enrolled me among those held in honour!”And We sent not down against his People, after him, any hosts from heaven, nor was it needful for Us so to do.It was no more than a single mighty Blast, and behold! they were (like ashes) quenched and silent.Ah! Alas for (My) Servants! There comes not a messenger to them but they mock him!See they not how many generations before them we destroyed? Not to them will they return:But each one of them all – will be brought before Us (for judgment).A Sign for them is the earth that is dead: We do give it life, and produce grain therefrom, of which ye do eat.And We produce therein orchard with date-palms and vines, and We cause springs to gush forth therein:That they may enjoy the fruits of this (artistry): It was not their hands that made this: will they not then give thanks? Glory to Allah, Who created in pairs all things that the earth produces, as well as their own (human) kind and (other) things of which they have no knowledge.And a Sign for them is the Night: We withdraw therefrom the Day, and behold they are plunged in darkness;And the sun runs his course for a period determined for him: that is the decree of (Him), the Exalted in Might, the All-Knowing.And the Moon,- We have measured for her mansions (to traverse) till she returns like the old (and withered) lower part of a date-stalk.It is not permitted to the Sun to catch up the Moon, nor can the Night outstrip the Day: Each (just) swims along in (its own) orbit (according to Law).And a Sign for them is that We bore their race (through the Flood) in the loaded Ark;And We have created for them similar (vessels) on which they ride.If it were Our Will, We could drown them: then would there be no helper (to hear their cry), nor could they be delivered,Except by way of Mercy from Us, and by way of (world) convenience (to serve them) for a time.When they are told, “Fear ye that which is before you and that which will be after you, in order that ye may receive Mercy,” (they turn back).Not a Sign comes to them from among the Signs of their Lord, but they turn away therefrom.And when they are told, “Spend ye of (the bounties) with which Allah has provided you,” the Unbelievers say to those who believe: “Shall we then feed those whom, if Allah had so willed, He would have fed, (Himself)?- Ye are in nothing but manifest error.” Further, they say, “When will this promise (come to pass), if what ye say is true?”They will not (have to) wait for aught but a single Blast: it will seize them while they are yet disputing among themselves! No (chance) will they then have, by will, to dispose (of their affairs), nor to return to their own people! The trumpet shall be sounded, when behold! from the sepulchres (men) will rush forth to their Lord! They will say: “Ah! Woe unto us! Who hath raised us up from our beds of repose?”… (A voice will say:) “This is what (Allah) Most Gracious had promised. And true was the word of the messengers!” It will be no more than a single Blast, when lo! they will all be brought up before Us!Then, on that Day, not a soul will be wronged in the least, and ye shall but be repaid the meeds of your past Deeds. Verily the Companions of the Garden shall that Day have joy in all that they do; They and their associates will be in groves of (cool) shade, reclining on Thrones (of dignity); (Every) fruit (enjoyment) will be there for them; they shall have whatever they call for; “Peace!” – a word (of salutation) from a Lord Most Merciful! “And O ye in sin! Get ye apart this Day! “Did I not enjoin on you, O ye Children of Adam, that ye should not worship Satan; for that he was to you an enemy avowed?- “And that ye should worship Me, (for that) this was the Straight Way? “But he did lead astray a great multitude of you. Did ye not, then, understand? “This is the Hell of which ye were (repeatedly) warned! “Embrace ye the (fire) this Day, for that ye (persistently) rejected (Truth).” That Day shall We set a seal on their mouths. But their hands will speak to us, and their feet bear witness, to all that they did. If it had been our Will, We could surely have blotted out their eyes; then should they have run about groping for the Path, but how could they have seen? And if it had been Our Will, We could have transformed them (to remain) in their places; then should they have been unable to move about, nor could they have returned (after error).If We grant long life to any, We cause him to be reversed in nature: Will they not then understand? We have not instructed the (Prophet) in Poetry, nor is it meet for him: this is no less than a Message and a Qur´an making things clear: That it may give admonition to any (who are) alive, and that the charge may be proved against those who reject (Truth).See they not that it is We Who have created for them – among the things which Our hands have fashioned – cattle, which are under their dominion?-And that We have subjected them to their (use)? of them some do carry them and some they eat:And they have (other) profits from them (besides), and they get (milk) to drink. Will they not then be grateful? Yet they take (for worship) gods other than Allah, (hoping) that they might be helped!They have not the power to help them: but they will be brought up (before Our Judgment-seat) as a troop (to be condemned).Let not their speech, then, grieve thee. Verily We know what they hide as well as what they disclose.Doth not man see that it is We Who created him from sperm? yet behold! he (stands forth) as an open adversary! And he makes comparisons for Us, and forgets his own (origin and) Creation: He says, “Who can give life to (dry) bones and decomposed ones (at that)?”Say, “He will give them life Who created them for the first time! for He is Well-versed in every kind of creation!- “The same Who produces for you fire out of the green tree, when behold! ye kindle therewith (your own fires)! “Is not He Who created the heavens and the earth able to create the like thereof?” – Yea, indeed! for He is the Creator Supreme, of skill and knowledge (infinite)! Verily, when He intends a thing, His Command is, “be”, and it is! So glory to Him in Whose hands is the dominion of all things: and to Him will ye be all brought back.

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: O Allah shower Your Peace and Blessing on our Most Honorable Muhammad, and his Folks and Companions.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ يا عَليُّ يا عَظيمُ يا حَلِيمُ يا عَلِيمُ. أَنْتَ رَبِّي وَعِلْمُكَ حَسْبِي. فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ رَبِّي وَنِعْمَ الحَسْبُ حَسْبي
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh, Allah, Oh Most High, Oh Great, Oh Tolerant, and All-Knowing. You are my Lord; Your Knowledge is my sufficiency. How perfect is my Lord and my sufficiency.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma ya 'Aliyyu ya 'Azim ya Halim ya 'Alim. Anta rabbi wa 'ilmu ka hasbi. Fani'ma ar-rabbu rabbi wa ni'ma al-hasbu hasbi

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: تَنْصُرُ مَنْ تَشَاءُ وَأنْتَ العَزيزُ الرَّحِيمُ. نَسْألُكَ العِصْمَةَ فِي الحَرَكاتِ والسَّـكَنَـاتِ وَالْكَلِمَاتِ والْإِرَادَاتِ وَالْخَطَرَاتِ مِنَ الشُكُوكِ والظُّنونِ والأوْهـَامِ السَّـاتِرَةِ للقُلُوبِ عنْ مُطَالَعَةِ الغُيُوبِ. فَقَدْ ابْتُلِيَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ وَزُلْزِلُوا زِلْزَالًا شَدِيدًا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: You give support to whom You choose; You are the Almighty and the Merciful. We ask Your protection throughout our motions and rest, in utterances, desires, and our thoughts from doubts, and suspicion, and the illusions that veil our hearts from the perception of the unseen. Truly have the Believers been really tested, and deeply shaken.(33:11).
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Tansuru man tasha’u wa anta al-'Azizu ar-Rahim. Nas'aluka al-'Ismata fi al-harakat wa as-sakanat wa al-kalimat wa al-'iradat wa al-khatarat mina ash-shukuki wa az-zununi wal-awham as-satira li qulubina 'an mutala'at al-ghuyub. Faqad ibtuliya al-mu'minun wa zulzilu zulzalan shadidan

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: وَإِذْ يَقُولُ الْمُنَافِقُونَ وَالَّذِينَ فِي قُلُوبِهِمْ مَرَضٌ مَا وَعَدَنَا اللَّهُ وَرَسُولُهُ إِلَّا غُرُورًا.
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: The Hypocrites, and the sick-hearted, would say 'Allah and His Messenger did not promise us other than delusion (33:12).
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa idh yaqulu al-munafiquna wal-ladhina fi qulubihim maradun ma wa'adana Allahu wa rasuluhu illa ghururan

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَثَبِّتْنَا وانْصُرْنَا وسَخِّرْ لَنَا هَذَا البَحْرَ كَمَا سخَّرْتَ البَحْرَ لمُوْسَى. وسَخَّرْتَ النَارَ لِإِبْرَاهِيمَ. وسَخَّرْتَ الجِبَالَ والحَدِيْدَ لِدَاوُدَ. وَسَخَّرْتَ الرِّيحَ والشَّيَاطِينَ والجِنَّ لِسُلَيْمَانَ. وَسَخِّرْ لَنَا كُلَّ بَحْرٍ هُوَ لَكَ فِي الأرْضِ وَالسَّمَاءِ وَالْمُلْكِ وَالْمَلَكُوتِ. وَبَـحْرَ الدُّنْياَ وَبـَحْرَ الآخِرةِ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: So, hold us on track, support us; and employ for us this ocean the way You employed the ocean for Musa; the fire for Ibrahim; the mountains and iron for Dawūd; and the wind, the demons and jinn for Solomon. Employ for us every ocean (means and trigger) that belongs to You, on the earth, or heavens, in the Seen or the Unseen worlds, as well as the ocean of this life and the ocean of the Afterlife.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Fathabbitna wa ansurna wa sakhkhir lana hadha al-bahra kama sakhkharta al-bahra li Musa. Wa sakhkharta an-nara li Ibrahim. Wa sakhkharta al-jibala wal-hadida li Dawud. Wa sakhkharta ar-riha wa ash-shayatin wal-jinna li Sulayman. Wa sakhkhir lana kulla bahrin huwa laka fi al-ard wa as-sama'i wa al-mulk wa al-malakut. Wa bahr al-dunya wa bahr al-akhira

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَسَخِّرْ لَنا كُلَّ شَيءٍ يَا مَنْ بِيَدِهِ مَلَكُوتُ كُلِّ شَيءٍ
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Employ for us everything; oh You in whose hand is the true control of everything.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sakhkhir lana kulla shay'in ya man biyadihi malakutu kulla shay'in

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: كَهَيَعَصَ
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: KAF-HA-YA-AIN-SAD.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ain-Sad

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اُنْصُرْنا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ النَّاصِرِيْن. * وافْتَحْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الفَاتِحِيْن * واغْفِرْ لَنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الغَافِرْين * وارْحَمْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِيْن * وارْزُقْنَا فَإنَّكَ خَيْرُ الرَّازِقِيْن * واهْدِنَا وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ القَوْمِ الظَّالمِيْن * وَهَبْ لَنَا رِيْحَاً طَيِّبَةً كَمَا هِيَ في عِلْمِكَ. وانْشُرْهَا عَلَيْنَا مِنْ خَزائِنِ رَحْمَتِكَ. واحْمِلْناَ بِهَا حَمْلَ الْكَرَامَةِ مَعَ السَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيَةِ فِي الدِّيْنِ والدُّنْيَا والآخِرَةِ. إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ. اللَّهُمَّ يَسِّرْ لَنَا أُمُوْرَنَا مَعَ الرَّاحَةِ لِقُلُوبِنَا وأبْدَانِنَا. والسَّلَاَمةِ والعَافِيةِ فِي دِيْنِنَا ودُنْيَانَا
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Support us; You are the best of supporters. Open the doors of opportunities to us; You are the best of Openers. Forgive us; You are the best of Forgivers. Have mercy on us; You are the Most Merciful. Give us sustenance; You are the best Sustainer. Guide us and save us from the wrongdoers. Grant us a goodly wind as may be in Your knowledge; and release it upon us from the storehouses of Your Mercy; carry us with this wind honourably with safety, protection and wellbeing in our religion in this world and the world to come. Truly You the All-Arranging. Allah, facilitate our affairs for us with ease for our hearts and bodies and security and wellbeing in our worldly life and religion.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Unsuruna fa innaka khayru an-nasirin. Waftah lana fa innaka khayru al-fatin. Waghfir lana fa innaka khayru al-ghafirin. Warhamna fa innaka khayru ar-rahimin.
