Warzuqna fa innaka khayru ar-razikin. Wahdina wa najjina min al-qawmi az-zalimin. Wahib lana rihan tayyibatan kama hiya fi ilmika. Unshurha alayna min khaza'in rahmatika. Wahmilna biha hamla al-karamati ma'a as-salamati wal-'afiyati fi ad-dini wa ad-dunya wal-akhirah. Innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadir. Allahumma yassir lana umurana ma'a ar-rahati li qulubina wa abdanina. Was-salamati wal-'afiyati fi dinina wa dunyaana

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَكُنْ لَنَا صَاحِبَاً فِي سَفَرِنَا.  وَخَلِيْفَةً فِي أَهْلِنَا. وَاطْمِسْ عَلَى وُجُوهِ أَعْدَائِنَا وامْسَخْهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهمْ فَلاَ يَسْتَطِيْعُونَ المُضِيَّ وَلاَ المَجِيءَ إلَيْنا
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: Be our companion in our journeys, and keep watch over our families that we leave behind. Blind the faces of our enemies and paralyze them in places where they stand so they can neither move nor reach us.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa kun lana sahibatan fi safarina. Wa khalifatan fi ahlina. Watmas 'ala wujuh 'a'dainna wa msakhum 'ala makanitihim fala yasta'ti'una al-mudhiya wa la al-maji'a ilayna

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَطَمَسْنَا عَلَى أَعْيُنِهِمْ فَاسْتَبَقُوا الصِّرَاطَ فَأَنَّى يُبْصِرُونَ.  وَلَوْ نَشَاءُ لَمَسَخْنَاهُمْ عَلَى مَكَانَتِهِمْ فَمَا اسْتَطَاعُوا مُضِيًّا وَلَا يَرْجِعُونَ. يَس. وَالْقُرْآنِ الْحَكِيمِ. إِنَّكَ لَمِنْ الْمُرْسَلِينَ. عَلَى صِرَاطٍ مُسْتَقِيمٍ. تَنْزِيلَ الْعَزِيزِ الرَّحِيمِ. لِتُنْذِرَ قَوْمًا مَا أُنْذِرَ آبَاؤُهُمْ فَهُمْ غَافِلُونَ. لَقَدْ حَقَّ الْقَوْلُ عَلَى أَكْثَرِهِمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُؤْمِنُونَ. إِنَّا جَعَلْنَا فِي أَعْنَاقِهِمْ أَغْلَالًا فَهِيَ إِلَى الْأَذْقَانِ فَهُمْ مُقْمَحُونَ. وَجَعَلْنَا مِنْ بَيْنِ أَيْدِيْهِمْ سَدًّا وَمِنْ خَلْفِهِمْ سَدًّا فَأَغْشَيْنَاهُمْ فَهُمْ لَا يُبْصِرُونَ.
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: If We wished, we could have blind their eyes so they miss the path; how could they see. If We wished, We could have paralyzed them in place, so they could not move forward or return back”; “Yasin, by the Wise Quran, you are one of the Messengers on the straight path. The revelation by the Almighty and Merciful is to warn a people whose ancestors were not warned; as a result, they were ignorant. Most of them were doomed; they do not believe. We have put yokes around their necks up to the chins. Therefore, their heads are forced up and they cannot see the way. We have put a bar in front of them and a bar behind them, and We have covered their eyes so they cannot see
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa law nasha'u latamassna 'ala a'yunihim fastabiqu al-sirata fa'an-naa yubsirun. Wa law nasha'u lamasakhnahum 'ala makanatihim fama istata'u mudi'an wala yarji'un. Yas. Wal-Qur'an al-Hakim. Innaka lamin al-mursalin. 'Ala siratin mustaqim. Tanzil al-Aziz al-Rahim. Litunzir qawman ma unzira aba'uhum fahum ghafilun. Laqad haqq al-qawlu 'ala aktharihim fahum la yu'minun. Inna ja'alna fi a'nakihim aghlal-an fahiya ila al-adhqan fahum muqmahun. Waja'alna min bayni aydeehim saddan wa min khalfihim saddan fa'ghashaynahum fahum la yubsirun.

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: شَاهَتِ الْوُجُوهْ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: May the faces be humbled.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Shāhatil wujūh

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَعَنَتِ الْوُجُوهُ لِلْحَيِّ الْقَيُّومِ وَقَدْ خَابَ مَنْ حَمَلَ ظُلْمًا
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: The faces shall be humbled before the Living, the Self-subsisting; those who carried wrong will be losers.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa 'anatil wujūhu lil-ḥayyil qayyūm, wa qad khāba man ḥamala ẓulman

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: طس. حم عسق. مَرَجَ الْبَحْرَيْنِ يَلْتَقِيَانِ. بَيْنَهُمَا بَرْزَخٌ لَا يَبْغِيَانِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: TASIN, ḤAMIM, AIN-SIN QAF. The two seas have met; there is a barrier between them so they do not mix.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Ṭā-Sīn. Ḥāmīm, 'Ayn-Sīn-Qāf. Maraja al-baḥrayni yaltaqiyān, baynahumā barzakhan lā yabghiyān

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: حَم
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: ḤA-MIM.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥāmīm

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: حُمَّ الأَمْرُ وَجَاءَ النَّصْرُ فَعَلَيْنَا لا يُنْصَرُوْن
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: The issue is heated. Victory is hoped for, and no one can defeat us.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Hummal amru wa jā'a an-naṣru fa 'alaynā lā yunsarūn

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: حم.  تَنزِيلُ الْكِتَابِ مِنَ اللَّهِ الْعَزِيزِ الْعَلِيمِ. غَافِرِ الذَّنْبِ وَقَابِلِ التَّوْبِ شَدِيدِ الْعِقَابِ ذِي الطَّوْلِ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ إِلَيْهِ الْمَصِيرُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: Ḥa-mim. The Book was descended from Allah, the All-Powerful, The All-Knowing. Forgiver of sins, Accepter of repentance, strict in punishment, infinite in bounty. There is no god but Him; to Him is the final destination.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥāmīm. Tanzīlu al-kitābi min Allāhi al-‘Azīzi al-‘Alīm. Ghāfirī az-zanbi wa qābilī at-tawbī, shadīdi al-‘iqābi dhī at-ṭawli, lā ilāha illā huwa ilayhi al-maṣīr

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ بابُنَا. تَبَارَكَ حِيطَانُنَا. يس سَقْفُنا. كَهَيَعَصَ كِفايَتُنَا. حَم عَسِقَ حِمَـايَتُنَـا
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: Bismillah is our door; Surat Tabarak is our walls; Surat Yasin is our roof; Surat Kaf-Ha-Ya-ain-Ṣad is our sufficiency; Surat Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf is our protection.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi bābunā. Tabārakā ḥīṭānunā. Yāsīn saqfunā. Kā-Hā-Yā-‘Ayn-Ṣād kifāyatunā. Ḥāmīm-‘Ayn-Sīn-Qāf ḥimāyatunā

wird_id_18.en_wird_description: Allah will suffice you against them; He is the Most Hearing and Knowledgeable.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Fasayakfīkahumu Allāhu wa huwa as-Samī‘u al-‘Alīm

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: سِتْرُ العَرْشِ مَسْبُولٌ عَلَيْنَا. وَعَيْنُ اللهِ نَاظِرَةٌ إِلَيْنَا.  بِحَوْلِ اللهِ لاَ يُقْدَرُ عَلَيْنَا. وَاللَّهُ مِنْ وَرَائِهِمْ مُحِيْطٌ. بَلْ هُوَ قُرْآنٌ مَجِيدٌ.  فِي لَوْحٍ مَحْفُوظٍ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: The veil of the Throne is lowered upon us. The eye of Allah is looking at us. By the power of Allah, they will not be able to defeat us. Allah is All-Embracing beyond their reach. Nay, it is a glorious Quran in a preserved tablet.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Sitrul ‘Arshi masbūlun ‘alaynā. Wa ‘Aynullāhi nāẓiratun ilaynā. Biḥawli Allāhi lā yuqdar ‘alaynā. Wa Allāhu min warā’ihim muḥīṭ. Bal huwa Qur’ānum majīd. Fī lawḥin maḥfūẓ

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: فَاللَّهُ خَيْرٌ حَافِظًا وَهُوَ أَرْحَمُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: Allah is the best protector. He is the Most Merciful of the Merciful.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa-Allāhu khayrun ḥāfiẓan wa huwa ar-ḥamu ar-rahimīn

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ وَلِيِّيَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي نَزَّلَ الْكِتَابَ وَهُوَ يَتَوَلَّى الصَّالِحِينَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: My Guardian is Allah Who descends the Book; He cares for the Righteous.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna walīyyī Allāhu alladhī nazzala al-kitāba wahuwa yatawallā aṣ-ṣāliḥīn

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: حَسْبِي اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: Allah is my sufficiency; there is no god but Him. On Him I rely; He is the Lord of the Great Throne.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Ḥasbī Allāhu lā ilāha illā huwa ‘alayhi tawakkaltu wahuwa rabbul-‘arshi al-‘aẓīm

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: بِسْمِ اللهِ الَّذِي لَا يَضُرُّ مَعَ اسْمِهِ شَيءٌ في الأَرْضِ وَلَا في السَّمَاءِ وَهُوَ السَّمِيْعُ العَليْم
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: In the name of Allah, with Whose name nothing may harm in earth or in heaven; He is the Most Hearing and All Knowing.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillāhi alladhī lā yaḍurru ma‘a ismihi shay’un fī al-arḍi walā fī as-samā’i wahuwa as-Samī‘u al-‘Alīm

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: أَعُوْذُ بِكَلِمَاتِ الله التَّامَّاتِ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the perfect words of Allah from the evil of what He created.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: A‘ūdhu bikalimāti Allāhi at-tāmmāti min sharri mā khalaq

wird_id_25.ar_wird_description: وَلَا حَوْلَ وَلَا قُوَّةَ إِلاَّ بِالله العَلِيِّ العَظِيْم
wird_id_25.en_wird_description: No power, or strength, except by Allah, the Most High and Great.
wird_id_25.ar_wird_transliteration: Walā ḥawla walā quwwata illā bi-Allāhi al-‘Alīyi al-‘Azīm

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: وَصَلّى اللهُ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلَّم
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: Allah bless Honourable Muhammad, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: Waṣallā Allāhu ‘alā sayyidinā Muḥammadin wa ‘alā ālihi wa ṣaḥbihi wa sallam

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِين * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: Glorified is your Lord; the Lord of Honour above what they describe. Peace be on the Prophets. All Praise belongs to Allah, Lord of all universe.
wird_id_27.ar_wird_transliteration: Subḥāna rabbika rabbil-‘izzati ‘ammā yaṣifūn * Wasalāmun ‘alā al-mursalīn * Wal-ḥamdu li-Allāhi rabbil-‘ālamīn

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ الْعَظِيمِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ، بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَٰنِ الرَّحِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in the Almighty Allah, from the accursed Devil.In the name of Allah Most Gracious and Merciful.
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A'oozu billahi al-'azheemi mina ash-shaytani ar-rajeem, Bismillah ir-Rahman ir-Raheem

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: وَإِذَا جَاءَكَ الَّذِينَ يُؤْمِنُونَ بِآيَاتِنَا فَقُلْ سَلَامٌ عَلَيْكُمْ كَتَبَ رَبُّكُمْ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ الرَّحْمَةَ أَنَّهُ مَنْ عَمِلَ مِنْكُمْ سُوءًا بِجَهَالَةٍ ثُمَّ تَابَ مِنْ بَعْدِهِ وَأَصْلَحَ فَأَنَّهُ غَفُورٌ رَحِيمٌ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: And when those who believe in our signs come to you, say: Peace be upon you; your Lord has prescribed mercy for Himself: whoever of you does wickedness in ignorance, then afterwards repents and makes amends, He is All –forgiving, All Merciful.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa iza ja'aka alladhina yu'minoona bi ayatina faqul salaamun 'alaykum, kataba rabbukum 'ala nafsihi ar-rahmah annahu man 'amila minkum su'an bijahalah thumma taaba min ba'dihi wa aslaha fa'innahu ghafurun raheem

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ أَنَّى يَكُونُ لَهُ وَلَدٌ وَلَمْ تَكُنْ لَهُ صَاحِبَةٌ وَخَلَقَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ وَهُوَ بِكُلِّ شَيْءٍ عَلِيمٌ * ذَلِكُمُ اللَّهُ رَبُّكُمْ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ خَالِقُ كُلِّ شَيْءٍ فَاعْبُدُوهُ وَهُوَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ وَكِيلٌ * لَا تُدْرِكُهُ الْأَبْصَارُ وَهُوَ يُدْرِكُ الْأَبْصَارَ وَهُوَ اللَّطِيفُ الْخَبِيرُ
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: Originator of the heavens and the earth” How should He have a son, but has no consort, but He has created everything and knows all things. That is Allah your Lord: there is No God but Him, Creator of everything, so worship Him, for everything is in His care. “Eyes see Him not but He sees eyes, and he is the All Subtle, The All- Aware.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Badee'u as-samawati wal-ard, anna yakoonu lahu waladun walam takun lahu saahibah, wakhalaqa kulla shay'in wa huwa bikulli shay'in 'aleem. Thalikumullahu rabbukum la ilaha illa huwa, khaliqu kulla shay'in fa'budoohoo wa huwa 'ala kulli shay'in wakeel. La tudrikuhu al-absar wa huwa yudrikul-absar wa huwa al-lateefu al-khabeer

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: *آلر * كَهَيَعَصَ* حم عسق
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: Alif-Lam-Ra; Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ayn-Sad; Hamim-Ayn-Sin-Qaf.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Alif-Lam-Ra; Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ayn-Sad; Hamim-Ayn-Sin-Qaf

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: رَبِّ احْكُمْ ‎بِالْحَقِّ وَرَبُّنَا الرَّحْمَنُ الْمُسْتَعَانُ عَلَى مَا تَصِفُونَ
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: My Lord Judges in truth; and our Lord is All Merciful, the Helper against what you Ascribe.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Rabbi hukm bi-l-haqqi wa rabbuna ar-Rahmanu al-musta'anu 'ala ma tasifoon

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: طه مَا أَنْزَلْنَا عَلَيْكَ الْقُرْآنَ لِتَشْقَى * إِلَّا تَذْكِرَةً لِمَنْ يَخْشَى * تَنزِيلًا مِمَّنْ خَلَقَ الْأَرْضَ وَالسَّمَاوَاتِ الْعُلَا * الرَّحْمَنُ عَلَى الْعَرْشِ اسْتَوَى * لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا وَمَا تَحْتَ الثَّرَى * وَإِنْ تَجْهَرْ بِالْقَوْلِ فَإِنَّهُ يَعْلَمُ السِّرَّ وَأَخْفَى
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: Ta-Ha. We have not sent down the Quran upon you so that you be unfortunate, but rather as a reminder to those who fear. A sending down from Him Who created the earth and the high heavens. The All Merciful is exalted over the Throne. To Him belongs What is in the heavens and earth, and what is between and under the ground. And if you speak aloud He knows the hidden and more secret.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Ta-Ha. Ma anzalna 'alayka al-Qur'ana litashqa. Illa tathkiratan liman yakhsha. Tanzilan mimman khalaqa al-arda wa as-samawati al-'ula. Ar-Rahmanu 'ala al-'arshi istawa. Lahu ma fi as-samawati wa ma fi al-ardi wa ma baynahuma wa ma taht as-saraa. Wa in tajhar bil-qawli fa'innahu ya'lamu as-sirra wa akhfa

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ لَهُ الْأَسْمَاءُ الْحُسْنَى
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Allah, There is no God but He, to Him belongs the Grand names.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahu la ilaha illa huwa, lahu al-asmaa' al-husna

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّكَ تَعلَمُ أَنِّي باِلجَهَالَةِ مَعْرُوفٌ * وَأَنْتَ بِالعِلْمِ مَوْصُوفٌ * وَقَدْ وَسِعْتَ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ مِنْ جَهَالَتي بِعِلْمِكَ * فَسَعْ ذَلِكَ بِرَحْمَتِكَ كَمَا وَسِعْتَهُ بِعِلْمِكَ وَاغْفِرْ لِي *إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: O Allah! You know well that I am known for ignorance, while knowledge is your attribute. You encompass everything of my ignorance with Your knowledge, so encompass it with your mercy as You have with your knowledge and forgive me: Truly You have power over all things.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma innaka ta'lamu anni bil-jahalah ma'roofun wa anta bil-'ilmi mawsufun wa qad wasi'ta kulla shay'in min jahalahati bi'ilmika, fa-sa' dhālika bi-rahmatika kama wasi'tahu bi'ilmika waghfir li, innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadeer

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: يا اَللهُ يَا مَالِكُ يَا وَهَّابُ هَبْ لَنَا مِنْ نَعْمَائِكَ مَا عَلِمْتَ لَنَا فِيهِ رِضَاكَ وَاكْسُنَا كِسْوَةً تَقِينَا بِها مِنَ الفِتَنِ فِي جَمِيعِ عَطاياَكَ * وَقَدِّسْنَا بِهَا عَنْ كُلِّ وَصْفٍ يُوجِبُ نَقْصاً مِمَّا اسْتَأْثَرْتَ بِهِ في عِلْمِكَ عَمَّنْ سِوَاكَ
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: O Allah, O Master, and O Bounteous: Bestow on us of your gifts that which You know carries Your pleasure. Clothe us in garment with which You protect us from tribulations in all of your gifts; and cleanse us of every attribute that brings about shortcomings known to Your knowledge that You vouchsafe to no-one else.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Allahu ya Maaliku ya Wahhaabu hab lana min na'amayika ma 'alimta lana feehi ridhak wa kawnasa kiswatan tuqeena biha min al-fitani fee jamee'i 'ataayaka, wa quddisna biha 'an kulli wasfin yoojeebu naqsa mimma ista'tharta bihi fee 'ilmika 'amman siwaaka

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: يَا اَللهُ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَلِيُّ يَا كَبِيرُ * نَسْأَلُكَ الفَقْرَ مِمَّا سِوَاكَ * وَالْغِنَى بِكَ حَتَى لاَ نَشْهَدَ إِلاَّ إِيَّاكَ * وَالْطُفْ بِنَا فِيهِمَا لُطْفاً عَلِمْتَهُ يَصلُحُ لِمَنْ وَالاَكَ * وَاكْسُنَا جَلاَبِيْبَ الْعِصْمَةِ فِي الأنْفَاسِ واللَّحَظَاتِ * وَاجْعَلْنا عَبِيْداً لَكَ فِي جَمِيعِ الْحَالاَتِ * وَعَلِّمْنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ عِلْماً نَصِيرُ بِهِ كَامِلَينَ فِي الْمَحْيَا وَاْلمَمَاتِ
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: O Allah, O Great, O High, O Immense, We ask You for poverty from everything but You, and richness through You until we see nothing besides; and show us in both a kindness You know befits those who love You. And clothe us in cloaks of protection in all breaths and moments; and make us slaves to You in all conditions; and teach us knowledge from You through which we reach perfection in life and after death.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Allahu ya 'azeemu ya 'alee ya kabeer, nas'aluka al-faqra mimma siwaaka, wal-ghinaaa bika hatta la nashhada illa 'iayaka, waltufu binaa feehimaa lutfan 'alimtahu yasluhoo liman walayaka, wakisooona jalabeeba al-'ismah fi al-anfasi wal-lahadhati, waja'ilna abidan laka fi jamee'i al-halaati, wa'allimna min ladunka 'ilman naseeru bihi kaamilayna fi al-mahyaa wal-mamaat

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ أَنْتَ الْحَمِيْدُ * الرَّبُّ المَجِيْدُ الفَعَّالُ لِماَ تُرِيدُ * تَعْلَمُ فَرَحَنَا بِمَاذَا وَلِمَاذَا وَعَلَى مَاذَا وَتَعْلَمُ حُزْنَنَا كَذلِكَ * وَقَدْ أَوْجَبْتَ كَوْنَ مَا أَرَدْتَهُ فِيْنَا ومِنَّا وَلاَ نَسْأَلُكَ دَفْعَ مَا تُرِيدُ * وَلَكِنْ نَسْأَلُكَ التَّأيِيدَ بِرُوحٍ مِنْ عِندِكَ فِيمَا تُريدُ * كَمَا أيَّدْتَ أنْبِيَاءَكَ وَرُسُلَكَ وَخَاصَّةَ الصِّدِّيقِينَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ * إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: O Allah You are the All-Praised, the Noble Lord; the Doer of Whatever He wills; You know what our rejoicing is about, and why, and over what; and likewise You know our sorrow. You have destined what You want, in us and from us, and we do not ask You to avert what You want, but that You aid us with a spirit from You in what You want, as You aided your Prophets and Messengers and the elect of the Great Truthful ones of Your creation. Truly You are the All-Arranging.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma anta al-hameedu rabbul majeedu al-fa'alu lima tureedu, ta'lamu farahnaa bimaadha wa limadha wa 'ala maadha, wa ta'lamu huznanaa kadhalik, wa qad awjabta kawn ma aradtahu feena wa minna wa laa nas'alu ka daf' ma tureedu, walakin nas'alu ka at-tayeed bi roohin minkafi ma tureedu, kama ayyadtanbiyaa'ka wa rusuluka wa khaasat as-siddiqeen min khalqika, innaka 'ala kuli shay'in qadeer

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ فَاطِرَ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضِ عَالِمَ الْغَيْبِ وَالشَّهَادَةِ أَنْتَ تَحْكُمُ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ * فَهَنِيئاً لِمَنْ عَرَفَكَ فَرَضِي بِقَضَائِكَ وِالْوَيْلُ لِمَنْ لَمْ يَعْرِفْكَ بَلِ الْوَيْلُ ثُمَّ الْوَيْلُ لِمَنْ أَقَرَّ بوَحْدَانِيَّتِكَ وَلَمْ يَرْضَ بِأحْكَامِكَ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: O Allah Maker of the heavens and earth, Knower of the unseen and manifest, You judge between your servants, so good tidings to him who knows You and is pleased with Your decree, and woe to him who does not know You, and woe to him who affirms Your oneness, but does not accept your rulings.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma faatiru as-samawati wal-ardi 'aalima al-ghaybi wa as-shahaadati anta tahkumu bayna 'ibaadika, fa-haneean liman 'arafaka farda bi qudhaaa'ika wal-waylu liman lam ya'rifka, balil-waylu thumma al-waylu liman aqara bi wahdaaniyyatika wa lam yarda bi ahkaamika

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ القَومَ قَدْ حَكَمْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِالذُّلِّ حتَّى عَزُّوا * وَحَكَمْتَ عَلَيهِمْ بِالْفَقْدِ حتَّى وَجَدُوا * فَكُلُّ عِزٍّ يَمْنَعُ دُونَكَ فَنَسْأَلُكَ بَدَلَهُ ذُلاًّ تَصْحَبُهُ لَطَائِفُ رَحمَتِكَ * وَكُلُّ وَجْدٍ يّحْجُبُ عَنْكَ فَنَسْأَلُكَ عِوَضَهُ فَقْدًا تَصْحَبُهُ أَنْوَارُ مَحَبَّتِكَ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: O Allah, You have sentenced Your saints to abasement until they attained dignity; and sentenced them to loss until they became conscious. For any glory that would take us away from You, we ask instead an abasement that is accompanied with the gentleness of Your mercy. For any consciousness that would stand between You, and us we ask instead a loss associated with the light of Your love.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inna al-qawma qad hakamta 'alayhim bizzulli hatta 'azzu, wa hakamta 'alayhim bilfaqdi hatta wajadoo, fa-kullu 'izzin yamna'u doonaka fanas'alu ka badalahu dhullan tas'habuhu lataa'ifu rahmatika, wa kullu wujdin yahjubu 'anka fanas'alu ka 'iwadhahu faqdan tas'habuhu anwaar muhabbatika

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: فَإِنَّهُ قَدْ ظَهَرَتِ السَّعَادَةُ عَلَى مَنْ أحْبَبْتَهُ * وَظَهَرَتِ الشَّقَاوَةُ عَلَى مَنْ غَيرُكَ مَلَكَهُ * فَهَبْ لَنَا مِنْ مَوَاهِبِ السُّعَدَاءِ * واعْصِمْنَا مِن مَوَارِدِ الأَشْقِيَاءِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: For felicity has appeared in whomever You Love, and perdition appeared in whoever is owned by anything else. So bestow on us the gifts of those of felicity, and keep us from the path of the unfortunate.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa'innahu qad zaharat as-sa'adatu 'ala man ahbabtahu, wa zaharat as-shaqawatu 'ala man ghayruka malakahu, fa-hab lana min mawaahibi as-su'adaa'i, wa 'asimna min mawareedi al-ashqiyaaa'i

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا قَدْ عَجَزْنَا عَنْ دَفْعِ الضُّرِ عَنْ أَنْفُسِنَا مِنْ حَيْثُ نَعْلَمُ بِمَا نَعْلَمُ * فَكَيْفَ لَا نَعْجَزُ عَنْ ذلِكَ مِنْ حَيْثُ لاَ نَعْلَمُ بِمَا لاَ نَعْلَمُ
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: O Allah, we have been unable to ward off anticipated harm from ourselves, solely by the means accessible to us. So how could we ever ward off unanticipated harm from ourselves by means that are not accessible to us.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inna qad 'ajaznaa 'an dafi'i ad-dhuri 'an anfusinaa mimma na'lamu bimaa na'lamu, fa-kaifa laa na'jizu 'an dhalika mimma laa na'lamu bimaa laa na'lamu

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: وقَدْ أمَرْتَنَا وَنَهَيْتَنَا * وَالْمَدْحَ والذَّمَّ أَلْزَمْتَنَا * فَأَخُو الصَّلاحِ مَنْ أَصْلَحْتَهُ * وَأَخُو الْفَسَادِ مَنْ أضْلَلْتَهُ * والسَّعِيدُ حَقّاً مَنْ أغْنَيَتَهُ عَنِ السُّؤَالِ مِنْكَ * والشَّقِيُّ حَقاًّ مَنْ حَرَمْتَهُ مَعَ كَثْرَةِ السُّؤَالِ لَكَ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: You have enjoined commands and restraints on us; You have prescribed praise and blame on us; the righteous being him You make righteous, and the wicked is him You make send astray. The truly fortunate is the one whom You free of the need to ask You, while the truly unfortunate is him You debar despite his frequently asking You.
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qad amartanaa wa nahaytanaa, wal-madh wa-adh-dhamma alzamtaanaa, fa-akhul salaahi man aslahtahu, wa akhul fasadi man adhlaltahu, was-sa'eedu haqqan man aghnaytahu 'ani as-sualiminka, wal-shaqee'u haqqan man haramtaahu ma'a kathrat as-su'aali laka

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: فَأَغْنِنَا بِفَضْلِكَ عَنْ سُؤالِنَا مِنْكَ * وَلاَ تَحْرِمْنَا مِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ مَعَ كَثْرَةِ سُؤَالِنَا لَكَ * وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: So enrich us with Your bounty from needing to ask You, and do not debar us from Your Mercy though we frequently ask You. And forgive us: truly You have power over all things.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa'ghninaa bifadlik 'an su'aalinaa minka, wa laa tahrimnaa min rahmatika ma'a kathrat su'aalinaa laka, waghfir lanaa innaka 'ala kuli shay'in qadeer

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: يا شَدِيدَ الْبَطْشِ يَا جَبَّارُ يَا قَهَّارُ يَا حَكِيمُ * نَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا خَلَقْتَ * وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ ظُلْمَةِ مَا أَبْدَعْتَ * وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ كَيْدِ النُفُوْسِ فِيْمَا قَدَّرْتَ وأَرَدْتَ * ونَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ شَرِّ الْحُسَّادِ عَلَى مَا أَنْعَمْتَ
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: O Mighty of Assault! O Conqueror! O Invincible! O all Wise! We take refuge in You from the evil of what You have created; and refuge in You from the darkness of what You have made, and refuge in You from the plots of selves in what You have destined and willed and refuge in You from the evil of the enviers of your blessings.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya shadeeda al-batshi ya jabbaaru ya qahhaaru ya hakeem, na'oozu bika min sharri ma khalaqt, wa na'oozu bika min dhulmatii ma abda't, wa na'oozu bika min kaydi al-nafooosi feema qaddarta wa aradta, wa na'oozu bika min sharri al-hussaadi 'ala ma an'amta

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: ونَسْأَلُكَ عِزَّ الدُنْيَا وَاْلآخِرَةِ كَمَا سَأَلَكَهُ نَبِيُّكَ مُحَّمَدٌ ﷺ عِزَّ الدُّنْيَا بِالْإِيْمَانِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ وَعِزَّ الْآخِرَةِ بِاللِّقَاءِ وَالمُشَاهَدَةِ * إِنَّكَ سَمِيعٌ قَرِيْبٌ مُجِيْبٌ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: We ask You the glory of this world and the next the way our Honorable Muhammad ﷺ asked You: The glory of this world by faith and divine knowledge, and the glory of the Next by meeting and witnessing You; truly You are All-hearing, All-near and All Answering.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa nas'alu-ka 'izzad-dunya wal-akhira kama sa'ala-ka nabiyyuka Muhammadun ﷺ 'izzad-dunya bil-eemaani wal-ma'rifati wa 'izzal-akhirati bil-liqaa'i wal-mushahadati, innaka samee'un qareebun mujeeb

wird_id_20.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أُقَدِّمُ إلَيْكَ بَينَ يَدَيْ كُلِّ نَفَسٍ وَلَمْحَةٍ وَطَرْفَةٍ يَطْرِفُ بِهَا أَهْلُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَأَهْلُ الْأَرْضِ وَكُلَّ شَيءٍ هُوَ فيِ عِلْمِكَ كاَئِنٌ أَو قَدْ كانَ * أُقَدِّمُ لَكَ بَينَ يَدَيْ ذَلِكَ كُلِّهِ * اللَّهُ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ الْحَيُّ الْقَيُّومُ لَا تَأْخُذُهُ سِنَةٌ وَلَا نَوْمٌ لَهُ مَا فِي السَّمَاوَاتِ وَمَا فِي الْأَرْضِ مَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَشْفَعُ عِنْدَهُ إِلَّا بِإِذْنِهِ يَعْلَمُ مَا بَيْنَ أَيْدِيهِمْ وَمَا خَلْفَهُمْ وَلَا يُحِيْطُونَ بِشَيْءٍ مِنْ عِلْمِهِ إِلَّا بِمَا شَاءَ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالْأَرْضَ وَلاَ يَؤدُهُ حِفْظُهُمَا وَهُوَ الْعَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
wird_id_20.en_wird_description: O Allah, verily, I present to You before every breath, every glance, and every blink of the eye of those in heavens and those on earth, and before all You know to be in the future or have been in the past- I present to You before all that Allah! There is no god but Him - the Living, The Self-subsisting. No slumber can seize Him Nor Sleep. His are all things in the heavens and on earth. Who is there that can intercede In His presence except as He permits? He knows whatever in store, and whatever in the past. Nor shall they encompass aught of his knowledge except as He wills. His Throne accommodated heavens and earth; and He does not get tired in keeping them. He is the Most High and the Grand.
wird_id_20.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma inni uqaddimu ilayka bayna yaday kuli nafasin wamlahtin watafrifatain yatirifu biha ahlu as-samawati wa ahlu al-ardi wa kulla shay'in huwa fee 'ilmika ka'inun aw qad kaana, uqaddimu laka bayna yaday dhalika kuli-hi, Allahu laa ilaaha illa huwa al-hayyul qayyoom, laa ta'khudhuhu sinatu wa laa nawmun, lahoo ma fissamawati wama fil ardi, man dhal-ladhi yashfa'u 'indahu illa bi'ithnihi, ya'lamu ma bayna aydeehim wa ma khalfahum wa laa yuhitoona bi shay'in min 'ilmihi illa bima sha'a, wasi'a kursiyuhus-samaawati wal-ard, wa laa ya'ooduho hifzohuma, wa huwa al-aleeul azeem

wird_id_21.ar_wird_description: أَقسَمْتُ عَلَيْكَ بِبَسْطِ يَدَيْكَ وَكَرَمِ وَجْهِكَ وَنُورِ عَيْنَيكَ وَكَمَالِ أَعْيُنِكَ أَنْ تُعْطِيَنا خَيْرَ مَا نَفَذَتْ بِهِ مَشِيئَتُكَ وَتَعَلَقَتْ بِهِ قُدْرَتُكَ وَجَرَى بِهِ قَلَمُكَ وَأَحَاطَ بِهِ عِلْمُكَ * وَاكْفِنَا شَرَّ مَا هُوَ ضِدٌّ لِذَلِكَ
wird_id_21.en_wird_description: I implore You, by the generosity of Your Hands, the nobleness of Your Countenance, the light of Your eyes, and perfection of Your care, to bestow on us the best of whatever You Willed of the conceivable under Your Power, passed by Your Judgment, or encompassed by Your knowledge; and protect us from the evil of anything opposed to that.
wird_id_21.ar_wird_transliteration: Aqsamtu 'alayka bibasti yadayka wa karam wajhika wa nur 'aynayka wa kamal 'ayunik an tu'tina khayra ma nafadhat bihi mashiyatuka wa ta'allaqat bihi qudratuka wa jara bihi qalamuka wa ahata bihi ilmuka * wa kfina sharra ma huwa didun ladhālik

wird_id_22.ar_wird_description: وَأَكْمِلْ لَنَا دينَنَا * وَأَتْمِمْ عَلَينَا نِعْمَتَكَ * وَهَبْ لَنَا حِكْمَةَ الحِكْمَةِ البَالِغَةِ مَعَ الحَيَاةِ الطَّيِبَةِ واْلمَوْتَةِ الحَسَنَةِ * وَتَوَلَّ قَبْضَ أَرْوَاحِنَا بِيَدِكَ وَحُلْ بَينَنَا وَبَيْنَ غَيْرِكَ فيِ البَرْزَخِ وَمَا قَبْلَهُ وَمَا بَعْدَهُ بِنُورِ ذَاتِكَ وَعَظِيمِ قُدْرَتِكَ وَجَمِيلِ فَضْلِكَ إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_22.en_wird_description: We entreat You to perfect our religion for us and complete Your bounty upon us. Give us the ultimate wisdom, a wholesome life and a good death; and attend to the taking of our souls with Your own hand; and come between us and anything besides You in the world of the grave and before it and after it with the light of your being, the infinity of your power and the beauty of Your largesse: Truly You have power over all things.
wird_id_22.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa akmil lana dinana * wa atmim 'alayna ni'mataka * wahib lana hikmata alhikmat albaligha ma'a alhayat alṭayyibah wa almawtah alhasanah * wa tawall qabḍa arwahina biyadika wa hul baynana wa bayn ghayrika fi albarzakh wama qablihi wama ba'dihi binuri dhatik wa 'azim qudratik wa jamil fadlik innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadir

wird_id_23.ar_wird_description: يَا اَللهُ يَا عَلِيُّ يَا عَظِيمُ يَا حَلِيمُ يَا حَكِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ يَا سَمِيعُ يَا قَريبُ يَا مُجِيبُ يَا وَدُودُ * حُلْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَينَ فِتْنَةِ الدُنْيَا والنِّسَاءِ والغَفْلَةِ والشَّهْوَةِ وَظُلْمِ العِباَدِ وَسُوءِ الخُلُقِ * وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا وَاقْضِ عَنَّا تَبِعَاتِنَا وَاكشِفْ عَنَّا السُّوءَ
wird_id_23.en_wird_description: O Allah, O High, O Great, O Forbearing, O All-Knowing, O Wise, O Generous, O All Hearing O All Near, O All Answering, O Beloved: come between us and the trial of this world, of women, of heedlessness, lust, the wrongs of others, and bad character. Forgive us our sins, fulfill for us our obligations, lift from us evil.
wird_id_23.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Allahu ya 'Aliyyu ya 'Azim ya Halim ya Hakim ya Karim ya Sami'u ya Qaribu ya Mujibu ya Wadud * hul baynana wa bayn fitnati al-dunya wa al-nisa' wa al-ghaflah wa al-shahwat wa zulmi al-‘ibad wa su'i al-khulq * waghfir lana dhunubana wa aqdi 'anna tabi'atina wa akshif 'anna al-su

wird_id_24.ar_wird_description: وَنَجِّنَا مِنَ الغَمِّ وَاجْعَلْ لَنَا مِنْهُ مَخْرَجًا إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_24.en_wird_description: Free us from vexation and make us a way out of it: truly You are the All-arranging.
wird_id_24.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa najina mina al-ghammi wa ajil lana minhu makhraj-an innaka 'ala kulli shay'in qadir

wird_id_26.ar_wird_description: يَا لَطِيفُ يَا رَزَّاقُ يَا قَوِيُّ يَا عَزيزُ لَكَ مَقَالِيدُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَالأرْضِ تَبْسُطُ الرِّزْقَ لِمَنْ تَشَاءُ وتَقْدِرُ * فَابْسُطْ لَناَ مِنَ الرِّزْقِ مَا تُوَصِّلُنَا بِهِ إِلىَ رَحْمَتِكَ وَمِنْ رَحْمَتِكَ مَا تَحُولُ بهِ بَيْنَنَا وَبَينَ نِقَمِكَ وَمِنْ حِلْمِكَ مَا يَسَعُنَا بِهِ عَفْوُكَ
wird_id_26.en_wird_description: O Gentle, O Provider, O Mighty, O All Powerful, To You belong the keys of the heavens and earth, You outstretch Your provision to whomever You will, and straiten it. So bestow upon us of provision that through which You bring us to Your mercy; and of Your mercy that by which You come between us and Your vengeances; and of your forbearance that through which your amnesty encompass us.
wird_id_26.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Latifu ya Razzaqu ya Qawiyyu ya 'Azizu laka maqalidu al-samawati wa al-ardi tabustu al-rizqa liman tasha'u wa taqdiru * fabisut lana min al-rizqi ma tusiluna bihi ila rahmatika wa min rahmatika ma tahulu bihi baynana wa bayn niqamika wa min hilmika ma yasi'una bihi 'afwuka

wird_id_27.ar_wird_description: وَاخْتِمْ لَنَا بِالسَّعَادَةِ الَّتِي خَتَمْتَ بِهَا لِأَوْلِيَائِكَ * وَاجْعَلْ خَيْرَ أَيَّامِنا وَأَسْعَدَهَا يَوْمَ لِقاَئِكَ * وَزَحْزِحْنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا عَنْ نَارِ الشَّهْوَةِ وأدْخِلْنَا بِفَضْلِكَ فِي مَيَادِينِ الرَّحْمَةِ * وَاكْسُنَا مِنْ لَدُنْكَ جَلاَبِيبَ العِصْمَةِ * وَاجْعَلْ لَنَا ظَهِيْراً مِنْ عُقُولِنَا وَمُهَيمِناً مِنْ أَرْوَاحِنَا ومُسَخَّراً مِنْ أنْفُسِنَا كَي نُسَبِّحَكَ كَثِيراً ونَذْكُرَكَ كَثِيراً * إِنَّكَ كُنْتَ بِنَا بَصِيرًا
wird_id_27.en_wird_description: And close our lives with the felicity with which you have closed those of Your saints; And make our best of days and happiest the day we meet You. And save us from the fire of lust in this world, and enter us by Your favor into the plains of mercy, And clothe us of Your light in cloaks of divine protection; and make our minds supporting to us; give our souls control over us; and keep our selves under our control; as a result, we may exalt Your glory greatly and remember You much; You see us.
wird_id_27.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa khtim lana bi al-sa'adah allati khatamta biha li awliayika * wa ajil khayra ayyamina wa as'adaha yawma liqa'ika * wa zahzihna fi al-dunya 'an nari al-shahwah wa adkhilna bifadlika fi mayadin al-rahmah * wa ksuna min ladunka jalabiba al-ismah * wa ajil lana dhahiran min 'uqulina wa muhayminan min arwahina wa musakhkharan min anfusina kay nusbihak kathiran wa nadhkuraka kathiran * innaka kuntabi bāsiran

wird_id_28.ar_wird_description: وَهَبْ لَنَا مُشَاهَدَةً تَصْحَبُهَا مُكَالَمَةً * وَافْتَحْ أَسْمَاعَنَا وَأبْصَارَنَا وَاذْكُرْنَا إِذَا غَفَلْنَا عَنْكَ بِأَحْسَنِ مَا تَذْكُرُنَا بِهِ إِذَا ذَكَرْناَكَ وَارْحَمْنَا إِذَا عَصَيْنَاكَ بِأَتَمِّ مَا تَرْحَمُنَا بِهِ إِذَا أَطَعْنَاكَ وَاغْفِرْ لَنَا ذُنُوبَنَا مَا تَقَدَّمَ مِنْهَا وَما تَأَخَّرَ * وَالْطُفْ بِنَا لُطْفاً يَحْجُبُنَا عَنْ غَيْرِكَ وَلاَ يَحْجُبُنَا عَنْكَ فإِنَّكَ بِكُلِّ شَيءٍ عَلِيمٌ
wird_id_28.en_wird_description: And bestow on us direct vision, accompanied by direct address; and open our ears and our eyes. And when we forget You, remember us with even better than You do when we remember You. And when we disobey You, show us even greater mercy than You do when we obey You. And forgive us our sins those of the past and those of the future. And show us a gentleness that veils us from everything besides You and not from You. Truly You have knowledge of all things.
wird_id_28.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa hab lana mushahadatan tashabuha mukalamat-an * waftah asma'ana wa abṣarana wa dhkurnā idha ghafalnā 'anka bi ahsani ma tadhkurnā bihi idha dhakarnāka wa rahmānā idha 'asaināka bi atammi ma tarhamunā bihi idha ataināka wa ghfir lana dhunubana ma taqaddama minha wa ma ta'akhkhar * wa alṭuf bina luṭfan yahjubunā 'an ghayrika wa lā yahjubunā 'anka fa'innaka bi kulli shay'in 'alim

wird_id_29.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ لِسَاناً رَطْباً بِذِكْرِكَ وَقَلْبَاً مُنَعَّماً بِشُكْرِكَ وَبَدَناً هَيِّناً لَيِّناً لِطَاعَتَكَ وَأَعْطِنَا مَعَ ذَلِكَ مَا لاَ عَيْنٌ رَأَتْ وَلاَ أُذُنٌ سَمِعَتْ وَلاَ خَطَرَ عَلَى قَلْبِ بَشَرٍ كَمَا أخْبَرَ بِهِ رسُولُكَ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيهِ وَسَلَّمَ حَسْبَمَا عَلِمْتَهُ بِعِلْمِكَ  *  وَأَغْنِنَا بِلا سَبَبٍ واَجْعَلنَا سَبَبَ الغِنَى لِأوْلِيَائِكَ وبَرْزَخَاً بَينَهُمْ وَبَيْنَ أَعْدَائِكَ إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_29.en_wird_description: O Allah we ask You for a tongue, moist with Your invocation, a heart blessed with Your gratitude, and a body easy and lithe in Your obedience. And give us therewith “ what eye has not seen, nor ear heard, nor entered into the heart of man, of which Your messenger ( Allah bless him and give him peace) told, as may be known to You by Your knowledge. Enrich us without means and make us a means of enrichment to Your men, and a barrier between them and Your enemies: truly You have power over all things.
wird_id_29.ar_wird_transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA INNA NAA’SSALUKA LISAANAN RATBAN BITHIKRIKA WA QALBAN MUN’AMMAN BISHUKRIKA WA BADANAN HAYYAN LAYYINAN LITAA’ATAKA WA A’TIINA MA’A DHALIKA MA LAA A’YINUN RA’AT WA LAA UDHUNUN SAMI’AT WA LAA KHATARA ‘ALAA QALBI BASHARIN KAMAA AKHBARA BIHI RASOOLUKA SALLA ALLAAHU ‘ALAYHI WA SALLAM HUSBMAA ‘ALIMTAHU BI’ILMIKA * WA AGHNINA BILA SABBABIN WAJ’ALNAA SABBABA LIGHINA LI AWLIYAA’IKA WA BARZAKHAN BAYNAHUM WA BAYNA A’DAAA’IKA INNAKA ‘ALAA KULI SHAY’IN QADEER

wird_id_30.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ إِيْمَاناً دَائِماً * وَنَسْأَلُكَ قَلبَاً خَاشِعًا ونَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمَاً نَافِعَاً * وَنَسْأَلُكَ يَقِيناً صَادِقاً * ونَسْأَلُكَ دِيْناً قَيِّماً * ونَسْألُكَ الْعَافِيَةَ مِنْ كُلِّ بَلِيَّةٍ * وَنَسْأَلُكَ تَمَامَ الْعَافِيَةِ وَنَسْألُكَ الشُكْرَ عَلَى الْعَافِيَةِ وَنَسْأَلُكَ الغِنَى عَنِ النَّاسِ
wird_id_30.en_wird_description: O Allah we ask You for faith forever, a heart of reverence, knowledge of benefit, certainty in truth, a valuable religion, and wellbeing from every affliction: And we ask You for complete well-being, and gratitude for wellbeing, and to enrich us from needing people.
wird_id_30.ar_wird_transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA INNA NAA’SSALUKA IIMAANAN DAA’IMAN * WA NAA’SSALUKA QALBAN KHAA’SHE’AN WA NAA’SSALUKA ‘ILMAN NAAFI’AN * WA NAA’SSALUKA YAQEENAN SAADIQAN * WA NAA’SSALUKA DEENAN QAYYIMAN * WA NAA’SSALUKA AL-AAFIYATA MIN KULI BALIYYATIN * WA NAA’SSALUKA TAMAAMAL-‘AAFIYATI WA NAA’SSALUKA AS-SHUKRA ‘ALA AL-‘AAFIYATI WA NAA’SSALUKA AL-GHINAA ‘ANI AN-NAASI

wird_id_31.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ التَوبَةَ الْكَامِلَةَ * والمَغْفِرَةَ الشَّامِلَةَ * وَالمَحَبَّةَ الجَامِعَةَ والْخُلَّةَ الصَّافِيَةَ وَالمَعْرِفَةَ الْوَاسِعَةَ وَالْأَنْوَارَ السَّاطِعَةَ * والشَّفَاعَةَ القَائِمَةَ والحُجَّةَ البَالِغَةَ والدَّرَجَةَ الْعَالِيَةَ
wird_id_31.en_wird_description: O Allah, verily we ask You for perfect repentance, complete forgiveness, unifying love, pure hearted intimacy, all embracing gnosis, resplendent illuminations, a standing intercession, a decisive case, and an exalted rank.
wird_id_31.ar_wird_transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA INNA NAA’SSALUKA AT-TAWBATA AL-KAAMILATA * WAL-MAGHFIRATA ASH-SHAAMILATA * WAL-MAHABBATA AL-JAAMI’ATA WAL-KHULLATA AS-SAAFIYATA WAL-MA’RIFATA AL-WAA’IS’ATA WAL-ANWAARA AS-SAATI’ATA * WASH-SHFAA’ATA AL-QAA’IMATA WAL-HUJJATA AL-BAALIGHATA WAL-DARAJA AL-‘AALIYATA

wird_id_32.ar_wird_description: وَفُكَّ وَثَاقَنَا مِنَ المَعْصِيَةِ وَرِهَانَنَا مِنَ النِّقْمَةِ بِمَوَاهِبِ الِمنَّةِ
wird_id_32.en_wird_description: And free us from the shackles of disobedience or remaining in pawn to blessings, through the pure gifts of largesse.
wird_id_32.ar_wird_transliteration: WA FUKKA WATHAAQANAA MINAL-MA’SIYATI WA RIHAAANANAA MINAN-NIQMATI BIMAWAAHIBI AL-MANNA

wird_id_33.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ التَّوْبَةَ وَدَوَامَهَا * وَنَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ المَعْصِيَةِ وَأَسْبَابِهَا وَذَكِّرْنَا بِالْخَوفِ مِنْكَ قَبْلَ هُجُومِ خَطَراتِهَا * وَاحْمِلْنَا عَلَى النَّجَاةِ مِنْهَا وَمِنْ التَّفَكُّرِ في طَرَائِقِهَا وَامْحُ مِنْ قُلُوبِنَا حَلَاوَةَ مَا اجْتَنَيْنَاهُ مِنْهَا * وَاسْتَبْدِلْهَا بِالكَرَاهَةِ لَهَا والطَّعْمِ لِمَا هُوَ بِضِدِّهَا * وَأَفِضْ عَلَيْنَا مِنْ بَحْرِ كَرَمِكَ وَجُودِكَ حَتَّى نَخْرُجَ مِنَ الدُّنْيَا عَلَى السَّلَامَةِ مِنْ وَبَالِهَا
wird_id_33.en_wird_description: O Allah verily we ask You for repentance and its continuance, and we seek refuge in You from disobedience and its causes. So remind us of fear of You before the onslaught of its thoughts, and carry us to safety from it and from thinking of its paths, and expunge from our hearts the savor of what we have committed of it, and change it to distaste for it and an appetite for its opposite. And pour upon us from the sea of Your generosity, openhandedness, bounty, and kindness, until we depart from this world in safety from its dire consequences.
wird_id_33.ar_wird_transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA INNA NAA’SSALUKA AT-TAWBATA WA DAAWAAMAHAA * WA NA’OOZU BIKA MINAL-MA’SIYATI WA ASBAABIHAA WA DHAKKIRNAA BIL-KHAWFI MINKA QABL-HUJOOOMI KHATARAATIHAA * WAHMILNAA ‘ALAA AN-NAJAATI MINHAA WA MIN AT-TAFAKKURI FEE TARAAYIQIHAA WA MHOO MIN QULOOBINAA HALAAWATAMAA IJTAANAINAAHU MINHAA * WA-ISTABDILHAA BIL-KARAAHATILAHAA WAT-TA’AMI LIMA HUWA BIDIYYIHAA * WA AFIDH ‘ALAYNAA MIN BAHRI KARAMIKA WA JUUDIKA HATTA NAKHRUJA MINAD-DUNYAA ALA AS-SALAAMATI MIN WAABAALIHAA

wird_id_34.ar_wird_description: وَاجْعَلْنَا عِنْدَ المَوتِ ناَطِقِينَ بِالشَّهَادَةِ عَالِمَيْنَ بِهَا
wird_id_34.en_wird_description: On dying, make us say the testification of faith (no god but Allah), with full awareness of what it means.

wird_id_35.ar_wird_description: وَارْأَفْ بِنَا رَأْفَةَ الحَبِيبِ بِحَبِيبِهِ عِنْدَ الشَّدَائِدِ وَنُزُولِهَا  * وَأَرِحْنَا مَنْ هُمُومِ الدُّنْيَا وَغُمُومِهَا بِالرَّوحِ وَالرَّيْحَانِ إِلَى الْجَنَّةِ وَنَعِيْمِهَا
wird_id_35.en_wird_description: And show us the tenderness of a lover to his beloved, when there are calamities and they befall; And relieve us of the frettings of this world and its worries with rest and sweet herbage until paradise and its beatitudes.
wird_id_35.ar_wird_transliteration: WAAR’AF BINA RAA’FATAL-HABEEDI BIHABEIBIHEE ‘INDASH-SHADAA’IDI WA NUZOOLIHAA * WA ARIHHNAA MIN HUMOOMI AD-DUNYAA WA GHUMOOMIHAA BIR-RUUHI WARRAIHANI ILAA AL-JANNAH WA NAA’IMIHAA

wird_id_36.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إِنَّا نَسْأَلُكَ تَوبَةً سَابِقَةً مِنْكَ إِلَيْنَا لِتَكُونَ تَوْبَتُنَا تَابِعَةً إِلَيْكَ مِنَّا
wird_id_36.en_wird_description: O Allah we ask Your prior forgiveness from You to us, that our repentance may follow from You to us.
wird_id_36.ar_wird_transliteration: ALLAAHUMMA INNA NAA’SSALUKA TAWBATAN SAABIQATAN MINKA ILAYNAA LITAKOONA TAWBATUNAA TAA’BITAN ILAYKA MINNAA

wird_id_37.ar_wird_description: وَهَبْ لَنَا التَّلَقِّيَ مِنْكَ كَتَلَقِّي آدَمَ مِنْكَ الكَلِمَاتِ * لِيَكُونَ قُدْوَةً لِوَلَدِهِ في التَّوبَةِ وَالْأَعْمَـالِ الصَّالِحَاتِ
wird_id_37.en_wird_description: And bestow on us direct teaching from You, as You taught Adam the words so he could be an example to his offspring in repentance and good works.
wird_id_37.ar_wird_transliteration: WAHAB LANA AT-TALAQQEE MINKA KATALAQQEE AADAM MINKA AL-KALIMAATI * LIYAKOONA QUDWATAN LIWALADIHEE FEE AT-TAWBATI WAL-A’MAALI AS-SAALIHATI

wird_id_38.ar_wird_description: وَبَاعِدْ بَيْنَنَا وَبَيْنَ الْعِنَادِ وَالإِصْرَارِ وَالشَّبَهِ بِإِبْلِيْسَ رأْسِ الْغُوَاةِ
wird_id_38.en_wird_description: And keep us far from stubborn refusal or insistence; or resembling Shaytan, head of the misguided.
wird_id_38.ar_wird_transliteration: WABA’ID BAYNANAA WA BAYNA AL-‘INAADI WAL-ISRAARI WASH-SHABAHI BIIBLIISA RA’SIL-GHUWAATI

wird_id_39.ar_wird_description: واجْعَلْ سَيِّئَاتِنَا سَيِّئاتِ مَنْ أحْبَبْتَ * وَلاَ تَجْعَلْ حَسَنَاتِنَا حَسَناَتِ مَنْ أَبْغَضْتَ * فَالإِحْسَانُ لاَ يَنْفَعُ مَعَ البُغْضِ مِنْكَ * والْإِسَاءَةُ لَا تَضُرُّ مَعَ الحُبِّ فِيْكَ
wird_id_39.en_wird_description: And make our bad deeds those of whom You love, not our good deeds those of whom You hate. For goodness is bootless with Your hatred and badness is harmless with Your love.
wird_id_39.ar_wird_transliteration: WAJ’AL SAYYI’AATINA SAYYI’AATI MAN AHABBARTA * WA LAA TAJ’AL HASANAATAINA HASANATAATI MAN ABGHADTA * FAL-IHSAANU LAA YANFA’U MA’A AL-BUGHDI MINKA * WAL-ISA’ATU LAA TADHURRU MA’A AL-HUBBI FEEKA

wird_id_40.ar_wird_description: وَقَدْ أَبْهَمْتَ الأَمْرَ عَليْنَا لِنَرْجُوَ وَنَخَافَ  * فَآمِنْ خَوْفَنَا وَلاَ تُخَيِّبْ رَجَائَنَا وأعْطِنَا سُؤْلَنَا  * فَقَدْ أَعْطَيْتَنَا الْإيْمَانَ مِنْ قَبْلِ أَنْ نَسْأَلَكَهُ وَكَتَبْتَ وَحَبَّبْتَ * وَزَيَّنْتَ وَكَرَّهْتَ * وأَطْلَقْتَ الأَلْسُنَ بِمَا بِهِ تَرْجَمْتَ فَنِعْمَ الرَّبُّ أَنْتَ فَلَكَ الْحَمْدُ عَلَى مَا أَنْعَمْتَ * فَاغْفِرْ لَنَا وَلَا تُعَاقِبْنَا بِالسَّلْبِ بَعْدَ العَطَاءِ * وَلاَ بِكُفْرَانِ النِّعَمِ وَحِرْمَانِ الرِّضَا
wird_id_40.en_wird_description: You have obscured the matter from us that we might hope and fear, so protect us from what we fear, and dash not our hopes, but give us what we ask; for You have given us faith before we asked You, And have inscribed and made beloved, and made seemly, and made repugnant, and have moved tongues with what they express. So how great a Lord You are, and all praise be to You for the blessings You have bestowed. So forgive us and punish us not with loss after having been given, or being ungrateful for blessings or debarred from contentment.
wird_id_40.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qad abhamta al-amra 'alayna linarju wa nakhafa * faamin khawfana wa la tukhaayib rajaa'ana wa atina su'lana * faqad 'ataytana al-iman min qabli an nas'alahu wa katabta wa habbabta * wa zayyanata wa karrihata * wa atlaqta al-alsuna bima bihi tarjamat fa ni'ma al-rabbu anta falaka al-hamdu 'ala ma an'amt * fa'ghfir lana wa la tu'adhibna bial-salbi ba'da al-'ata' * wa la bikufrani al-ni'am wa hirman al-rida

wird_id_41.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ رَضِّنَا بِقَضَائِكَ وَصَبِّرْنَا عَلَى طَاعَتِكَ وَعَنْ مَعْصِيَتِكَ وَعَنْ الشَهَوَاتِ المُوجِبَاتِ لِلنَّقْصِ والبُعْدِ عَنْكَ * وَهَبْ لَنَا حَقِيقَةَ الإِيْمَانِ بِكَ حَتَّى لا نَخَافَ غَيْرَكَ وَلَا نَرْجُو غَيْرَكَ وَلاَ نُحِبَّ غَيْرَكَ وَلاَ نَعْبُدَ شَيْئًا سِوَاكَ
wird_id_41.en_wird_description: O Allah, give us acceptance of your destiny, and patience to do obedience and avoid disobedience and desires that entail decrease and remoteness from You. And bestow on us the reality of faith in You, until we fear no-one else, love no-one else, and worship nothing besides You.
wird_id_41.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma radhinna biqada'ika wa sabbirna 'ala ta'atika wa 'an ma'siyatika wa 'an al-shahawat al-mujibat lil-naqsi wa al-bu'di 'anka * wahab lana haqiqata al-iman bika hatta la nakhafa ghayraka wa la narju ghayraka wa la nuhibbu ghayraka wa la na'budu shay'an siwaka

wird_id_42.ar_wird_description: وَأَوْزِعْنَا شُكْرَ نَعْمَائِكَ * وَغَطِّنَا بِرِدَاءِ عَافِيَتِكَ وَانْصُرْنَا باليَقِيْنِ والتَّوَكُّلِ عَليْكَ  * وَأَسْفِرْ وُجُوهَنَا بِنُورِ صِفَاتِكَ وأَضْحِكْنَا وبَشِّرْنَا يَوْمَ القِيَامَةِ بَيْنَ أَوْليَائِكَ  * واجْعَلْ يَدَكَ مَبْسُوطَةً عَلَيْنا وَعَلى أَهْلِينَا وَأَوْلاَدِنَا وَمَنْ مَعَنَا بِرَحْمَتِكَ  * وَلاَ تَكِلْنَا إِلى أَنْفُسِنَا طَرْفَةَ عَيْنٍ وَلاَ أَقَلَّ مِنْ ذَلِكَ
wird_id_42.en_wird_description: Make us thankful for Your blessings, and overspread us with the mantle of Your well-being. And give us triumph through certainty and reliance upon You. And make our faces resplendent with the light of Your attributes, and rejoice us and give us good tidings on Resurrection day among Your friends. And outspread Your hand to us, and our wives and children and those with us, through Your mercy. Do not leave us to ourselves for the blink of an eye or even less.
wird_id_42.ar_wird_transliteration: Waawzi'na shukra na'ma'ika * waghattina birida'i 'afiyatika waansurna bilyaqini wal-tawakkuli 'alayka * wa-asfir wujuhana binuri sifatika waadhikna wabashirna yawma al-qiyamati bayna awliya'ika * waja'il yadka mabsutatan 'alayna wa'ala ahlina wa awladina waman ma'ana birahmatika * wa la takilna ila anfusina tarfata 'aynin wa la aqalla min dhalik

wird_id_44.ar_wird_description: يَا مَنْ هُوَ هُوَ هُوْ في عُلُوِّهِ قَريبٌ
wird_id_44.en_wird_description: Oh You, -You, - You, who in Your Exaltedness are so near.
wird_id_44.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya man huwa huwa huwa fi 'uluwwihi qareeb

wird_id_45.ar_wird_description: يَا ذَا الْجَلالِ وَالْإِكْرَامِ * يَا مُحِيْطاً بِالْلَيَالِي وَالْأيَّامِ * أَشْكُو إِلَيْكَ مِنْ غَمِّ الحِجَابِ * وَسُوءِ الحِسَابِ وَشِدَّةِ العَذَابِ * وَإِنَّ ذَلِكَ لَوَاقِعٌ مَالَهُ مِنْ دَافِعٍ إِنْ لَمْ تَرْحَمْنِي
wird_id_45.en_wird_description: O possessor of Majesty and Nobility, You Who encompasses nights and days: to You I complain of the gloom and the veil, the woe of the reckoning, and the direness of the punishment, all of which shall happen and none can avert unless you have mercy on me.
wird_id_45.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya dha al-jalali wal-ikram * Ya muheetan bil-layali wal-ayyam * Ashku ilayka min ghammi al-hijab * wa su'i al-hisab wa shiddati al-'adhab * wa inna dhalika lawaqi'un malahu min dafi'in in lam tarhamni

wird_id_46.ar_wird_description: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنتُ مِنْ الظَّالِمِينَ
wird_id_46.en_wird_description: There is no God but You; Glorious is Your perfection; verily I have been of the wrong doers.
wird_id_46.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa Anta subhanaka inni kuntu min al-zalimeen

wird_id_47.ar_wird_description: ولقَدْ شَكَى إلَيْكَ يَعْقُوبُ فَخَلَّصْتَهُ مِنْ حُزْنِهِ وَرَدَدْتَ عَلَيْهِ ما ذَهَبَ مِنْ بَصَرِهِ وَجَمَعْتَ بَيْنَهُ وَبَيْنَ وَلَدِهِ
wird_id_47.en_wird_description: Yaqub complained to You and You relieved his sorrow, restored his lost sight, and rejoined him with his son.
wird_id_47.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaqad shaka ilayka Ya'qub fakhallasthuhu min huznihi wa raddadta 'alayhi ma dhahaba min basarihi wa jama'ta baynahu wa bayna waladihi

wird_id_48.ar_wird_description: وَلَقَدْ نَادَاكَ نُوحٌ مِنْ قَبْلُ فَنَجَّيْتَهُ مِنْ كَرْبِهِ
wird_id_48.en_wird_description: Nuh called upon You before and You saved him from his tribulation.
wird_id_48.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaqad nadaka Nuhun min qablu fanajaytahu min karbihi

wird_id_49.ar_wird_description: وَلَقَدْ نَادَاكَ أَيُّوبُ مِنْ بَعْدُ فَكَشَفْتَ مَا بِهِ مِنْ ضُرِّهِ
wird_id_49.en_wird_description: Ayyub called upon You after, and You lifted his affliction.
wird_id_49.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaqad nadaka Ayyubu min ba'du fakashafhta ma bihi min durrihi

wird_id_50.ar_wird_description: وَلَقَدْ نَادَاكَ يُونُسُ فَنَجَّيْتَهُ مِنْ غَمِّهِ
wird_id_50.en_wird_description: Yūnus called upon You and You delivered him from his distress.
wird_id_50.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaqad nadaka Yunusu fanajaytahu min ghammihi

wird_id_51.ar_wird_description: وَلَقَدْ نَادَاكَ زَكَرِيَّا فَوَهَبْتَ لَهُ وَلَدًا مِنْ صُلْبِهِ بَعْدَ يَأْسِ أَهْلِهِ وَكِبَرِ سِنِّهِ
wird_id_51.en_wird_description: Zakariyya called upon you and You bestowed on him a son of his loins after his wife had become barren and he was old.
wird_id_51.ar_wird_transliteration: Walaqad nadaka Zakariyya fawahabta lahu waladan min sulbihi ba'da ya'si ahlihi wa kibari sinnihi

wird_id_52.ar_wird_description: وَلَقَدْ عَلِمْتَ مَا نَزَلَ بِإِبْرَاهِيمَ فَأَنْقَذْتَهُ مِنْ نَارِ عَدُوِّهِ
wird_id_52.en_wird_description: and You knew what befell Ibrahim and rescued him from the fire of his enemy.
wird_id_52.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa laqad 'alimta ma nazala bi Ibrahima fa'anqaztahu min nari aduwihi

wird_id_53.ar_wird_description: وَأَنْجَيْتَ لُوطاً وَأَهْلَهُ مِنَ العَذَابِ النَّازِلِ بِقَومِهِ
wird_id_53.en_wird_description: and You saved Lut and his family from the punishment descending upon his people.
wird_id_53.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa anjayta Loota wa ahlaho min al-'adhabi al-nazili biqawmihi

wird_id_54.ar_wird_description: فَهَا أَنَا عَبْدُكَ إِنْ تُعَذِّبْنِي بِجَمِيعِ مَا عَلِمْتَ مِنْ عَذَابِكَ فَأَنَا حَقِيقٌ بِهِ وَإِنْ تَرْحَمْنِي كَمَا رَحِمْتَهُمْ مَعَ عِظَمِ إِجْرَامِي فَأَنْتَ أَوْلى بِذَلِكَ وَأَحَقُّ مَنْ أَكْرَمَ بِهِ
wird_id_54.en_wird_description: So here am I your slave: if You punish me with everything You know of Your torment, I truly deserve it; but if You show me mercy, as You did them, despite the enormity of my crime, You have better right and best deserve to show such generosity.
wird_id_54.ar_wird_transliteration: Faha ana abduka in tu'adhdhibni bijami'i ma 'alimta min 'adhabika fa'ana haqiqun bihi wa in tarhamni kama rahimtahum ma'a 'i'dhami 'ijrami fa'anta awla bidhalki wa ahaqqu man akrama bihi

wird_id_55.ar_wird_description: فَلَيْسَ كَرَمُكَ مَخْصُوصاً بِمَنْ أَطَاعَكَ وَأَقْبَلَ عَلَيْكَ بَلْ هُوَ مَبْذُولٌ بِالسَّبْقِ لِمَنْ شِئْتَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ وَإِنْ عَصَاكَ وَأَعْرَضَ عَنْكَ
wird_id_55.en_wird_description: For Your generosity is not confined to those who obey and draw near You, but is freely given from aforetime to whomever You will of your creation, even if they disobey and turn away from You.
wird_id_55.ar_wird_transliteration: Falaysa karamuka makhsoosan biman ata'aka wa aqbala 'alayka bal huwa mabdhoolun bial-sabqi liman shi'ta min khalqika wa in 'asaaka wa 'aradha 'anka

wird_id_56.ar_wird_description: وَلَيْسَ مِنَ كَرَمِكَ أَنْ لَا تُحْسِنَ إِلاَّ لِمَنْ أَحْسَنَ إِلَيْكَ وَأَنْتَ المِفْضَالُ الغَنِيُّ * بَلْ مِنْ كَرَمِكَ أَنْ تُحْسِنَ إِلَى مَنْ أَسَاءَ إِلَيْكَ وَأَنْتَ الرَّحِيمُ العَلِيُّ  * كَيفَ وَقَدْ أَمَرْتَنَا أَنْ نُحْسِنَ إِلَى مَنْ أَساءَ إليَنا فَأَنْتَ أَوْلى بِذَلِكَ مِنَّا
wird_id_56.en_wird_description: For it is not of generosity to show goodness only to those who show it to You, who are the Magnanimous and free of all need, but rather it is of generosity to show goodness to those who show evil towards You, who are the All-Compassionate and Exalted. How else should it be, when You have commanded us to show goodness to those who show evil towards us, while You have better right to do so than we.
wird_id_56.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa lays min karamika an la tuhsina illa liman ahsana ilayka wa anta al-mifdaalu al-ghaniyyu * bal min karamika an tuhsina ila man asa'a ilayka wa anta al-rahimu al-`aliyyu * kayfa wa qad amartana an nuhsina ila man asa'a ilayna fa'anta awla bidhalki minna

wird_id_57.ar_wird_description: رَبَّنَا ظَلَمْنَا أَنفُسَنَا وَإِنْ لَمْ تَغْفِرْ لَنَا وَتَرْحَمْنَا لَنَكُونَنَّ مِنْ الْخَاسِرِينَ
wird_id_57.en_wird_description: O Lord we have wronged ourselves, and if You do not forgive us and have mercy on us, we shall certainly be of lost.
wird_id_57.ar_wird_transliteration: Rabbana zalamna anfusana wa in lam taghfir lana wa tarhamna lanakoonanna min al-khasireen

wird_id_59.ar_wird_description: يَا رَحْمَنُ يَا رَحِيمُ يَا حَيُّ يَا قَيُّومُ يَا مَنْ هُو هُو هُو * يَا هُو إِنْ لَمْ نَكُنْ لِرَحْمَتِكَ أَهْلاً أَنْ نَنَالَها فَرَحْمَتُكَ أَهْلٌ أَنْ تَنَالَنَا
wird_id_59.en_wird_description: O Most Merciful, Compassionate, Living, Eternal, through whom all exist. O You, You, You, Who are, O You! if we do not deserve to reach Your mercy, yet Your mercy deserves to reach us, O True Lord, O True Master.
wird_id_59.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Rahmanu Ya Rahimu Ya Hayyu Ya Qayyumu Ya man huwa huwa huwa * Ya Huwa in lam nakun li rahmatika ahlan an nanala-ha farahmatuka ahlun an tanalana

wird_id_60.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبَّاهُ * يَا مَوْلاَهُ * يَا مُغِيْثَ مَنْ عَصَاهُ * أَغِثْنَا
wird_id_60.en_wird_description: O You who saves those who disobey You: save us.
wird_id_60.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Rabbahu * Ya Moulahu * Ya Mugheetha man 'asaahu * Aghithna

wird_id_61.ar_wird_description: يَا رَبُّ يَا كَرِيمُ وارْحَمْنَا يَا بَرُّ يَا رَحِيمُ
wird_id_61.en_wird_description: O Lord, O all Generous, and have mercy on us. O Benevolent and Compassionate.
wird_id_61.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Rabbū ya Karīmu warḥamnā ya Barrū ya Raḥīmu

wird_id_62.ar_wird_description: يَا مَنْ وَسِعَ كُرْسِيُّهُ السَّماواتِ والأرْضَ ولا يَؤُدُهُ حِفْظُهُما وَهُوَ العَلِيُّ الْعَظِيمُ
wird_id_62.en_wird_description: O You whose Throne Extends over the Heavens and the Earth and Preserving them wearies Him not, as He is the All High, the All Great.
wird_id_62.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya man wasi'a kursīyuhu al-samāwāti wal-arḍa wa la ya'uduhu ḥifẓuhumā wa huwa al-`Alīyyu al-`Azīmu

wird_id_63.ar_wird_description: أَسْأَلُكَ الإِيْمَانَ بِحِفْظِكَ إِيْمَاناً يَسْكُنُ بِهِ قَلْبِي مِنْ هَمِّ الرِّزْقِ وخَوفِ الْخَلْقِ وَاقْرُبْ مِنِّي قُرْبَاً تَمْحَقُ بِهِ عَنِّي كُلَّ حِجَابٍ مَحَقْتَهُ عَنْ إِبْراهِيمَ خَلِيلِكَ فَلَمْ يَحْتَجْ لِجِبْريلَ رَسُولِكَ وَلاَ لِسُؤَالِهِ مِنْكَ وَحَجَبْتَهُ بِذَلِكَ عَنْ نَارِ عَدُوِّهِ * وَكَيْفَ لا يُحْجَبُ عَنْ مَضَرَّةِ الأَعْدَاءِ مِنْ غَيَّبْتَهُ عَنْ مَنْفَعَةِ الأَحِبَّاءِ
wird_id_63.en_wird_description: I ask You for faith in your protection, a faith through which my heart finds rest from concerns for sustenance or fear of men. And draw near to me by Your all Mighty Power, a nearness by which You efface from me every veil You effaced from Your friend Ibrahim who did not need Your Messenger Jibril or his asking You, So You protected him from the fire of his enemy. And how should someone You have distracted from the good of friends not be protected from the harm of enemies.
wird_id_63.ar_wird_transliteration: As'alu-ka al-īmāna biḥifẓika īmānan yaskunu bihi qalbī min hammi al-rizqi wa khawfi al-khalqi waqrub minni qurbāan tamḥaqu bihi 'annī kulla ḥijābin maḥaqtahu 'an Ibrāhīma khalīlika falam yaḥtaj lijibrīla rasūlika walā lisū'ālīhi minka waḥajabtahu bidhālika 'an nāri 'aduwwihi * wa kayfa lā yuḥjabu 'an maḍarrati al-a'dā'i min ghayabtahu 'an manfa'ati al-aḥibbā'i

wird_id_64.ar_wird_description: كَلاَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُغَيِّبَنِي بِقُرْبِكَ مِنِّي حَتَّى لاَ أَرَى وَلاَ أَسْمَعَ وَلاَ أُحِسَّ بِقُرْبِ شَيءٍ وَلاَ بِبُعْدِهِ عَنِّي *إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْءٍ قَدِيرٌ
wird_id_64.en_wird_description: Nay! Truly, I ask You to make me unaware of myself by Your closeness to me until I do not see, or hear or find, or sense the closeness or the remoteness of anything from me; verily You have Power over all things.
wird_id_64.ar_wird_transliteration: Kallā innī as'alu-ka an tughayyibanī biqurbika minnī ḥattā lā arā wa lā asma'a wa lā uḥissā biqurbi shay'in wa lā bibu'dihi 'annī * innaka 'alā kulli shay'in qadīr

wird_id_65.ar_wird_description: أَفَحَسِبْتُمْ أَنَّمَا خَلَقْنَاكُمْ عَبَثًا وَأَنَّكُمْ إِلَيْنَا لَا تُرْجَعُونَ * فَتَعَالَى اللَّهُ الْمَلِكُ الْحَقُّ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْكَرِيمِ * وَمَنْ يَدْعُ مَعَ اللَّهِ إِلَهًا آخَرَ لَا بُرْهَانَ لَهُ بِهِ فَإِنَّمَا حِسَابُهُ عِندَ رَبِّهِ إِنَّهُ لَا يُفْلِحُ الْكَافِرُونَ
wird_id_65.en_wird_description: Do you think that We have but created you in vain, and you shall not be returned to us? Exalted be Allah, The King, The True, no God is there but He, Lord of the Magnanimous Throne; And whoever calls upon another god with Allah without proof of it, his reckoning is but with his Lord, verily unbelievers shall not succeed.
wird_id_65.ar_wird_transliteration: Afahasibtum annamā khalaqnākum 'abathan wa annakum 'ilaynā lā turja'ūn * fata'ālā Allahu al-māliku al-ḥaqqu lā ilāha illā huwa rabbū al-`arshi al-karīmi * waman yad'u ma'a Allahi ilāhan ākhara lā burhāna lahu bihi fa'inamā ḥisābuhu 'inda rabbīhi innahu lā yufliḥu al-kāfirūn

wird_id_66.ar_wird_description: وَقُلْ رَبِّ اغْفِرْ وَارْحَمْ وَأَنْتَ خَيْرُ الرَّاحِمِينَ
wird_id_66.en_wird_description: And say: My Lord Forgive and have Mercy, for You are the best of the Merciful.
wird_id_66.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa qul rabbī aghfir warḥam wa anta khayru al-rāḥimīn

wird_id_67.ar_wird_description: هُوَ الْحَيُّ لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا هُوَ فَادْعُوهُ مُخْلِصِينَ لَهُ الدِّينَ * الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_67.en_wird_description: He is the Living; no god is there but Him, so call on Him, making Your religion sincerely His. Praise be to Allah ,Lord of the worlds.
wird_id_67.ar_wird_transliteration: Huwa al-ḥayyu lā ilāha illā huwa fād'ūhū mukhliṣīn lahu al-dīn * al-ḥamdu li Allah rabbī al-`ālamīn

wird_id_68.ar_wird_description: إِنَّ اللَّهَ وَمَلَائِكَتَهُ يُصَلُّونَ عَلَى النَّبِيِّ، يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا صَلُّوا عَلَيْهِ وَسَلِّمُوا تَسْلِيمًا
wird_id_68.en_wird_description: Verily Allah and His Angels [continually] extend their blessings upon the Prophet: O you who believe! Extend your prayers upon him; and submit to him in full.
wird_id_68.ar_wird_transliteration: Inna Allāha wamala'ikatahu yuṣallūna 'alā al-nabīyi, yā ayyuhā al-ladhīna āmanū ṣallū 'alayhi wa sallimū taslīmā

wird_id_69.ar_wird_description: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِينَ * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
wird_id_69.en_wird_description: Glory be to your Lord, Lord of Honour, Who is above what they ascribe to Him. Peace be upon the Messengers; and Praise be to ALLAH, Lord of the Worlds.
wird_id_69.ar_wird_transliteration: Subḥāna rabbika rabbī al-`izzati 'ammā yaṣifūn * wa salāmun 'alā al-mursalīn * wa al-ḥamdu li Allāhi rabbī al-`ālamīn

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى سَيِّدِنَا مُحَمَّدٍ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبِهِ وَسَلِّمْ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! Shower Your Blessings and Peace on our Most Honorable Prophet
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli 'ala sayyidina Muhammad wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهـُمَّ بـِسَطـْوَةِ جَبـَرُوتِ قـَهـْرِكَ، وبـِسُرْعـَةِ إغـَاثـَةِ نـَصـْرِكَ، وَبـِغَـيرَتـِكَ لانـْـتـِهـَاكِ حُرُمَـاتِكَ، وَبـِحـِمَايَتِكَ لِـمَنِ احـْـتـَمـَى بـِآياتِكَ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: Oh Allah! I ask you by the authority of Your Absolute power; by the speedy help of Your support; by the immediate protective response over the violation of what You have prohibited; and by Your inviolable protection for whomever seeks the protection in Your Signs.
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma bi-satwatihi jabarooti qahri-ka, wa-bi-sur'ati ighaathati nasri-ka, wa-bi-ghayratika lan'tihaaki hurumaatika, wa-bi-himayatik liman-ihtama bi-ayaatika

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: نسْأَلـُكَ يَا اللهُ، يَا سَميعُ، يَا قـَرِيبُ، يَا مُجـِيبُ، يَا سَرِيعُ، يَا مُنـْتـَـقِمُ، يَا شـَدِيدَ البَـطـْشِ، يَا جَبَّارُ،  يَا قـَهـَّارُ،  يَا مَنْ لاَ يُعْـجـِزُهُ قـَهـْرُ الجَبـَابـِرَةِ، وَلاَ يَعْظـُمُ عـَلـَيْهِ هَلاَكُ المُتـَمَرِّدَةِ مِنَ المُلُوكِ واْلأَكـَاسِرَةِ، أَنْ تـَجْـعَلَ كـَيـْدَ مَنْ كـَادَناَ فِي نـَحْرِهِ، وَمَكـْرَ مَنْ مَكـَرَ بِنَا عَـائِداً عَلَيهِ، وَحُـفـْرَةَ مَنْ حَفـَرَ لَنَا وَاقِعاً فِيْهَا. وَمَنْ نـَصَبَ لَنَا شـَبـَكـَةَ الخِدَاعِ اجْعَلـْهُ يَا سَيِّدِي مُسَاقاً إِلَيْهَا وَمُصَـادًا فِيْهَا وَأسِيْراً لـَدَيْهـَا
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: I implore You! Oh Allah! O All-Hearing! O the Near One! O the Responder! O the Swift One in Action! O Avenger! O Mighty Assaulter! O Subjugator! O Compeller! O You Who is not weakened by the power of tyrants! O You for whom the destruction of tyrants is no significant challenge! We ask You to make the trap of he who plots against us to be entrapped by it, and the plot of he who plots against us to fall prey to his own snare! I beg You to cause he who digs a hole for us to fall into it, and he who sets up a net of deception for us to be driven into it, trapped and imprisoned by it!
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Nas'aluka ya Allahu, ya Samee'u, ya Qareebu, ya Mujeebu, ya Saree'u, ya Muntaqimu, ya Shadeedu al-Batshi, ya Jabaaru, ya Qahhaaru, ya man laa yu'jizuhu qahru al-jabaabirati, wa laa ya'zumu 'alayhi halaaku al-mutamarridati mina al-mulooki wal-akaseerati, an taj'ala kayda man kaadana fee nahrihi, wa makra man makar bina 'aa'idan 'alayhi, wa hufrata man hafara lana waqi'an feeha. Wa man nasaba lana shabakata al-kidaai aj'ilhu ya sayyidee musaakan ilayhaa wa musaad-an feehaa wa aseeraan ladayhaa

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ بـِحَقِّ كَهَيَعَصَ، اِكـْـفِـنـَا هَمَّ العِدَا، وَلـَقـِّهـِمُ الرَّدَى، وَاجْعـَلهُمْ لِكـُلِّ حَبِيْبٍ فِداً، وَسَلـِّطْ عَلـَيـْهـِمْ عَاجـِلَ النـِّقـْمـَةِ فيِ الْيَوْمِ وَالْغـَدَا. اَللَّهُمَّ بَدِّدْ شـَمْلـَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـَرِّق جَمْـعَـهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أَقـْلِلْ عَدَدَهـُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ فـُلَّ حَدَّهُمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ اجْعَلْ الدَّائِرَة عَلـَيـْهـِمْ. اَللَّهُمَّ أوْصِلْ العَذَابَ إِلَيهـِمْ
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: O Allah, by the right of “KAF-HA-YA-AIN-ṢAD” relieve us from the fear of our enemies! Destroy them; make them a ransom for our beloved ones; and overpower them with a swift defeat, now and then. O God break their unity! O God disperse their assembly! O God lessen their numbers! O God blunt their edge! O God turn fate against them. O God unleash torment upon them. O God make them shackled by their own ring of fetters! O God make retribution to be upon them.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma bihqqi Kaf-Ha-Ya-Ain-Saad ikfina hamma al-‘idaa, wa laqqihim ar-radaa, wa aj'ilhum likulli habeebin fiddaa, wa sallit 'alayhim 'aajila an-niqmah fee al-yawmi wal-ghadaa. Allahumma baddid shamlahum. Allahumma farriq jama'ahum. Allahumma aqillil 'adaduhum. Allahumma fullil haddahum. Allahumma aj'il da'irah 'alayhim. Allahumma awsilil 'adhab ilayhim

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ أخـْرِجْـهـُمْ عَنْ دَائِرَةِ الحِلـْمِ، وَاسْـلـُبـْهـُمْ مَدَدَ الإمْـهـَالِ، وغـُلَّ أيْديَهـُمْ وَأَرْجُلَهُم، وأشْدُدْ عَلـَى قـُلوبـِهـِمْ ولا تـُبـَلـِّغـْهـُمُ الآمَالْ. اللَّهُمَّ مَزِّقـْهـُمْ كـُلَّ مُمَزَّقٍ مَزَّقـْـتـَهُ لِأَعْدَائِكَ انـْـتِصـَاراً لِأَنـْبـِياَئِكَ وَرُسُـلِكَ وَأوْلِياَئِـكَ.
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: O God exclude them from the shade of leniency! Deprive them of the support of sufficient time! Fetter their hands and feet, tie up their hearts and do not enable them to reach their goals.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma akhrijhum 'an da'irat al-hilm, wa aslubbihim madad al-imhaali, wa ghull aydeehim wa arjuluhum, wa ashdud 'ala quloobihim wa la tuballighum al-aamaal. Allahumma maziqqhum kulla mumazzaqin mazzaqtahu li-a'daa'ika intisaran li-anbiya'ika wa rusulika wa awliyaa'ika

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ انـْـتـَصِرْ لَناَ انـْـتـِصَارَكَ لأحْبـَابـِكَ عَلَى أعْدَائِكَ. اَللَّهُمَّ لاَ تـُمَكـِّنِ الأعْدَاءَ فِينَا، وَلاَ تـُسـَلـِطـَهـُمْ عَـلـَيْـنـَا بـِذُنُوبـِنـَا
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: O God tear them apart in the way You make Your enemies perish in order to grant victory to Your Prophets, and dearest servants! O God grant us the victory of Your beloved ones over Your enemies! O God do not allow the enemy to overpower us and do not give them authority over us due to our sins.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma intasir lana intisaara-ka li-ahbaabika 'ala a'daa'ika. Allahumma laa tumakkinil a'daa'a feena, wa laa tusallitihim 'alayna bidhunoobina

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: حَمِ~
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: Ḥa-Meem.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Ha-Meem

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: حُـمَّ الأمْرُ وَجَاءَ النـَّصـْرُ فـَعـَليْنـَا لاَ يـُنـْصـَرُونَ، حَمِ عسق حِمَايَتـُنـَا مِمَّا نـَخـَافُ، اَللَّهُمَّ قـِنـَا شـَرَّ الأسْوَاءِ وَلاَ تـَجْعـَلْنـَا مَحـَلاًّ لِلْبـَلـْوَاء، اَللَّهُمَّ أعْطِنـَا أمَلَ الرَّجَاءِ وَفـَوْقَ الأمَلِ
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Matters have become intense; victory has arrived; they will not overpower us! Ḥa-mim-Ain-Sin-Qaf! Grant us protection from what we fear!  O Allah shield us from the evil of iniquities and make us not the site of tribulation. O Allah, grant us what we hope for and beyond what we hope for.
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Hummal amru wa jaaa al-nasru fa'alaynaa laa yunsaroon, Ha-Meem 'Ain-Sin-Qaf! Himayatuna mimma nakhaafu, Allahumma qinaa sharra al-aswaa'i wa laa tajilna mahalan lil-balwaa, Allahumma a'tina amala ar-rajaa wa fawqa al-amal

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: يَا هُو
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: YA-HU.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Hu

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: يَا مَنْ بـِفـَضْـلِهِ لِفـَضْلِهِ نـَسْألـُكَ العَجـَلَ العَجـَلَ، إِلَهِيِ الْإِجَابَةَ الإِجَابَة. يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ نـُوحاً فيِ قـَوْمِهِ، يَا مَنْ نـَصَرَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَلى أعْدَائِهِ، يَا مَنْ رَدَّ يُوسُفَ عَلَى يَعْـقُوبْ، يَا مَنْ كـَشـَفَ ضـُرَّ أيُّوبَ، يَا مَنْ أَجَابَ دَعْوَةَ زكـَرِيَّا، يَا مَنْ قـَبـِلَ تـَسـْبيحَ يُونـُسَ بْنِ مَتـَّى
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: Oh, the One through Whose favours we ask for His favours! We ask You for haste; haste! O Allah, respond to us! O the One Who responded to Nuh against his people; O the One Who gave victory to Ibrahim over his enemies! O the One Who returned Yusuf to Yaqub! O the One Who removed the tribulation of Ayyub! O the One Who answered the call of Zakariyya! O the One Who answered the prayers of Yūnus son of Matta.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya man bifadlihi lifadlihi nas'aluka al-'ajala al-'ajala, Ilahi al-ijabataa al-ijabataa. Ya man ajaba Noohan fi qawmihi, ya man nasara Ibrahim 'ala a'daa'ihi, ya man radd Yousufa 'ala Ya'qub, ya man kashafa durr Ayyub, ya man ajaba da'wat Zakariyya, ya man qabila tasbeeh Yunus ibn Matta

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: نـَسْـألـُكَ بـِأَسْرَارِ هَذِهِ الدَّعَوَاتِ أنْ تـَقـْبـَلَ مَا بـِهِ دَعَوْنـَاكَ، وأنْ تـُعْطِيَنـَا مَا سَألنَاكَ. أنـْجـِزْ لَنـَا وَعْدَكَ الَّذِي وَعَدْتـَهُ لِعِـبَادِكَ المُؤْمِنِين
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: We implore You, O God, through the secrets of these invocations to accept what we call upon You for; to grant us what we ask for; and to manifest for us the promise which You have promised the believers.
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Nas'alu-ka bi-asrari hadhihi ad-du'aati an taqbal ma bihi da'awnaaka, wa an tu'tiyna ma sa'alnaaka. Anjiz lana wa'daka alladhi wa'dtahu li'ibadika al-mu'mineen

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أنـْتَ سُبْحَانـَكَ إِنِّي كـُنـْتُ مِنَ الظـَّالِمِينَ
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: There is no god but You, The Glorified! I have been among the wrongdoers.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: La ilaha illa anta, subhanaka inni kuntu mina adh-dhalimeen

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: انـْـقـَطـَعـَتْ آمَالـُنـَا وَعِزَّتِكَ إِلاَّ مِنـْكَ. وَخـَابَ رَجَاؤُنـَا وَحَـقِـكَ إِلاَّ فِيكَ. إنْ أبْطـَأتْ غـَارَةُ الأرْحَامِ وابْـتـَعـَدَتْ، فـَأقـْرَبُ الشَّيءِ مِنـَّا غـَارَةُ اللهِ
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: By Your majesty, all our hopes have been lost except for our hope in You! By Your due right, all of our expectations have diminished except for our expectations from You! When the support of our kin slows down and stops, the closest thing to us is the immediate protective support of Allah.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Inqata'at amaluna wa 'izzati-ka illa minka. Wakhaba rajaa'una wa haqq-uka illa fikka. In abta'at ghirat al-arhami wa abta'adat, fa-aqrabu ash-shay'i minna ghirat Allah

wird_id_14.ar_wird_description: يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ جـِدِّي السـَّيـْرَ مُسْرِعَةً فِي حَلِّ عُـقـْدَتـِنـَا يَا غـَارَةَ اللهِ
wird_id_14.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, come hastily to unravel our knots.
wird_id_14.ar_wird_transliteration: Ya Gharata Allah, jiddi as-saira musri'atan fi halli 'uqdatina, ya Gharata Allah

wird_id_15.ar_wird_description: عَدَتِ الْعَادُونَ وَجَارُوا، وَرَجَوْنـَا اللهَ مُجِـيرًا، وَكـَفـَى باِللهِ وَلـِيـًّا وَكـَفـَى باللهِ نـَصِيرًا
wird_id_15.en_wird_description: Oh, the Protective Support of Allah, the enemy has antagonized and violated; and we have turned to Allah seeking refuge! Allah is the Most Sufficient Guardian. Allah is the Most Sufficient Victor.
wird_id_15.ar_wird_transliteration: Adat al-'aduna wa jaaroo, wa rajawna Allah mujiran, wa kifa Billahi waliyyan wa kifa Billahi nasiran

wird_id_16.ar_wird_description: وحَسْبـُنـَا اللهُ وَنِعْمَ الوَكِيلُ
wird_id_16.en_wird_description: God is sufficient for us; He is the Best Guardian
wird_id_16.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa hasbuna Allahu wa ni'ma al-wakeel

wird_id_17.ar_wird_description: وَلاَ حَوْلَ وَلاَ قـُوَّةَ إِلَّا بِاللهِ الْعَليِّ الْعَظِيمِ
wird_id_17.en_wird_description: There is no power or strength except through Allah the Most Exalted and Great.
wird_id_17.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa la hawla wa la quwwata illa Billahi al-‘Aliyyi al-‘Azheem

wird_id_18.ar_wird_description: سَلاَمٌ عَلَى نُوحٍ في الْعَالمَين، اِسْـتـَجـِبْ لـَنـَا آمِينْ، فـَقـُطِعَ دَابـِرُ القـَوْمِ الَّذِينَ ظـَلـَمُوا والْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ العَالـَمِين
wird_id_18.en_wird_description: (Oh Allah) Answer our prayers!  Amin! The plans of the oppressors have failed. All gratitude are to Allah, Lord of the worlds.
wird_id_18.ar_wird_transliteration: Salaamun 'ala Noohin fi al-‘aalameen, istajib lana Ameen, faquti'a daabiru al-qawmilladhina zhalamoo wal-hamdu lillaahi rabbi al-‘aalameen

wird_id_19.ar_wird_description: وَصَـلـَّى اللهُ عَـلـَى سَيـِّدِنـَا مُحَمَّدٍ النـَّبـِيّ الأمِيِّ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَصَحْبـِهِ وَسَـلـَّمَ
wird_id_19.en_wird_description: May Allah bless our Honourable Muhammad, the unlettered prophet, his Folks and Companions, and save us from disobedience.
wird_id_19.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa sallallahu 'ala Sayyidina Muhammadin an-Nabi al-Ummi wa 'ala aalihi wa sahbihi wa sallam

wird_id_1.ar_wird_description: أَعُوذُ بِاللهِ مِنَ الشَّيْطَانِ الرَّجِيمِ
wird_id_1.en_wird_description: I seek refuge in Allah from the Accursed Devil
wird_id_1.ar_wird_transliteration: A'udhu billahi min ash-shaytan ir-rajim

wird_id_2.ar_wird_description: بِسمِ اللهِ الرَّحْمنِ الرَّحيمِ
wird_id_2.en_wird_description: In the Name of Allah, The Gracious and Merciful
wird_id_2.ar_wird_transliteration: Bismillahi r-rahmani r-rahim

wird_id_3.ar_wird_description: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ وَسَلِّمْ بِجَميْعِ الشُؤُونِ، في الظُّهُورِ وَالبُطونِ، عَلَى مَنْ مِنْهُ انْشَقَّتِ الأَسْرَارُ الكَامِنَةُ في ذَاتِهِ العَلِيَّةِ ظُهُورًا۝ وَانْفَلَقَتِ الأَنْوَارُ المُنْطَويَةُ في سَمَاءِ صِفَاتِهِ السَّنيَةِ بُدُورًا۝ وَفِيْهِ ارْتَقَتِ الحَقَائِقُ مِنْهُ إِليْهِ۝ وَتَنَزَّلَتْ عُلُومُ آدَمَ بِهِ فِيهِ عَلَيهِ۝ فَأعْجَزَ كُلًا مِنَ الخَلائِقِ فَهمُ مَا أُوْدِعَ مِنَ السِّرَّ فِيْهِ۝ وَلَهُ تَضَاءَلَتِ الفُهُومُ وَكُلٌّ عَجْزُهُ يَكفيْهِ۝
wird_id_3.en_wird_description: O God send Your Blessing, in all the affairs of the revealed and the hidden, upon the one from whom the secrets, which are hidden in his lofty essence, appeared; the lights, which are hidden in the sky of his lofty qualities, appeared like full moons; though him ultimate truths emerged, from him to Him; the knowledges of Adam descended through him and upon him, rendering the entire creation unable to comprehend that which was entrusted to him of the secret; and before him all understandings diminish; while each one's inability to understand wraps them all.
wird_id_3.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma salli wa sallim bi-jami'i ash-shu'uni, fi-az-zuhur wa al-buton, 'ala man minhu inshaqqati al-asraru al-kaminatu fi-zatihi al-aliyya zuhur-an, wa infaliqati al-anwaru al-mantawiya fi-sama'i sifatihi as-saniya buduran, wa fihi irtaqatil haqa'iqu minhu ilayhi, wa tanzzalati 'ulumu adama bihi fihi 'alayh, fa'jaza kullan mina al-khala'iq fahmu ma udhi'a mina as-sirri fihi, wa lahu tada'ala t-tufuhumu wa kullun 'ajzu-hu yakfihi

wird_id_4.ar_wird_description: فَذَلِكَ السِّرُّ المَصُونُ لَمْ يُدْرِكْهُ مِنَّا سَابِقٌ في وُجُودِهِ۝ وَلا يَبْلُغُهُ لاحِقٌ عَلَى سَواَبِقِ شُهُودِهِ۝
wird_id_4.en_wird_description: This is the preserved secret that has not been grasped by any one of us in our lifetime, and none of those who come later would ever aspire to reach despite their established experience in Divine witnessing.
wird_id_4.ar_wird_transliteration: Fadhālika as-sirru al-masoonu lam yudrikhu minna sabiqun fi wujudihi, wa la yablughuhu lahiqun 'ala sawabiqi shuhudihi

wird_id_5.ar_wird_description: فَأعْظِمْ بِهِ مِنْ نَبِيٍ رِيَاضُ المُلْكِ وَالمَلَكُوتِ بِزَهْرِ جَمَالِهِ الزَّاهِرِ مُونِقَةٌ۝
wird_id_5.en_wird_description: Magnified is the Prophet whose glowing beauty blossoms the gardens of the visible and spiritual worlds.
wird_id_5.ar_wird_transliteration: Fa'zim bih min nabiyyin riadu al-mulki wa al-malakuti bizahri jamali-hi az-zahiri muniqatan

wird_id_6.ar_wird_description: وَحِيَاضُ مَعَالِمِ الجَبَروْتِ بِفَيْضِ أَنْوَارِ سِرِّهِ البَاهِرِ مُتَدَفِقَةٌ۝
wird_id_6.en_wird_description: And the reservoirs of the world of al-jabarut pour forth in profusion the lights of his dazzling secret.
wird_id_6.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa hayadu ma'aleemi al-jabaruti bifaidi anwari sirri-hi al-bahiri mutadafiqatun

wird_id_7.ar_wird_description: وَلا شَيءَ إلا وَهُوَ بِهِ مَنُوطٌ۝ وَبِسِرْهِ السَّاري مَحُوطٌ۝ إذْ لَوْلا الوَاسِطَةُ في كُلِ صُعُودٍ وَهُبُوطٍ لَذَهَبَ كَما قيلَ المَوْسُوطُ۝
wird_id_7.en_wird_description: And nothing there is, but it is conditioned by him, and encompassed by his all-reaching mystery, since if not for the means, in every ascent and descent, the end, as has been said, would have gone.
wird_id_7.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa la shay'a illa wa huwa bihi manutun wa bisirri-hi as-sari mahootun idh lawla al-wasitat fi kulli su'udin wa hubutin ladahaba kama qila al-mawsutu

wird_id_8.ar_wird_description: صَلَاةً تَلِيقُ بِكَ مِنْكَ إِلَيْهِ۝ وَتَتَوَارَدُ بِتَوارُدِ الخَلقِ الجَدِيْدِ وَالفَيْضِ المَدِيدِ عَلَيْهِ۝
wird_id_8.en_wird_description: Bless him a blessing that truly befits You, from You unto him, and ever reiterated with the successive renewal of creation and endless emanation upon him;
wird_id_8.ar_wird_transliteration: Salatan taliqu bika minka ilayhi wa tatawaradu bitawarudi al-khalqi al-jadidi wal-faydi al-madidi 'alayhi

wird_id_9.ar_wird_description: وَسَلامًا يُجَاري هَذِهِ الصَّلاةَ فَيْضُهُ وَفَضْلُهُ، كَمَا هُوَ أَهْلُهُ۝ وَعَلى آلِهِ شُمُوسِ سَمَاءِ العُلا، وَأصْحَابِهِ وَالتَابِعِيْنَ وَمَنْ تَلا۝
wird_id_9.en_wird_description: And grant him peace whose flow and largesse is commensurate with this blessing, as is meet for him; and on his folk, who are the suns of the sky of sublimity, and on his companions and followers and those who follow after.
wird_id_9.ar_wird_transliteration: Wa salam-an yujari hadhihi as-salata fayduhu wa fadluhu, kama huwa ahluhu, wa 'ala alihi shumusu sama'i al-ula, wa ashabihi wa at-tabi'in wa man tala

wird_id_10.ar_wird_description: اَللَّهُمَّ إنَّهُ سِرُّكَ الجامِعُ لِكُلِ الأَسْرَارِ۝ وَنُوْرُكَ الواسِعُ لِجَميْعِ الأَنْوَارِ۝ وَدَلِيلُكَ الدَّالُّ بِكَ عَلَيْكَ۝ وَقائِدُ رَكْبِ عَوَالِمِكَ إِلَيْكَ۝ وَحِجابُكَ الأَعْظَمُ القَائِمُ لَكَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ۝ فَلا يَصِلُ واصِلٌ إلا إلى حَضْرَتِهِ المانِعَة۝ وَلا يَهْتَدي حائِرٌ إلا بِأنْوَارِهِ اللَّامِعَةِ۝
wird_id_10.en_wird_description: O Allah, verily, he is Your secret that gathers all secrets, and Your expansive light for all lights, and Your guide who points to You, and the leader of the caravan of Your worlds to You, and Your greatest veil, which stands before You. None may reach his station except by being brought to Your presence, and none may be guided except by his shining light.
wird_id_10.ar_wird_transliteration: Allahumma innahu sirruka al-jami'u likulli al-asrar, wa nuruka al-wasi'u lijami'i al-anwar, wa daliluka ad-dallu bika 'alayka, wa qa'idu rakkabi 'awalimika ilayka, wa hijabuka al-azhamu al-qaimu laka bayna yadayk, fala yasilu wasilun illa ila hadhrati-hil-mani'ati, wa la yahtadi hayirun illa bi-anwarihi al-lami'ati

wird_id_11.ar_wird_description: اَلّلهُمَّ أَلحِقْني بِنَسَبِهِ الرُّوْحيّْ۝ وَحَقِّقْني بِحَسَبِهِ اَلسُّبُّوحيّْ۝ وَعَرِّفني إيَّاهُ مَعْرِفَةً أَشْهَدُ بِها مُحيَّاهْ۝ وَأَصيرُ بِهَا مَجْلاهُ، كَمَا يُحِبُّهُ وَيَرْضَاهُ۝ وَأَسْلَمُ بِهَا مِنْ وُرُودِ مَوَارِدِ الجَهلِ بِعَوَارِفِه۝ وَأَكْرَعُ بَهَا مِنْ مَوَارِدِ الفَضْلِ بِمَعَارِفِهِ۝
wird_id_11.en_wird_description: O Allah connect me with his spiritual lineage and realize me through his lofty excellence. And give me knowledge of him by which I behold his countenance, and come to manifest him as he would like and be pleased; and through which I am saved from the paths of ignorance of his gifts and drink to the repletion at the streams of his knowledges;
wird_id_11.ar_wird_transliteration: Allāhumma alḥiqnī binasabihi ar- rūḥīyyi waḥaqqiqnī biḥasabihi as-subbūḥīyyi waʿarifnī īyāhu maʿrifatan ashhadu bihā muḥiyyāhū wa-asīru bihā majlāhū kamā yuḥibbuhu wa-yarḍāhū wa-aslamu bihā min warūdi mawāridi al-jahli biʿawārifiḥi wa-akraʿu bihā min mawāridi al-faḍli bimaʿārifiḥi

wird_id_12.ar_wird_description: وَاحْمِلْني عَلَىْ نَجَائِبِ لُطْفِكَ وَرَكائِبِ حَنَانِكَ وَعَطْفِكَ۝ وَسِرْ بي في سَبيلِهِ القَويمِ وَصِرَاطِهِ المُسْتَقِيم۝ إلى حَضْرَتِهِ المُتَّصِلَةِ بِحَضْرَتِكَ القُدْسِيَّةِ۝ المُتَبَلِّجَةِ بِتَجَلِّياتِ مَحَاسِنهِ الأُنْسِيَّة۝حَمْلًا مَحْفُوفَا بِجُنُودِ نُصْرَتِكَ مَصْحُوبًا بِعَوَالِمِ أُسرَتِكَ۝
wird_id_12.en_wird_description: And carry me on the riding camels of Your graciousness and dromedaries of Your tenderness and compassion, and make me journey on his righteous path and straight way, unto his presence, connected with Your own sacred presence, lusterous with the epiphanies of his qualities of intimate friendship- A carrying surrounded by the hosts of Your aid, amidst the companies of Your beloved ones.
wird_id_12.ar_wird_transliteration: Waḥmilnī ʿalā najāʾibi luṭfika wa-rakāʾibi ḥanānīka wa-ʿaṭfika wa-sir bī fī sabīlihi al-qawīmi wa-ṣirāṭihi al-mustaqīmi ilā ḥaḍratihi al-muttaṣilati bi-ḥaḍratika al-qudsiyyati al-mutabalijati bi-tajallīyāti maḥāsinihi al-unsiyyati ḥamlan maḥfūfan bi-junūdi nuṣratika maṣḥūban bi-ʿawālīmi usratika

wird_id_13.ar_wird_description: وَاقْذِفْ بي عَلَى البَاطِلِ بِأَنْوَاعِهِ، فِيْ جَمِيْعِ بِقاعِهِ۝ فَأَدْمَغَهُ بِالحَقِّ عَلَى الوَجْهِ الأَحَقِّ۝
wird_id_13.en_wird_description: And hurl me against falsehood, in all its types and places, so I shatter it with truth, in the way that is fittest.
wird_id_13.ar_wird_transliteration: Waqdif bī ʿalā al-bāṭilī bi-anwāʿihi fī jamīʿi biqāʿihi fa-admaghahu bil-ḥaqqi ʿalā al-wajhi al-ḥaqqi
